body:
It is scary. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/october-end-of-month?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211030_tinaramirez_october-end-of-month-one-day
Friend,
Sorry to bother you on Saturday, but before I take my daughter trick-or-treating tomorrow, I wanted to tell you something that is scarier than Halloween: the consequences if we don’t stop Radical Progressives from ruining our country.

Right now, not only are we fighting for a Republican majority in the House, but our individual freedoms are now at stake. Here is what’s on the line:
* Our Pro-Life rights
* The Second Amendment
* Our Constitutional rights and liberties
* The security of our elections
* Parental choice for our children’s education

We cannot afford to go backward and lose everything that we are fighting for. Not only is the Biden Administration willing to forgo your Constitutional rights, but they want to force their FAR-LEFT views on you.

That is why this October End-of-Month goal is so important. Every contribution towards this goal is one more ally in fighting back and supporting a Pro-Republican, Pro-Life, Pro-Second Amendment vision!

We need your urgent help. It's no secret - our campaign was OUTRAISED by millions last quarter by our Democrat opponent. Democrats know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority this cycle, and they're proving they will spend whatever it takes to help our opponent win. The last polls are closing for early voting across Virginia.

Now, the final opportunity Democrats have to turn out voters will be Tuesday, Election Day itself.

With everything on the line, we can’t afford to slip up right now. Trump supporters are fired up and Youngkin has momentum.

To stop them, we’re going to need a massive showing from Virginia Democrats. That’s going to take a Herculean effort over the last three days of this election, and we’re counting on you to make sure we can pull it off.

I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021.

Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection.

We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong.

[**_If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Democrat Dr. Raul Ruiz._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UFjMxBEfCZEB7ixWqYz-IQhw2LhCg7_yd8uZZd1tm3xSLF-fT6th_oA40SlouL5o9IkuZIFeIYpyf5jT6LpvcONE5Lkeh7YD4p725IvQrN-OMJYoZxHdS24QdAxL9tS0OOyWM01SloWRB19LIM9GDAY1W8W94t4893IbY4DtP8QNIR-f8mneAumadnG4t-D70S8wIVEEK4raxaQHF8nKf8SFDeUm9DSi8p45rdH6hIq-VHk-7GsNvqgRkuRN_ysjEKj4FWuSjYrwykJUJflWV3-PbgtJxMBUI1e8rApIj3EkCtKi6QByiAOxYK-LYA_CIH4zRJTv7ISZaNsWmg3sX_CcBhMRUO98-fM2cx_jNM27Uj2L6SR_U4fFB2x8HmKsMlRUiUVJ3ojq2os6FAgnOhng0kMcUFr9dUII5ADCVLQD0TfHTFaJMj7mpKt1r94HJVf1wjSuR-_elZcJzYzhEmnSH3yfPzCs6Rru5kt7ktkA/3gm/hXrb8oJQQuCGMGOdMiNQVQ/h2/oui55VDe-i6oZWuv0oMVsv3hAjAAfkjCOsE4UZt1YYY)

This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now.

We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday.

clean_body: I’m asking for your help to stop it | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. | This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls STILL tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism. | | | | | | I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected. The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself. Now I’ve got to get back on the road, but I’ll ask one last time, \-- Terry | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it | | |
---
| | I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. **[If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Steve Sisolak.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3F-WWEfzKFepdMRtcNPEIDs91HnclHd6Q3uYfQquF6ZfTgqsWaSO1ZK8l30cSFz4tq9OSn1Da_nYng550kiLZGQBuSVgSmUyzPzwyGRw_TI4oaIIA8VZDkS7rYesUFwUPI7SbwRXjZIEfzwoVcSNaateQcdqK7xv3hF6U0Z4ueWarZqGc3-YKiiAkgul6hDO5mB-BwZEudLQKjHUe80W2aLqr4GpfWYj2MkNKMOxJTe6xH8iAu1LqaW4XNWeGEgpAJKubp4W2lpPO9oaHQpBLBgU6cOJvR1gLfZ5BZfaHeWprWDtzb4bvdX2UKhPpjKQ0RfQJ8Q_AKEtu2URNOgcdi-utWnXyIU7wGZoC3w6eEJhWD7c9zwfhy60gSsUBWFf6FIJc2nCrwK-RGH4gAeYFIgAaNjadV-4i6-OuWY3pg0/3gm/-m6EE96WSOeHPPBC8vG6DQ/h0/46CF2TiJxPxkql9_82Mmj_jzFv4bd9kht0IFal7cfys)** This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. subject: Now is the time to win the fight for the soul of America!

| OCTOBER 30, 2021
---
[Now is the time to win the fight for the soul of America!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODA4Mzc5NTc1MjE5MDAxODQ2JmM9ejZpOCZlPTAmYj03NzYwMDM0ODkmZD16MW43bTNw.l1FoiSMjm54rhANVqIdj3ULdxZX0XGr8GqyOpWtymfI)

| |

|
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Letter From Ed Idaho’s Legislature will resume the session on November 15th. My most sincere hope is for the Legislature to pass a bill to protect Idahoans from big corporations and “special-interest science.” Our elected leaders need to make vaccine-mandates illegal! We are inundated with hordes of subject matter experts who are so arrogant in their beliefs they feel entitled to make medical decisions for other individuals and families. It’s deeply disturbing to see these experts refuse to accept any remote probability they could be wrong. Look, I’m no medical professional and am not in the habit of providing other people medical advice. I believe there should exist a level of humility in America where we respect others personal medical decisions and admit our understanding is imperfect. Sadly, elitists in the academic & corporate world class want us to deem their understanding so complete and so pure that the rest of us mere mortals need not ask any questions. Idaho’s “good ole boys club” defends a corrosive environment where corporations can do whatever they like. Working-class citizens and our economy suffer immensely when big corporations collude. One recent example of this type of collusion was when the 3 largest healthcare systems in the state announced on the EXACT same day that they were mandating experimental medical treatments for all their employees and contractors. Now our communities are plagued with unemployed healthcare professionals and reduced services from hospitals. My own son cannot get a procedure he needs because of the failing healthcare systems. According to the Idaho Constitution, the state government exists to secure the blessings of freedom and promote our common welfare. Let me be the first to say, droves of unemployed healthcare professionals created by corporate abuse does NOT promote our common welfare. Republicanism represents the sacred ideal that the principle of personal empowerment creates strong families and robust communities. Individuals should make personal medical decisions, not crony corporatists or academic elitists. This is a time for bold leadership. Vaccine mandates should be banned. It’s the right thing for our community and our families.
---

---
|
---
| |
---
| [](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODA4Mzc5NTc1MjE5MDAxODQ2JmM9ejZpOCZlPTAmYj03NzYwMDM0OTUmZD1nOWU2ZzBp.uXPov77ESbr1sYdpAqAWVFXE7MHv7U8Ng-XMa5OLGMQ)

## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. [Read Full Education Policy Summary here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODA4Mzc5NTc1MjE5MDAxODQ2JmM9ejZpOCZlPTAmYj03NzYwMDM1MDEmZD1rMG45aTJs.yrWmzn-Qn93axqEBDr_wdWAdixOkbcsOaRK4sN0rZtk)

| October 23
---
Eagle, Idaho
Some incredible Patriots in the Legacy Subdivision in Eagle, Idaho came out to hear Ed’s vision for Idaho! They didn’t let the weather keep them home! Their freedom means more than their comfort...thank you for coming out!

| If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow **Patriots.** Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can’t volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: While others talk, we act!
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Throughout 2021, Judicial Watch has been building on the momentum gained on several critical policy fronts...and now our work is exploding.
Simply said, we're carrying our most significant caseload _ever_ , and we need to respond to increasing attacks on the rule of law by the Left. That is why **_[I hope you will make your best donation to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57004&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMzEwNDMzNTc=)_**.
Let me remind you briefly of just some of the things Judicial Watch has accomplished so far this year:
* **_We continue to lead the fight for protecting the integrity of our elections_**.
Our latest "clean election" lawsuits against **Colorado** , **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** over their failure to clean their voter rolls continue...and we recently scored two federal court victories in **Maryland** and **Illinois** that ensure public access to secret voter list maintenance information. We are also in the middle of our review of 2020 voter registration and Census data _that will likely lead to investigations and lawsuits in additional states_.

* **_We are breaking new ground in exposing the use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate our children in Marxist "Critical Race Theory_" studies**. Using state open-records laws we are informing parents and taxpayers how the Left is spreading this hate-filled doctrine into American classrooms...and how they are using our tax dollars to do so!

* **_We continue to lead the fight to overturn illegal sanctuary laws in court_**. Our multi-year litigation in San Francisco helped lead to important policy changes there...and are now pursuing a similar lawsuit in California's Santa Clara County

Clearly, we don't just _complain_ about voter fraud, or the evils of "**Critical Race Theory,** " or illegal immigration. _Our investigators and attorneys use federal and state laws to stop lawless government corruption by exposing the truth about what our local, state and federal governments are up to_.
This kind of thorough and persistent work is what Judicial Watch has been doing since 1994. **_Because while others in Washington, DC talk (especially Congress), we act_!**
That's why **_[I am asking you to make your best gift today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57004&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMzEwNDMzNTc=)_** because we face chronic stonewalling and foot-dragging by Biden government bureaucrats who _hate_ government transparency.
And we regularly find ourselves in court facing open-borders and other far left-wing groups funded by radical billionaire **George Soros**.
After 27 years, we continue to be the one organization in America doing the important work of holding the corrupt Washington Establishment - _both Democrats and Republicans_ - accountable under the law.
**_[Your support contributes directly to our continued success](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57004&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMzEwNDMzNTc=), and it is your commitment that makes it possible for us to lead and fight so effectively_... _and on so many fronts_. _Thank you_!**
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57004&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMzEwNDMzNTc=)

name: Tony
subject: wide awake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
| Peter,

I’m sorry for emailing you so late -- _but I know we won’t be able to keep the House if I don’t reach out now._

With just 22 hours until my End of Month Deadline, it looks like Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy and his Republicans are financially outpacing our movement.

_Peter, McCarthy only needs 5 seats to take our Majority right out from under us -- and we lost 4 California House seats in 2020!_ If we don’t meet our goal now, we won’t be able to protect California, and with it, our progressive agenda.

**[If you want to keep Republicans away from House leadership, rush in $3 to support our Democratic movement. body:

** this is so important **

---
Friend,

_I hate to email again, but this could not be more important._

**At 6 p.m we're making the final TV buy of this campaign, and right now we're still $8,205 short of what we need to push our LAST TV ads.**

**Scaling back our efforts in this final stretch could cost us this election.**

**[I'm counting on top patriots like you. Now, more than ever, I need you to give $10 (or whatever you can) to help us raise enough money to push our last TV ad.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16427%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nbkCriSqhkDtiH1gVHNI5w&sysid=1)**

**We can't win without it.**

If you would like to make a donation - **please use this LINK →[https://secure.winred.com/youngkin-for-governor-individual](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16428%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5SRjkqv5cNiRlD1n7Cigzg&sysid=1)**

We're in the home stretch and our movement keeps growing, but in order to be successful on November 2nd, I need your help to spread the word about this election.

**[Believe me when I say - We can’t win without this TV ad.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16429%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iQhKnVdSy2HHYw6qz6O%2fpg&sysid=1) **

We’re in the home stretch, and I know you can help me cross the finish line.

Thank you.

For Virginia,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16426%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x97puxZnlP20CeLlj0oMMw&sysid=1)
Glenn Youngkin

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I can’t sleep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter -- I know it's late, but I've been up all night looking over my October numbers.
|
---
| | |
Peter -- I know it's late, but I've been up all night looking over my October numbers.

I hate to bother you, but this is important, **we are still thousands of dollars short of my major End of Month goal.**
_When I heard my opponent raised $4 million in a few weeks,**I was surprised.**

When I heard she outraised me again in quarter 3, **I was worried.**

And now, looking at the numbers for this month, **I am terrified. **_

---
| | | [STAND WITH MARCO NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654080:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "STAND WITH MARCO NOW")
---

We make goals so that we don't get outraised, and since we keep failing to hit our goals, my opponent gains more and more momentum. Peter, my race will determine control of the Senate and the fate of Trump's legacy, and here is what I'm going to do...

I'm calling an **EMERGENCY MEETING** about the October numbers with all of my senior staff tomorrow morning and I need to raise **$30,000 before we sit down at the table.** So, I'm begging you to take a stand before my meeting. Please, don't let Trump and me down again:
**[<< DONATE $15 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654081:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "<< DONATE $15
>>")** **[<< DONATE $30 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654082:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "<< DONATE $30
>>")** **[<< DONATE $45 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654083:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "<< DONATE $45
>>")** **[<< DONATE $75 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654084:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "<< DONATE $75
>>")** **[<< DONATE $150 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654085:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "<< DONATE $150
>>")** **[<< DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654080:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "<< DONATE
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>")**
I won't take up any more of your time, but know that I really appreciate it. I'll be checking the donor list first thing in the morning.

Marco Rubio

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654086:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654086:JsjsOP2Nt:m:1:3253819041:A08F97E75388A3087A31409AF51269BB:r "please click
here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

body:
The first thing they did during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6437h3gjle31es4cs3ldoe05pd40vtji5g3r0g0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrj2d1hcpjr1ptmelhr7d3gmkoe1crkelj74or0sar6fdlkmurj9plj6phnactn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imlj32cllm9g74dr665ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6clhmeob5ctjm49fg)
| | | | | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media.

**Forced Vaccinations Threaten Your Freedom and Christianity**
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real target – banning Christianity _and the Bible._
“This is about control, not public health,” he says.
The far left wants to control you, your kids, and your religion.
This famous _Jewish thinker reveals his latest warning._
**Read below.** ******_Urgent Message From David Horowitz_** Dear Reader, Remember: _The first thing they did_ during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues. They shut down churches as these same blue state COVID demagogues allowed mass and maskless protests after George Floyd. The closed down almost every business in America, _but kept open bars and abortion clinics._ Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: _forced vaccinations._ Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy – the virus is like any other flu.
_Mortality is almost zero._ But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . ._why?_ _Because this is all about control._ And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, _and no one wearing masks._ This was _just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi_ and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after _they had been vaccinated!_ If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! Make no mistake about it, the left's anti-Christian and anti-Semitic agenda is being ramped up dramatically . . . . . . _and it's frightening._ Think about it. The governor of California, Gavin Newsom, actually banned private home Bible studies, while OK'ing mass BLM protests and worse . . . This is a sickening violation of religious freedom. It's a threat to Christianity. And I am Jewish! Newsmax calls me one of the “most important conservative and Jewish thinkers in America.” I have authored numerous _New York Times_ bestsellers. But my book **_Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_** is the most important. My book reveals the left's dangerous agenda against Christianity. When I began research for the book, I thought this war against Christians would be sometime in the future. Instead I found that Obama and others _had already started this war._ Now they are accelerating their **power grab to systematically dismantle religion and banish God** from the lips, minds, and hearts of the faithful . . . . . . remove His holy name from our civil society, even destroying religious symbols and artifacts along the way. _Think about this:_ The media was so proud of tens of thousands of BLM protesters last year who rampaged through our cities . . . And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under **critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good"** even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- _that's bad and evil!_ **Oh, but it gets worse . . .** Unable to attend worship services, people are becoming disconnected and distanced from their faith. But the Constitution provides you with a basic and unlimited freedom of religion. **This new war on Christianity, using COVID, demonstrates the Constitution doesn't matter, that you can't worship as a right, and you must follow orders made up by leftist officials.** Everything you need to know about what is happening is exposed inside _**_[Dark Agenda](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znm703ihcps7j1fdtep7e41ojogdmi4tv561m768_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)_**_[.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjcn2ue2qrvb968mi05vh5h94l0fgoonn0fotup8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs) I am deeply troubled by what I see . . . You may remember this:
* Bill Maher shouting "death to religion" on national TV . . .
* Monuments in Washington whitewashed of God and
prayer . . .
* Religious crosses confiscated . . .
* Lenten ashes on children's foreheads being scrubbed off at school. . .
* Prayer in school being ruled unconstitutional overnight . . .

Whether you do or don't remember any of the above, please keep reading. This is serious stuff. Our faith and our ability to worship freely is in serious jeopardy. If you're a person of faith, this directly impacts you, your family, friends, and loved ones -- and it's terrifying. Every day the writing on the wall becomes clearer. Listen . . . Hatred is growing in our nation toward Jews and Christians -- being spread like wildfire. Why? What is behind this evil movement? Everything you need to know is laid out in my runaway bestselling book, _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8rdfhmb741n9ndt95nbfethkan5s728ipkr6s3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)_. _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhs5bl6g5rm7gmufj31ntdtd132gbtard78g4dmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)_ has rocked the media and political world. **Tucker Carlson** said he couldn't put the book down. Tucker said you must "read this disturbing but vital book." **Mike Huckabee** has urged every Christian to get and read this book. Gov. Huckabee said this book was the best one he had ever read defending Christians -- and it was written by a Jew!

And **Glenn Beck** reports __[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z56jb0rrdcghmmno357ipdihumnfmi9hm1faj19g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)__ reveals a "dangerous" situation we all face. I uncovered the roots of this hateful, deadly movement and put it all in my new book, _[**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zli0a141jhk37v61ivo1glb7i21cpq3io1icjt80_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)_[.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb2ipbjqcs6jpbtloqeqjmeb18dpmp6b3j89p7v0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs) Look, there's no other way to say this . . . **If you're a Christian or Jew or a faithful follower of God, you must read this book.** Folks, this is religious intolerance fueled by the left for 60 years -- a deep-seated animosity inciting vicious hate crimes and gaining momentum fast. Just look at this: _A headline that recently appeared on CBS News:_ **"U.S. 'moving into a dangerous phase' as anti-Semitic incidents surge."** Everyone must WAKE UP, which is why Newsmax is **_[giving you _Dark Agenda_ for FREE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4k6c8b7najrhlk4ae12843hkfto9btajuhf53do_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)_**[!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk5ipe0q848olqmbo7lpdh912mku38ep3hkgc5no_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs) This is all part of the plan set in motion decades ago to rid God from public life. In fact . . . After a nearly 15-year drop, the Anti-Defamation League found acts of anti-Semitism started spiking in 2016.
What's worse, the most recent numbers show the highest number of anti-Semitic incidents in its recorded history. There were over 2,100 acts of violence -- assaults, vandalism, and harassment -- against Jews. Please, for all these reasons and atrocities being committed, I urge you now more than ever . . . [**Read this book**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrhkqa7i8mickob3qtkhsag6r7e6jinp49f76v18_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs). Remember, [**it's a FREE Offer, compliments of Newsmax.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z06ao14c9fgiaqs92c25ndp8eiuhei8267qnp020_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs) Newsmax is completely wiping out the retail price of $26.99 for you -- it's THAT critical to get this book in your hands. **We must protect Christianity and Judaism before it's too late -- and save our most basic freedom of religion.** In _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5he8rr94b3gqu19fm2s9slatmdtqsm22kd6p1ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)_ , you'll discover the plan that was set in place decades ago . . . and the series of events that have unfolded, allowing the plan to take hold. I name names -- Obama, Hillary, and the big media pushing this secular agenda. There are new ones now: **Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Andrew Cuomo** , and more. **They want a Godless society**. They're totally cool if thousands want to riot in protest against President Trump, breaking all COVID-19 rules.
But if you want to go to church or synagogue -- with social distancing -- they want you arrested! You'll discover who was responsible . . . how the Supreme Court failed Christian America . . . why school administrators are brainwashing our kids . . . and the names of those carrying out the plan in Washington today. When you're done reading _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0vinmuf2vj0n8pmrjttrrjt9o6lqmfdgg4md9io_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)_ , you'll understand the deep divide in America. This is critical as we roll through the post-election year. **President Trump has been at the very epicenter** of this battle between the forces of good and evil right here in America. And President Trump, out of office, _will actually be a bigger threat -- and a bigger target -- for the far left._ We must fight back, or our children and generations to come will live in fear of expressing their faith. Yours for Freedom, **_D_**** _avid Horowitz_** P.S. Hurry! Shortly before he died, Rush Limbaugh talked about _**Dark Agenda.**_ He said the future of America depended on this battle between the forces of good and evil. You need to [**Claim your FREE BOOK**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7qd82n8ik8o2j2p1r9dthb2dovqbusoub2jq5f8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs) before Newsmax runs out of copies. Remember, Newsmax is giving you _**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**_ [**absolutely FREE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z69trim2dmk5qb5qmsdrdhamdggi9obm4i4j9npo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)**.** **You can't get this $26.99 book for FREE anywhere else except from Newsmax -- or a friend willing to give you their copy! **[**Click here.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztsi6cci8e8bum2auaj68en4o095l2cpa94hve00_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb7cth2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc6gob6cqd0p41d5gnpcrismlaetlfpk3eecc660_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0omc7irk3nai5pes1ptf4uenehvst44nqahogag_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb4c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc7h5vgt4tqtu09siumrrh46d4rjh9k9plbuobuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb4c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8kepekdevmm1tsjder9g1qh7d93n75vad2dc9l0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb4c9h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z39fcv15b201krotupk8fq8mkgkedrirsa6euhgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdjm2pb4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onlmirj9cthegqeao3hedr6fdb563j64d1ichijap36c5g61o35egpmbc35cgprech5u)

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**TO:** Senator Joe Manchin
**FROM:** Peter Willis
**DATE:** OCT. 31, 2021 Dear Joe Manchin,

**I urge you to stand with the rest of your Democratic Senators, take steps to remove the filibuster, and pass President Biden’s amazing agenda.**

When we, the American People, voted you into office, we expected you to **fight for our rights** and protect our interests.

But if the filibuster still stands, Republicans will make sure NOTHING will get done. _You will fail us._

**[So I’m donating $1 to sign on to UniteDemocrats with my signature on this letter to plead with you to stick with the Democratic Party and abolish the filibuster. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Baker/Polito's No Good, Very Bad Week
body:
Diehl Tops Baker in Poll 57-25
| | | |
---
---
---
| October 30, 2021
As we wrap up October, let's take a look at Charlie Baker and Karyn Polito's no good, very bad, week.
First, they went after our law enforcement officers, removing them from their jobs because they refused to submit to the vaccine mandate: [Stabbed In The Back - YouTube](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iUjC-dcNyQWYrhEJnL9QmpCRsGcdrFnBO_Wq67gI30bxT27f875dIHiX-SFYRQaHMbKbvhfnd6xAMEFwD1g3o5LeIm5ZCOlvAJQsSjMyWj6pkZk-VL19utTdHB01u2Xh7YrkdZ9sQCl2cVOqA_h33ILvAOcObvHgUEWr7L31thlhlKCHO7C-Bg==&c=D9q7F8IoU1JkeQuKfvL07vMUXOcMz4SQ1EPOD1Du4_Gc1XTCSxS0Pg==&ch=E0JtUYtqwWOBbrpGeR05EXtgTU0IHooMdqFSIMfYgnnw2DT95Y31Tg==)
These were the same people who worked through the pandemic when a vaccine wasn't available, and Charlie and Karyn called them heroes. Now, these same people have gone from hero to zero in the Baker administration.
Second, they went after the kids, extending the mask mandate in schools until January, in an attempt to force parents to get their children vaccinated by dangling the carrot of removing masks if they do. This decision was announced without taking questions, or getting any input from parents. [Mask Mandate In Massachusetts Schools Extended Into Jan. 2022 - CBS Boston (cbslocal.com)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iUjC-dcNyQWYrhEJnL9QmpCRsGcdrFnBO_Wq67gI30bxT27f875dIHiX-SFYRQaHMEJAxa1SBM-paoiIHeKBkqBhb5MD0ZKM6pLbEFGf9KK-3TfjQjeWDWWfGrEIE8VvMv3bgiLOyOwl_BJ3PhQ94N_TMgWdXK87IsVnWDciRYM6e3E5W3kYOQzexS30RIAnUyikcL3PlCx-gkqtVXY59vzsirLUOcZ2iJoLNJBxR0lCoOS-ObeIw0dNp-ilLS40N_35qYzfIg0=&c=D9q7F8IoU1JkeQuKfvL07vMUXOcMz4SQ1EPOD1Du4_Gc1XTCSxS0Pg==&ch=E0JtUYtqwWOBbrpGeR05EXtgTU0IHooMdqFSIMfYgnnw2DT95Y31Tg==).
As if that wasn't enough for one week, then they targeted dogs, taking K-9s away from the families who cared for them for many years: [Massachusetts trooper has K9 taken away over governor's vaccine mandate (bostonherald.com)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iUjC-dcNyQWYrhEJnL9QmpCRsGcdrFnBO_Wq67gI30bxT27f875dIHiX-SFYRQaHKPY8J7WWJ9liG-ZPxx5TmjgpjfN_dRhoFDna_Gh69lg6D0WyGRP-lCTXo_VmfHxCheY01oQPhCDoZDdSp-0X8hUyfqj_HZwzMrCdzTU1bJ6I27ymMIrZHh8Ikg_5g4iqvsxdMB14Bgr56u_lwiozSVhzLvbTsHO_-c5IVr5N6v-aIhIKZS-knnD7K8_VgzjwV2ztsLWE3a0CHlpo1b1GFw==&c=D9q7F8IoU1JkeQuKfvL07vMUXOcMz4SQ1EPOD1Du4_Gc1XTCSxS0Pg==&ch=E0JtUYtqwWOBbrpGeR05EXtgTU0IHooMdqFSIMfYgnnw2DT95Y31Tg==).
Finally, Charlie and Karyn found out that recent polling in the Governor's race shows that, among likely Republican primary voters, Diehl would defeat Governor Baker 57-25 in a match-up.

clean_body: Diehl Tops Baker in Poll 57-25 | | | | | October 30, 2021 As we wrap up October, let's take a look at Charlie Baker and Karyn Polito's no good, very bad, week. First, they went after our law enforcement officers, removing them from their jobs because they refused to submit to the vaccine mandate: == These were the same people who worked through the pandemic when a vaccine wasn't available, and Charlie and Karyn called them heroes. Now, these same people have gone from hero to zero in the Baker administration. Second, they went after the kids, extending the mask mandate in schools until January, in an attempt to force parents to get their children vaccinated by dangling the carrot of removing masks if they do. This decision was announced without taking questions, or getting any input from parents. ==. As if that wasn't enough for one week, then they targeted dogs, taking K-9s away from the families who cared for them for many years: ==. Finally, Charlie and Karyn found out that recent polling in the Governor's race shows that, among likely Republican primary voters, Diehl would defeat Governor Baker 57-25 in a match-up. | Help the Diehl campaign meet our October fundraising goal! == | | | | == or by check to "Diehl for Massachusetts" 7 Cataumet Street Worcester, MA 01606 | | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with |

Peter, BIG NEWS: the Virginia Governor's race is a **TOSSUP and the latest poll has Republican Glenn Youngkin in the lead. **

Even better, the Democrats are getting _**nervous**_ and they're pulling out the big guns. Barack Obama and Jill Biden are on the trail whipping support while the Dark Money Democrat Machine is dumping cash across the state, launching smear campaigns to defame and deface him.

**[Because they know Republicans have what it takes to win NOW and in future elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654140:JJtWjf2kN:m:1:3253819041:13D3392C87872ABC663D1513E1848990:r "Because they know

The momentum has never been more on our side. Your support has never been more critical. **[Can we count on you to get us to the finish line and secure victory for Republicans?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654140:JJtWjf2kN:m:1:3253819041:13D3392C87872ABC663D1513E1848990:r "Can we count on
you to get us to the finish line and secure victory for Republicans?")**

Pollsters, pundits, and liberal media will be looking towards the outcome as an indicator of whether or not Republicans will take back the House, Senate, and White House.

What happens here sets the tone for all future elections. _We can 't afford to back down - not when we've been so close to restoring conservative leadership in statehouses, Congress, and beyond. _
**[Will you step up to secure victory for Republicans now and in future elections?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654140:JJtWjf2kN:m:1:3253819041:13D3392C87872ABC663D1513E1848990:r "Will you step up to secure victory for Republicans now and in future elections?")**

---
The Democrats have failed in Virginia, just as they've failed across the nation. And voters are sick and tired of it. Stopping their failed Radical Agenda here is the first step in thwarting it once and for all.

We're facing an uphill battle and we're going to need all hands on deck. _But with you on our side, we know we can win. _

**[Can we count on you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654140:JJtWjf2kN:m:1:3253819041:13D3392C87872ABC663D1513E1848990:r "Can we count on

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Waiting on your input...
body:
[](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-r/) Friend,As one of my best supporters, I wanted to reach out for some input and advice. Can you help me cut through the noise and identify the top priorities that Congress needs to be focusing on for the rest of this year? [Election integrity](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-j/) [2nd Amendment](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-t/) [Rising costs / Inflation](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-i/) [Cutting government spending](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-d/) [Securing our Southern border](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-h/) [Education / CRT and parental choice](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-k/) [Lower taxes](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-u/) [Other - click to add yours!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-o/) Your input is important to me as I work to keep Wisconsin's values at the very front of our national agenda.Your continued support means a lot to me, I look forward to your feedback in the days to come.-Glenn Grothman [Give your input here!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-b/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdlijtt-yddjllujiu-n/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress

Peter,

Today is one of my favorite days of the year, and not just because it's my birthday! Halloween in our household means an evening with friends, warm cider and toasted pumpkin seeds, and creative group costumes — and our family likes to go all out.

clean_body: our family likes to go all out. | = Peter, Today is one of my favorite days of the year, and not just because it's my birthday! Halloween in our household means an evening with friends, warm cider and toasted pumpkin seeds, and creative group costumes — and our family likes to go all out. | | One of my favorite family costumes was the year we dressed as Greek mythology characters (Zeus, Hera, Athena, and Medusa) = | | Other years we’ve gotten crafty with our costumes— I was a cup of coffee and John was a book = But today has even more significance than in years past. It's also John's October deadline tonight at midnight. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Just like our Halloween costumes, John’s campaign is a family endeavor. Our daughters and I are proud to do everything we can to show our support. = | = And later today, be sure to check out for photos of this year's group costume! I won’t spoil the surprise, but this Halloween will definitely be one for the photo albums. Thank you so much for your support, Melissa * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | = | | Happy Halloween, Peter! Jasmine and I are very excited to take the kids trick or treating tonight. After much deliberation, Cal, Lily, and Wyatt chose to dress up as Paw Patrol characters, although Cal might call an audible. Jasmine will be an astronaut, like she is every single year, and I hope to be an inflatable dinosaur, although Cal says my head is too big. Ouch. Before we hit the streets, I wanted to check in about something else happening today: Jasmine’s monthly fundraising deadline. = | | | = Madison Cawthorn’s extremism and fear-mongering have no place in WNC and no place in Congress. Jasmine has what it takes to be the next leader of NC-11. Her determination to lead with love and empathy and create a seat for everyone at the table is real. She’s as authentic as it gets. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = From our family to yours, have a happy and safe Halloween and thank you for all of your support! \-- Meghann | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. DeSantis will plummet
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and we’re still falling short! |
---

| | Hi friend, it's Charlie Crist's finance team.

By now, you’ve probably heard that we set an end-of-month goal of raising $17,000 more. We’re reaching out to let you know that while we’ve made significant progress toward this goal, we’re not there yet.

**[To close the gap, we’re asking everyone to pitch in a few dollars by midnight tonight. Can you do that now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38145260/314131650/-927329797?refcode=20211031_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzUxMjg4Yy00YzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziqh4zsEj2ER-vCa6lh0vZ1TWaBAljS3dzfupU2gaxE=) If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. body:
Are you?
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38147266/314139918/-2023814932?refcode=20211031.04_MT_10JY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2EyMWFhYS00ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zi-57Rr7F9bsruNcbRf1SKZKaR_nVou81cHbcZhDqKo=)

| | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the presidency again.

I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again.

_**It seems I was wrong.**_

Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is.

Election Day is two days out, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win.

_**[Will you pitch in right now to help Terry mobilize Virginia voters over the last couple days of this election? Your donation will be matched today only.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38147267/314139919/-2023814932?refcode=20211031.04_MT_10JY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2EyMWFhYS00ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zi-57Rr7F9bsruNcbRf1SKZKaR_nVou81cHbcZhDqKo=)**_ | | | **[$15 = $30](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38147268/314139920/-2023814932?refcode=20211031.04_MT_10JY&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2EyMWFhYS00ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zi-57Rr7F9bsruNcbRf1SKZKaR_nVou81cHbcZhDqKo=)**

clean_body: Are you? | | | = | | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the presidency again. I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again. It seems I was wrong. Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is. Election Day is two days out, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up. Are you going to stand by and hand my uncle a victory? Or will you fight back and help Terry keep Virginia blue? I am counting on you to make sure my uncle can’t claim victory by seeing his hand-picked candidate win in Virginia on Tuesday, November 2. Mary L. Trump, PhD =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Pete @E3
subject: From the doors in VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC
body:
| Update from the doors here in the 72nd district — \- Good news: it's another beautiful fall day, 52 degrees, hot coffee in my hand, and I'm ready for another canvass packet. Almost everyone on the knocking list yesterday knew and liked teacher and Del. Schuyler VanValkenburg, and there is a pretty solid amount of folks who are on the GOTV canvass list but who voted early already. \- Bad news: GOP nominee Glenn Younkin's surge in the suburbs is real here. Yard signs for him are way more common than we saw 4 or 8 years ago and it's wall-to-wall political ads on TV, including a particularly nasty ad savaging Schuyler. Republicans clearly feel the momentum. If there is a wave of GOP voters on Election Day, like we saw in North Carolina and Texas last year, we're in real trouble. Schuyler's run a great campaign, but so did a bunch of Democrats who lost in the 2020 Congressional races. This district was a lean-Republican seat before Trump (-4% in 2014, -3% in 2013) and if the results Tuesday look more like those years than 2017/2020, we're in for bumpy ride. Thanks for your support for our Virginia programs. It's going to be a challenge to win all 5 races, and we could end up with as few as 1 victory, but you've helped all these candidates have the best shot they can, and now it's just a matter of getting out the vote as best we can. There's still a little time to add more fuel to the GOTV effort — we can add turnout text messages and phone calls, buy energy drinks and healthy snacks for volunteers and staff, run more Election Day digital ads, etc. Let me know what you think and if you can help fund any piece of it. I'll check back in later with news from Debra Gardner's district, and please send over any questions or your observations. Pete Sent from my iPhone
---
| Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.

subject: Team, did you see the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw this major endorsement we just received.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38149320/314149092/691373675?refcode=EM_FR_211031Biden2_N_SB_90DO_5_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2M5YmNkYS01MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxNg9MjAkB4sHV3RQbLYzt611dBbjhdTfrchNEpjla0=) Team, did you see the news?

**President Joe Biden just endorsed my campaign for Congress!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38149322/314149095/691373675?refcode=EM_FR_211031Biden2_N_SB_90DO_5_G_N_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2M5YmNkYS01MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxNg9MjAkB4sHV3RQbLYzt611dBbjhdTfrchNEpjla0=) I am thankful for the support of President Biden. Republicans don’t want me in Congress because they know how hard I will fight for Ohio and for President Biden's agenda of economic relief and quality health care for all Americans.

The President’s endorsement couldn’t have come at a better time. We have **_just 2 days before Election Day,_** and we need all the momentum we can get.

body:

After you make sure that you're all set to vote on Election Day, this Tuesday, Nov. 2, please donate to support Keystone Progress before MIDNIGHT tonight on Halloween . We need to reach our fundraising goal to support our work aimed at banishing these dark forces from the halls of our state capital.

Please give NOW so that we can meet our deadline and create the progressive PA that we deserve.

body:
Team:

Please brace yourselves: we’re about to show you the scariest thing you’ll see this Halloween.

But before we do, there’s good news: YOU can do something to make sure this frightening scenario never happens again.

Are you ready, team?

Here it is:

That’s right. It’s Ron DeSantis (and Donald Trump!!) in the Oval Office. We know that’s what he wants--but it would be disastrous for Florida, the country, and the entire world.

We’re asking for your help to make sure this scary scenario never happens again. Chip in now to help us finish October strong and make sure Ron DeSantis is a one-term Governor and zero-term President. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=eom1031s1]

Happy Halloween!

Team Nikki

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trumpism is on the march in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38151729/314158581/-411286019?refcode=20211031_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmJlN2M0Ni01OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuF7KnTIn3SR5_FmcrJh2LqX4Nyk1FYzY6gXYaF4hXs=)
Friends, I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. Friends, we only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. [**If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38151730/314158582/-411286019?refcode=20211031_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmJlN2M0Ni01OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuF7KnTIn3SR5_FmcrJh2LqX4Nyk1FYzY6gXYaF4hXs=) This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls _STILL_ tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. _And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism_. [**Will you split a donation right now between Seth Moulton and my campaign to ensure we turn out all the voters we need on Tuesday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38151731/314158583/-411286019?refcode=20211031_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmJlN2M0Ni01OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuF7KnTIn3SR5_FmcrJh2LqX4Nyk1FYzY6gXYaF4hXs=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38151732/314158584/1844317363?refcode=20211031_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmJlN2M0Ni01OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuF7KnTIn3SR5_FmcrJh2LqX4Nyk1FYzY6gXYaF4hXs=)
I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected. The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself. Now I’ve got to get back on the road, but I’ll ask one last time, [**please, split a donation right now to ensure that we keep Virginia blue this Tuesday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38151733/314158585/-411286019?refcode=20211031_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmJlN2M0Ni01OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuF7KnTIn3SR5_FmcrJh2LqX4Nyk1FYzY6gXYaF4hXs=) \-- Terry
---
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/faa220e7-583a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/02be7c46-593a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmJlN2M0Ni01OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kuF7KnTIn3SR5_FmcrJh2LqX4Nyk1FYzY6gXYaF4hXs=&id=100807537). | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

subject: [LAST CALL] help us hit our end of month fundraising deadline and fight back against QAnon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

I can handle some ghouls and goblins on Halloween, but this troubling trend — hours away from our end-of-month deadline — is a new kind of scary.

Look — I’m not going to turn into a pumpkin at midnight, and I’m certainly not up against Prince Charming. But we’ve got a lot at stake here in Arizona and I need your help.

Electing Gosar to another term would be a horror story. We cannot afford to fall further behind Paul Gosar, who has the support of big spenders like right-wing extremists and GOP dark money groups. It’s crucial that we catch up to him in fundraising to have the resources to reach every voter. clean_body: But we’ve got a lot at stake here in Arizona and I need your help. | I just took a look at our ActBlue, and it has me spooked, friend. = | = I can handle some ghouls and goblins on Halloween, but this troubling trend — hours away from our end-of-month deadline — is a new kind of scary. Look — I’m not going to turn into a pumpkin at midnight, and I’m certainly not up against Prince Charming. But we’ve got a lot at stake here in Arizona and I need your help. Electing Gosar to another term would be a horror story. We cannot afford to fall further behind Paul Gosar, who has the support of big spenders like right-wing extremists and GOP dark money groups. It’s crucial that we catch up to him in fundraising to have the resources to reach every voter. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you, Delina * | | = Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress PO Box 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Team Gansler
subject: A record that speaks for itself
body:
Doug always has and always will put Marylanders first. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/OllgZHPBxi5Nj1ruZQeQpwBj2yY3qrjjXDqCsubFGRpgnVewgtvgh6qNOeYPs4heNJgLarV4quNEJed3WxYi21vD2fBIdcIh9cItjOmZ4a5u9ZDEa50YM3GdljnuGv-9BR8IifA-CFbkDsrC28QIXfrPE2qCH6OySkBVPgnV2ixTeYRIn4fdTmA-gYfV1hd_90do4OpGW_8_n5voqQvn0KGiediLVp3nvqFrPea-5hdxaURhpWVLTjhJRGlUiIB7Kz8l-5IEQHHVVE5qWgii8g/3gm/XwkJ3CHxQsqGxIv8sus1Bw/h0/0OH9P5jpcOg2UIK-aX9sA5ePnIcYrsVqoc_0qt_E_kI) Hi friends, We launched this campaign to rebuild our state in a way that benefits ALL Marylanders. We believe that fresh ideas and **_bold_** action will guide the way, along with support from people like you.
[**Contribute to our bold movement today!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTKovbz1PW8TZ8xdoVteJSjGuIMo6r-cSli1McUBu2VFqFRFBXXtZX0beFgR864-CCPTHurF8ZXF2Yr6LALO5HrqhhYpdDb6UVGahvfik5y6rYgg96KfsZ95QYr0Bw7e8wfNKsHBi9ALPdhgEjEQN4fQD1xQBLdfGptZtxRKPJZl79fU3ZQ3WJzm0nArBAAAFslnpuxK9gNEYHDtqdkNRTTAKGTXiNrUC-6lHRqEp7GXJF9UfDavmZFLcvcJCuzsKT/3gm/XwkJ3CHxQsqGxIv8sus1Bw/h1/uXvHBrDN4SMyCcr9HKwbWBSz3YAYBz2FyXvSaK_LuIM) Doug has the experience needed to hit the ground running on day one in the Governor’s Office. As the former Maryland Attorney General, Doug went head to head against powerful opposition. **But here’s the thing about Doug - he never backs down.** Doug stood up for Maryland families in the wake of the economic crisis and delivered over a billion dollars to Marylanders cheated by big mortgage companies. He went after corporate polluters to protect the Chesapeake Bay. Doug prosecuted the worst criminals, like the beltway snipers. He supported marriage equality before any other statewide official. A record like Doug’s speaks for itself. Doug always has and always will put Marylanders first and he’s the leader we need to move Maryland forward. **[Every dollar counts - click to make a donation today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTKovbz1PW8TZ8xdoVteJSjGuIMo6r-cSli1McUBu2VFr3FfVYKbaQjnbXOL6PnwTenMTmSnF4_6bh6gvC2fD8I0qnN8tOutSDQc4Foy8ac1yoMW83KjQAtriwcNL9tjNmNnyzMf4DXDv36KE7PWplfW_tr-ba9F87fJahdQqpjQwjd1l4mZArr6KyIG-iFXg2wzH-qduwbCVHre2re5DQ3OAW1t06CjY4e7J9wZLDtn1S-lyLVRS2mpZTl0ryZ1iQ/3gm/XwkJ3CHxQsqGxIv8sus1Bw/h2/lak4OIDfzFxp0yBJIUYGCVmzVLrSqr9GTFTxT14ropY)** Doug will use his experience to take **_bold_** action on the issues that matter most to our state - **will you help us build a better Maryland**? Thanks, Team Gansler [ **DONATE** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTKovbz1PW8TZ8xdoVteJSjGuIMo6r-cSli1McUBu2VFpg8OGhI8pDiuVm7BrPIzMX1MOrweu3BGb2Gbfl2OkmoVt4sKfNfXZkwOlj_5cvC9gvw7xYJCCT_h2SUcZ9MWd1rnAiyeKOsDaNVMunkHdAmyFvB_oUD4OQ1npoyoA0eV9RDE0wXd6NFD2_IaYGvCHF1n5rtlUEw_qppJf_VJZCCzj0r0Zxna0vI4GUltU_REXtEeQmj0PxEoIvF8JEZO1o/3gm/XwkJ3CHxQsqGxIv8sus1Bw/h3/3VJ_5W6YshbNsp7EHmyUeRmrR85187L6lrkKg2Y0Foc) By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair.

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
We can’t stop fighting and that’s why I’m running for Congress. I know how it feels to be marginalized. This is personal for me. | | | _Friend, you have stood up for Democratic and progressive values and candidates before; now we need you to help keep fighting. Mckayla is running a proudly progressive campaign for Congress. But if you don't want to hear about this campaign, please click[ _here._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GduVWzPmTjGmLJetR2bvS9CY5nxKcyc3Fvk0ptPznDC6dE23y2dlEYrrWweSiHpgsyHLAQ9-P72CG71L5e_VBVEzNtou3haw7VK5D-08SmZhcfPHfAjs6pXIK_amteRyQib6_-YM8RQ8HQ2WY4NzUuM6M2jKeQunSAtQd2s9bCLWxmL_LPNiWvBT5a5trHyWLyCfS_i2dwh6h_aUWEy_SYQ/3gm/-4NOh_mIQ_aWSlp533GlOQ/h0/bLZGE4bss_-PxgxsNjubGr0XhmdH_zzfPGX5FNF8QPI)___ Friend– [In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to our campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yX74KLR9pB1yMioHED2liDp7DnQYotJ1enmcgUA_h-hbhB3aItsoR-ndmDOehRcJuWb88d-ukMj8OwwZQcErNmTsPpsA-can-y459FCCJ0SUNIoLsSwq3GX_xulZREixLDz04UQNirRhDEcGs-TkuyUoA5P-pFvFRuJ754rOvQR6dUC3vZd8COu1Ii7CAXxqQ61DAww2UlZ51MbYdEevjzRSjS0VqEynsogrXyvT46R2dI30ZHDFGmumK5bbucFHECBNP5V33MP6WKEFtuZyqh4YMQW2ydJEIS6eIZJp2X8Q/3gm/-4NOh_mIQ_aWSlp533GlOQ/h1/iyIoiuAK9ferGGK__S0ZGZPG0yrTGQvI5XYdQIulwvU) But first, I want to take a few seconds to explain why your contribution is so important. This past couple of years have shown us just how much our lives are connected, even when we’re far apart. It’s shown the need for strong action to support working people. We need to provide health care that is free at the point of use, protect our planet, and send regular checks to everyone, to ensure they have financial security. In our district, we have had the same congressman for forty years. He fought against school busing in the 1970s and voted for the 1994 crime bill. He put in place the very criminal justice system that I’ve been fighting against as founder of Schools Not Jails. We want to invest in communities, not incarceration. I’m a Black, bisexual, progressive single mom of two. I know how hard this pandemic has been. Losing loved ones. Trying to make ends meet. Fighting for healthcare. Fighting unjust policing. [We can’t stop fighting and that’s why I’m running for Congress. I know how it feels to be marginalized. This is personal for me.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yX74KLR9pB1yMioHED2liDp7DnQYotJ1enmcgUA_h-hbhB3aItsoR-ndmDOehRcJtLm4-0dCMv8mlI1Cztwq7eT8FxKcEjghOokUxk4SEw6SdZSKMorBBcfu7wrVFCTjhJccDojd1oJQR8Y0u99raUQGL5KR6J2h8U2PziZ8--R5QD6LHIt955QNAAxrfai78U9iLBt6OhX7NAmMOIdVyNJGmk7MqzVRcIECYKjvSCOsI_UcbOKC00EXFlw9fQaoYe5fE-aLG0kvpQpCRbYPL1IuUiU05JpaohJhFfBi4B6Q/3gm/-4NOh_mIQ_aWSlp533GlOQ/h2/1uVeMWDfrxfeQJlbY_rB06Oarpy543sAVGVBPQ0n7Vg) That’s why your donation is so important. We have to keep fighting for more representation in our politics — a politics with heart, soul, and spirit. The strength of our campaign relies on small contributions from people like you that add up to something much more powerful. **[__](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yX74KLR9pB1yMioHED2liDp7DnQYotJ1enmcgUA_h-hbhB3aItsoR-ndmDOehRcJtakt_hVBM5cbNDBGyciUrWxVZ8fs8C09UtwcX9xcz1JQFwtuC219GUfvmDu8oCp5cWkKqfbLeNjGp4yx3EVylfNObkdDx4GCazFjJ70G5NOJ4UzAz2THDyT9yJ4hl-aA1lucqK18ew9FaBNK3NzHTRpqkagd9AmTlB90TI-YiEU6ykLsVostI_iYgFkpeQeqF22xh0cG2EDtdFFNBYY1AYo1-myHzW4uXBiBt8uBU_OA/3gm/-4NOh_mIQ_aWSlp533GlOQ/h3/GW-jR9P33-1OBctZLtQQcz9loqelDfCSkv3e-P5YBl4)** **[_Please, make a donation now. With your support, we can win this fight._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yX74KLR9pB1yMioHED2liDp7DnQYotJ1enmcgUA_h-hbhB3aItsoR-ndmDOehRcJvEsFpXsaa5-W3dWu4O6ZHReaKomkqxZIzVLGFZ6bnMKfcIWXlWK9qyxs-rNAEesytmMMikwVNneTfHszxBOrn65Hgsldc-AeRCNHXmfC6fcdK4qbMQRA53nwbvAoOi2Zd9v7skP9q9b00ILOx0tYcWOBOTqaSVrDO7fDb5Q42hdHIphd84_PWIx4VeMBB8aMs3h3gVYs3ZlPowpYMzCw_29chliYc2O2dUJEdu2vieHg/3gm/-4NOh_mIQ_aWSlp533GlOQ/h4/NOTcLGHAkabeOkN4qmMA7tlWaYOxywPHpJA8fFq0_SU)** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yX74KLR9pB1yMioHED2liDgfma5LLrThSR6qYAL7KDCy6KPGdAYgJTFcvoWwr8BTSYO9pnK5EpioZXa1rONLzWrTiiz-6T2UPBc7Rk6tQBegAOaHa1At8FR3fdH6GzISBBiLb9vnhHT0O7ldj-P1_Hee28WWYRKj8SWZdUU79K6ToiZ-hydI8mzoednhW_ZySwKMVaEonea19HS8cw2iRBucq8ZIEbp5q5kgC-VeNa1IBQkmBKN_n4NUqXQKGEzDfQFNmDaoTU4zr45RXGwcH7alP417b0AX5Ak8oPrLzzoeAc2foFjAmASg6cGoocJKte1yKwX3-FwQ-MbpD2Xi_1/3gm/-4NOh_mIQ_aWSlp533GlOQ/h5/y9e0K7PfH6h8zqXW3biRluoWCgiXIZaUUrZEWCQmzA0)

clean_body: We can’t stop fighting and that’s why I’m running for Congress. I know how it feels to be marginalized. This is personal for me. | | | Friend, you have stood up for Democratic and progressive values and candidates before; now we need you to help keep fighting. Mckayla is running a proudly progressive campaign for Congress. But if you don't want to hear about this campaign, please click Friend– But first, I want to take a few seconds to explain why your contribution is so important. This past couple of years have shown us just how much our lives are connected, even when we’re far apart. It’s shown the need for strong action to support working people. We need to provide health care that is free at the point of use, protect our planet, and send regular checks to everyone, to ensure they have financial security. In our district, we have had the same congressman for forty years. He fought against school busing in the 1970s and voted for the 1994 crime bill. He put in place the very criminal justice system that I’ve been fighting against as founder of Schools Not Jails. We want to invest in communities, not incarceration. I’m a Black, bisexual, progressive single mom of two. I know how hard this pandemic has been. Losing loved ones. Trying to make ends meet. Fighting for healthcare. Fighting unjust policing. That’s why your donation is so important. We have to keep fighting for more representation in our politics — a politics with heart, soul, and spirit. The strength of our campaign relies on small contributions from people like you that add up to something much more powerful. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Donations aren't just the lifeblood of our campaign. Every donation we get is somebody stepping forward and showing their support for bold, progressive change. I'm excited you're with us for the work we're going to do. But most importantly, I'm excited we're going to win. In solidarity, Mckayla PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: before the Trick-or-Treaters arrive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
|
#
Tonight is our October fundraising deadline, and my team tells me we’re not where we had planned to be this morning. So before before the Trick-or-Treaters arrive, please give me a chance to explain why [**making a contribution before our midnight deadline is so important:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38152049/314160110/1305608586?refcode=AU_CVH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211031_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDg5MzYxMC01YjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgRQs99DR4Q-6tATtMP1mBs0-ih0XI07cscqkw8ZW10=) Our democracy is at a tipping point. Republicans have made it clear they aren’t going to stop pedaling Donald Trump’s dangerous conspiracy theories. They’ve amplified the voices of anti-vaxxers, opposed accountability for the January 6th insurrectionists, passed state laws restricting access to the ballot, targeted constitutionally protected reproductive rights, and undermined trust in the legitimacy of our elections with the Big Lie. **Without trust, legitimacy, and accountability our democracy cannot survive.** This is a party that cannot be permitted to control our country's agenda again. Their fealty towards Donald Trump poses a real and existential threat to our future. **The 2022 midterm elections — which are just over a year away — are crucially important to holding onto our majority. | | **_[I know I normally email you asking you to help me out. But today, I need you to help my friend Terry McAuliffe. Will you chip in before his final End of Month Deadline midnight and join me in pushing him across the finish line as Virginia’s next Governor? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38152916/314163914/-764986914?refcode=20211031_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U4YWUzNy01YjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBtp2YPQHMzaUzQX8l1IvUWQ0SNEhYz_NU1X3ikAlLc=)_** I need you to know 3 critical things. \-- The Governor’s race in Virginia is just two days away. \-- A brand-new poll shows my friend Terry McAuliffe TIED with his Trump-loving opponent. \-- If we lose Virginia, Trump and his allies will have all the momentum they need to end our historic Majorities and barge back into power. **_[I know we can band together, elect Terry as Virginia’s next governor, and make sure Trump’s plan to overtake NEVER succeeds. clean_body: [[please read]] | | Friend: Happy Halloween! 🎃🎃 We’re not here with any tricks or treats ... we just wanted to reach out and tell you how important our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign is to protecting our democracy! Want to know what’s spookier than 👻?Since the start of 2021, at least 87 bills have been introduced and 20 have passed that would burden or harm the ballot measure process. Why? Because extremist officials and special interests have seen time and time again how working people in America are passing the progressive policies they so badly need — and now those officials are threatened. This assault on our democracy is highly-organized and well-funded, so we’ve partnered with a number of national and local groups to organize our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign and fight back. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We know extremist legislators and special interests are ready to do whatever it takes to make the ballot measure process more difficult for everyday Americans. That’s why we’re pulling out all the stops to preserve this core part of our democracy. When we need to, we will litigate. Where we can stop bad laws from being passed, we will run aggressive “no” campaigns to stop these anti-democratic bills. And where the legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we will fight to win those ballot campaigns. = Have a safe and happy Halloween! name: Team Chelsea
subject: What's scaring us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
Shocking revelations from lawsuit depositions show why you can’t trust Frank LaRose.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38155664/314170541/-939985431?refcode=EM_FR_211031eom3_EOM_UP_90D_5_NG_N_Logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE4ODM2OC01ZjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6TEnQyqt8zMrnXpvENCwTGlD0Sam4zJprN9NOaSXrQ=)
---
Happy Halloween, team!

Before our midnight deadline tonight, we wanted to share with you what's got us spooked this Halloween.

It wasn't enough that the Ohio GOP did everything in their power to produce gerrymandered maps; Secretary LaRose decided that it was "probably not worth" to defend our democracy by voting against them.

The job of the Secretary of State is to serve Ohio, not manipulate it. Our laws lay out a clear process for reaching a fair map through a bipartisan process. They do not lay out a clear excuse for a cowardly Secretary of State to shamelessly cave to their own party.

**That's why we have to have Chelsea become Ohio's next Secretary of State to demand fair districts and protect our democracy at all costs.** But to do that, we cannot fall short now before tonight's midnight deadline. **[Can you pitch in $15 or as much as you can towards our end-of-month fundraising goal? Before our midnight deadline tonight, we wanted to share with you what's got us spooked this Halloween. It wasn't enough that the Ohio GOP did everything in their power to produce gerrymandered maps; Secretary LaRose decided that it was "probably not worth" to defend our democracy by voting against them. The job of the Secretary of State is to serve Ohio, not manipulate it. Our laws lay out a clear process for reaching a fair map through a bipartisan process.
