That Democrats don’t care about stopping Trumpism any more. Folks, we’re running out of time to prove them wrong. [**Will you split a donation between my campaign and****Lauren Mallett-Hays****right now? Your support is crucial right now because every single dollar we raise between now and Election Day goes directly towards our effort to get out the vote and win for Virginia and our Country. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38156822/314171455/-24487482?refcode=lmh-bba-2021oct31-mcauliffe-va&amount=18&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmYxZGQzYy02MDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KbgVg0seycsmqQFqPXgKC_lvCJxd-4souQmkSGzpaW4=) So here’s my final message to you: **_What happens in Virginia on November 2nd doesn’t just impact the future of our Commonwealth, it impacts the future of our entire country. _** My opponent isn’t afraid to pull pages straight from the Trump playbook. clean_body: | This Halloween, don’t let this nightmare – Kevin McCarthy becoming Speaker – become a reality: Kevin McCarthy must never, ever become Speaker of the House, and take the gavel away from Nancy Pelosi. The man who went to Mar-a-Lago to grovel at Trump’s feet only weeks after the insurrection. The man who literally sorted Trump’s Starburst flavors. (No seriously). Kevin McCarthy as Speaker would result in Republicans blocking all our progress. On health care. On jobs. On inequality. On climate action. On gun reform. On everything. It could even mean giving him the power to overturn the next presidential election if they lose. You have the power to stop this terrible trick. Especially as Republicans and Donald Trump continue to out-raise Democrats by tens of millions of dollars. Can you chip in $10 to help us prevent Kevin McCarthy from ever becoming Speaker? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = — Team Schiff Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Early voting is now over, and things are still looking too close to call!

With the election on Tuesday, **_we have a chance to change the momentum of our country._**

If Donald Trump’s candidate wins in Virginia, Trump acolytes across the country will be emboldened and gain more momentum going into the 2022 midterms.

But if Terry McAuliffe wins, Democrats will be set up to keep the House and EXPAND control of the Senate!

We can’t afford to lose on Tuesday.

Peter,

Today is Halloween, and I’m having the time of my life spending the day with my wife Lauren and dressing up our daughter Eleanor for the festive occasion. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38158401/314172644/-1337061357?refcode=EM_FR_211031EOM_N_AL_90DA_5_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTc0ODM4MS02MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2tqQPVc4nydepM8e5eBko0b3xxtX783C95m8BdQy9o=) Today isn’t just Halloween though, it’s also the last day to hit our October fundraising goal -- **and we’re still $2,712 short!**

Halloween is all about scary, spooky creatures and monsters, but I can’t think of anything scarier than another term of Ron Johnson in the Senate with Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader.

Look, Peter, I want my daughter to grow up and be proud of our elected officials and see that they’re working hard to make real change for people. **I’m running to give my daughter the future she, and every child in Wisconsin, deserves.**

Today, before midnight, I’m asking you to make a contribution of $10 or whatever you can to my campaign and help us defeat Ron Johnson. **You can use this link to give:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_oct2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38158402/314172645/-1337061357?refcode=EM_FR_211031EOM_N_AL_90DA_5_G_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTc0ODM4MS02MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2tqQPVc4nydepM8e5eBko0b3xxtX783C95m8BdQy9o=)**

Let’s keep the spooks out of Washington.

Thank you,

Alex Lasry
---

Help her beat Ryan Zinke and represent Montanans in Congress: = | = | Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana Laurie Bishop for Montana PO Box 2188 Livingston, MT 59047 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I can’t sleep

body:
Friend -- I know it’s late, but I’ve been up all night looking over my October numbers.
|

| | |
Friend -- I know it's late, but I've been up all night looking over my October numbers.

I hate to bother you, but this is important, **we are still thousands of dollars short of my major End of Month goal.**
_When I heard my opponent raised $4 million in a few weeks,**I was surprised.**

When I heard she outraised me again in quarter 3, **I was worried.**

And now, looking at the numbers for this month, **I am terrified. **_

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: We need to dig deep.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I know it’s Halloween, so I’ll get straight to the point.

Hi there, I know it’s Halloween, so I’ll get straight to the point to make sure you can get on to the hauntings and trick-or-treating!
I’m reaching out myself one last time before tonight’s fundraising deadline because we are still a bit short of our goal.
If you can help us close the gap, please use this link:
**[https://CheriBeasley.com/October-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38159288/314177724/-569772567?refcode2=47c8ddf6-633a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211031-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2M4ZGRmNi02MzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QFbbacKH3yYsPdVATrdfxlYOJ0Ah4FBSmjFLaNGZBR0=)**
North Carolina is known for having some of the most competitive and notoriously expensive races. In fact, the nonpartisan analysts at Cook Political Report have rated this race as one of only three toss-ups in the entire country for 2022.
Whether or not Democrats are able to hold or expand the Senate majority could be determined by the success of our campaign. And yes, that is an immense amount of pressure that our team faces every day.
But I know that if we dig deep, then together we can replace Richard Burr with someone who has the moral courage to do what’s right and who has a stubborn, relentless refusal to see justice abandoned.
And today is a moment where we need to dig deep. Our donations have been a bit slower this month. If we’re going to reach our goal before midnight, then I need your help to step on the gas.
**[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to make a $3 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina and hold Democrats’ Senate majority. Every donation makes a tremendous difference. Everything that we accomplish now will set us up for success in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38159290/314177726/-569772567?refcode2=47c8ddf6-633a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211031-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2M4ZGRmNi02MzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QFbbacKH3yYsPdVATrdfxlYOJ0Ah4FBSmjFLaNGZBR0=)**
I’m so grateful for your support. I hope you have a wonderfully spooky day — with more treats than tricks!
\- Cheri Beasley

clean_body: I know it’s Halloween, so I’ll get straight to the point. Hi there, I know it’s Halloween, so I’ll get straight to the point to make sure you can get on to the hauntings and trick-or-treating! I’m reaching out myself one last time before tonight’s fundraising deadline because we are still a bit short of our goal. If you can help us close the gap, please use this link: = North Carolina is known for having some of the most competitive and notoriously expensive races. In fact, the nonpartisan analysts at Cook Political Report have rated this race as one of only three toss-ups in the entire country for 2022. Whether or not Democrats are able to hold or expand the Senate majority could be determined by the success of our campaign. And yes, that is an immense amount of pressure that our team faces every day. But I know that if we dig deep, then together we can replace Richard Burr with someone who has the moral courage to do what’s right and who has a stubborn, relentless refusal to see justice abandoned. And today is a moment where we need to dig deep. Our donations have been a bit slower this month. If we’re going to reach our goal before midnight, then I need your help to step on the gas. = I’m so grateful for your support. I hope you have a wonderfully spooky day — with more treats than tricks! \- Cheri Beasley = * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Michele (personal)
subject: Quickly from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

Hey Peter, I'm on the road right now, but I wanted to be sure that I took the time to email you directly and let you know why I need your help for tonight's critical end-of-month fundraiser. I've even created a personal link for you to donate through: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110_email_rayner?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38159544/314179085/-578272527?refcode=em21_211031_eom4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA0N2M0Yy02NDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SyuQqs3T2_H6Mn7npHrEeuT0y7mmo8dlxiQGIIesQIo=)**

Believe it or not, in 2021, some people are still out here getting their money from corporate PACs or special interests, like gun groups (cough cough, one of my Republican opponents, cough cough, Senator Rubio and countless other Florida Republicans...) Hella shady, right?

But you see, our campaign is unique. It's a grassroots, people-powered campaign doing politics the right way. On Team Rayner, we're centering our communities and empowering the folks who are too often left behind.

That's why I need your help, Peter. Our fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we're working tirelessly to meet this critical $13,000 goal. Whether it's $1 or $100, donations of all amounts make all the difference in this grassroots campaign. So please, if you're able, can you chip in before our midnight deadline? Here's that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110_email_rayner?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38159545/314179086/-578272527?refcode=em21_211031_eom4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA0N2M0Yy02NDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SyuQqs3T2_H6Mn7npHrEeuT0y7mmo8dlxiQGIIesQIo=)**

I know I can always count on you. Together, we'll advance our democracy for the better.

\-- Michele

_Sent from my iPhone_

* * *

name: Glenn
subject: Terry’s Victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Breaking
_Sponsored message_
Breaking

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqud7gjg2d5c3fir85mlpubqac0fplt44rtu8b9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdie6o36c9h2bs)
---
Friend,

I just came out of a meeting with my fundraising team, and they told me some bad news - we aren’t on pace to hit our final fundraising goal. _If we don’t meet this deadline, we will have to say Terry McAuliffe won, and Election Day Victory is not looking promising._

Once the clock hits midnight tonight, we’ll have to start making some tough decisions.

_**I need you to dig deep in these last couple of hours. We are SO CLOSE, and I believe we can still pull this off, but I need your help.**_

**[Will you click this direct link to rush a donation to help our campaign get over the finish line?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2cg373hvge98eois8hdbf3ovnu1krpemfrdi1gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdie6o36c9h2bs)**

**[RUSH DONATION HERE: https://secure.winred.com/youngkin-for-governor-individual](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs3k0lu2g1o9d842ovbkpn97b4330hqol9mr06q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdie6o36c9h2bs)**

**We’re so close to the finish line. I just need one final push to come out victorious. We are so close to turning Virginia Red, creating jobs, and standing up for families, students, and parents.**

I’m making this one final request, and I hope you won’t let me down.

**[RUSH DONATION HERE: https://secure.winred.com/youngkin-for-governor-individual](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zoppjosgjug1mtnteg7qpue989htin2k06eqtq18_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdie6o36c9h2bs)**

Thank you for all of your support.

Let’s win this!

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2r1urnk9qtua7o8k8h5sbr4g9l14dbg9ra4o058_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdie6o36c9h2bs)

clean_body: Breaking Sponsored message Breaking | Friend, I just came out of a meeting with my fundraising team, and they told me some bad news - we aren’t on pace to hit our final fundraising goal. If we don’t meet this deadline, we will have to say Terry McAuliffe won, and Election Day Victory is not looking promising. Once the clock hits midnight tonight, we’ll have to start making some tough decisions. I need you to dig deep in these last couple of hours. We are SO CLOSE, and I believe we can still pull this off, but I need your help. We’re so close to the finish line. I just need one final push to come out victorious. We are so close to turning Virginia Red, creating jobs, and standing up for families, students, and parents. I’m making this one final request, and I hope you won’t let me down. Thank you for all of your support. Let’s win this! Glenn Youngkin | PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC Not authorized by any other candidate. name: Megan at Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: A little Halloween nostalgia before our midnight deadline
body:
My fears have evolved since I was a young pumpkin 🎃

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38159727/314180184/1300596418?refcode=211031_FR_eom3megan
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjNjNWIzLTY0M2EtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5sGDkXrhR3W7Zm8Qq-YZYkomA8q0zMXemAfD52NTPRg=)
---
Peter— Growing up, Halloween was always one of my favorite holidays. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38159729/314180185/1300596418?refcode=211031_FR_eom3megan
_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjNjNWIzLTY0M2EtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5sGDkXrhR3W7Zm8Qq-YZYkomA8q0zMXemAfD52NTPRg=) I’d read _Goosebumps _books, watch T.V. shows like _Are You Afraid Of The Dark_?, and eventually move to 90’s teen horror films like _Scream_ and _I Know What You Did Last Summer._

As a kid, the thrill of being scared was simply for fun. I was blissfully ignorant to the terrifying truths right here in the real world.

_**But now that I’m in my 30’s, I guess you could say that my fears have "evolved" into real-life concerns for the future of our country...**_

As a woman, I’m scared of losing the right to choose what to do with my own body.

As an Asian American, I’m scared of the rise in anti-Asian attacks and xenophobic hate perpetuated by Trump’s racist rhetoric.

As a daughter of parents in their 70’s, I’m scared of far-right conspiracists who refuse to listen to science when it comes to coronavirus vaccinations and who ignore the risks that elderly people face if a major breakout were to occur.

**And I know that I’m not alone.** Far too many Americans are living in fear — fear of not making ends meet, fear of gun violence, fear of not being able to access healthcare, fear of police brutality, and so much more.

There are so many very real and frightening things happening every single day. And although we can’t cast a magic spell like the Sanderson Sisters to banish these worries and struggles away, _**we can take action in other meaningful ways.**_

That’s why I joined Barrier To Entry PAC. Because I’m genuinely scared that if we don’t do something to build a government that reflects our values with leaders who will fight to protect us, things will only get worse. **[So today, before the clock strikes twelve at midnight, I’m asking you to donate anything you can to help get us to the finish line and raise the remaining $1,492 that we need to hit our urgent end-of-month goal. Let’s be fearless and take bold action together. Donate now>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38159730/314180186/-2038882143?refcode=211031_FR_eom3megan

clean_body: My fears have evolved since I was a young pumpkin 🎃 | | | logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjNjNWIzLTY0M2EtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5sGDkXrhR3W7Zm8Qq-YZYkomA8q0zMXemAfD52NTPRg= Peter— Growing up, Halloween was always one of my favorite holidays. img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjNjNWIzLTY0M2EtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5sGDkXrhR3W7Zm8Qq-YZYkomA8q0zMXemAfD52NTPRg= I’d read Goosebumps books, watch T.V. shows like Are You Afraid Of The Dark?, and eventually move to 90’s teen horror films like Scream and I Know What You Did Last Summer. As a kid, the thrill of being scared was simply for fun. I was blissfully ignorant to the terrifying truths right here in the real world. But now that I’m in my 30’s, I guess you could say that my fears have "evolved" into real-life concerns for the future of our country... As a woman, I’m scared of losing the right to choose what to do with my own body. As an Asian American, I’m scared of the rise in anti-Asian attacks and xenophobic hate perpetuated by Trump’s racist rhetoric. As a daughter of parents in their 70’s, I’m scared of far-right conspiracists who refuse to listen to science when it comes to coronavirus vaccinations and who ignore the risks that elderly people face if a major breakout were to occur. And I know that I’m not alone. Far too many Americans are living in fear — fear of not making ends meet, fear of gun violence, fear of not being able to access healthcare, fear of police brutality, and so much more. There are so many very real and frightening things happening every single day. And although we can’t cast a magic spell like the Sanderson Sisters to banish these worries and struggles away, we can take action in other meaningful ways. That’s why I joined Barrier To Entry PAC. Because I’m genuinely scared that if we don’t do something to build a government that reflects our values with leaders who will fight to protect us, things will only get worse. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: 16 folks from Cresco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I realize these emails can start to pile up.
#
Peter,
I really hate to be the bearer of bad news. Especially with just a few hours until our major fundraising deadline coming up tonight at 11:59 PM.
**I just checked (and rechecked) our finance records, and I'm a bit worried that we're on track to fall short of our fundraising goal this month.**
To be honest, the uptick in online donations we *typically* see near the end of the month just isn't where we projected.
Now, with just hours to go, there's realistically only one scenario in which we can make up for lost time, close our fundraising gap, and stay on track to beat the Republicans and help John flip this Senate seat.
[**_According to my calculations, we can still meet our goal before midnight if around 16 more folks from Cresco are able to chip in. Can I put you down for a last-minute $5 donation today? It'd be a huge help in these final few hours._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36117?refcode=em20211031-3278&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3278%2E434096%2EjCllsX)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36117?refcode=em20211031-3278&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3278%2E434096%2EjCllsX)**
I know that you receive quite a few emails from our team. And I realize they can start to pile up.
But the reason we keep coming to you is because John doesn't take a single cent from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry, so he's relying on each of us to do our part by kicking in a few bucks as often as we can.
**If enough people chip in before 11:59 PM, we've got a real shot at closing the gap on our fundraising and reaching our huge $10 million fundraising goal before we close the books on October.**
[**_So_**** _, Peter, will you be one of the 16 more donors from Cresco that we're still looking for? Even a small donation would be a gigantic help right now._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36117?refcode=em20211031-3278&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3278%2E434096%2EjCllsX)
Thank you,
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211031-3278-footer&t=22&refcode2=3278_434096_jCllsX&akid=3278%2E434096%2EjCllsX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3278%2E434096%2EjCllsX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3278%2E434096%2EjCllsX)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

The end of the month is CRUCIAL to meet our fundraising deadlines and show up for Kansas! Here's the truth, Mark is a new candidate, and it's going to be an uphill battle to compete against Jerry Moran’s deep pockets and dark money.

**_But we are up for the challenge._**

Because that's just it friends: standing up for Kansas is worth hard work. Mark knows this, and he is prepared to do everything he can to raise money through grassroots action and people power.

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654275:6UflAf2sN:m:1:3253819041:3E743799CA626E3C836F226B023C2694:r "Headline") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654275:6UflAf2sN:m:1:3253819041:3E743799CA626E3C836F226B023C2694:r "Tweet")Democrats in Congress applauded the murder of children and then went outside to pat themselves on the back for their "bravery," and I couldn't hold back any longer. I admit it, I had to voice my disgust over their desire to kill unborn babies. So, I followed them outside and screamed at them. **[You can see the video here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654275:6UflAf2sN:m:1:3253819041:3E743799CA626E3C836F226B023C2694:r "You can see the video here.")** Democrats yelled back that I was rude while they celebrated the murder of unborn babies - but I don't care. I won't hold back anymore; I'm here to protect all Americans, born and unborn, and I won't let them get away with it. **[I will keep yelling, and I need every pro-life warrior on my team in this fight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654275:6UflAf2sN:m:1:3253819041:3E743799CA626E3C836F226B023C2694:r "I will keep yelling, and I need every pro-life warrior on my
team in this fight.")** The Democrat's true agenda was unveiled this week - first, they voted to murder children, then Joe Biden weaponized the FBI to go after any parent who dares to object to their children begin taught Critical Race Theory or that "Heather has two mommies." **_They hate kids, they hate parents, and they hate America._** This radical leftist movement cannot be allowed to continue - their values are simply disgusting. They won't stop until our nation is destroyed. We can no longer be polite. If you stand with life, if you stand with morality, if you are about to have a Good Christian Meltdown of your own, **[you need to make the most generous donation possible to my campaign so I can defeat the ghoulish Democrats and their desire to kill unborn babies.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654275:6UflAf2sN:m:1:3253819041:3E743799CA626E3C836F226B023C2694:r "you need to make the most
generous donation possible to my campaign so I can defeat the ghoulish Democrats and their desire to kill unborn babies.")** The Democrats already hate me for filing articles of impeachment against Joe Biden and for fighting to protect your family and mine from their socialist agenda. My fight to preserve life will only _add fuel to their hateful fire, and that 's why I need you on my side. I cannot do this alone._ **[Please do all you can to help me keep fighting for life and America by donating all you can afford.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654275:6UflAf2sN:m:1:3253819041:3E743799CA626E3C836F226B023C2694:r "Please do all you can to help me keep fighting for life and
America by donating all you can afford.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654275:6UflAf2sN:m:1:3253819041:3E743799CA626E3C836F226B023C2694:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

clean_body: ahead of tonight’s deadline: | | | | | Team, Today may be Halloween, but the scariest thing we’ve seen all day isn’t a spooky costume. It’s tomorrow’s date: November 1st. On the first of every month, our fundraising numbers are reported to the Secretary of State’s office, and then they’re made public for everyone to see. Before you go out trick-or-treating, or whatever else you have planned tonight, could you help make tomorrow a bit less scary for all of us here on Team Sonia? = Sonia needs supporters from every corner of the Commonwealth to support this campaign. She’s counting on all of us to step up and do our part. Your support could mean we’re able to build a winning campaign instead of one that just comes close. What do you say? Can we count on your support today? Make a donation today to help us hit our October goal and build a winning campaign. = Thanks for all you do, Team Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Ras Smith
subject: My duty.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
I believe our campaign can meet this moment.I'll be brief, friend.

I know my team and I have been in touch a lot this week. That's because today marks the end of the month of October and thus, our fundraising deadline. Before I ask for you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160247/314183418/-73891749?refcode=em-103121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmMyY2RjYS02NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=owYfHPfnaeN4zq9kBuyFbu-SA2xtpuUKagxgX6lqXRg=) to help close the $779 gap, please give me the chance to explain why it's important, especially now:

This past month, ten thousand workers at John Deere went on strike. I spent time on the picket line, and found other ways to stand in solidarity with them. It's not just my duty as an elected leader from Waterloo -- I'm the son of a John Deere worker and a firm believer in the power of workers coming together to demand what they deserve.

**My opponent Kim Reynolds on the other hand had weeks to join them and has been noticeably absent.** She chose to rally with Trump this month instead, and pander to the far-right on issues like immigration.

**Iowa deserves better. We deserve a leader who stands with workers, not Trump. Especially when those workers are going up against a corporation that's made record profits this year.** I believe our campaign can meet this moment, but right now I need your help getting the word out about what we're building to more Democrats and voters across the state.

If you're able, will you chip in a contribution before the end of the day to help? Here's the best link:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ras-2021**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160248/314183420/-73891749?refcode=em-103121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmMyY2RjYS02NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=owYfHPfnaeN4zq9kBuyFbu-SA2xtpuUKagxgX6lqXRg=)

It means the world to me.

_\- Ras_

**[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160249/314183421/-73891749?refcode=em-103121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmMyY2RjYS02NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=owYfHPfnaeN4zq9kBuyFbu-SA2xtpuUKagxgX6lqXRg=)**

| | Derek, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**make a matched donation to my friend Terry McAuliffe’s campaign to be Virginia’s next Governor ahead of his campaign’s FINAL fundraising deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160535/314184434/1097049879?refcode=20211031.06_JC_10KA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGMyY2RjYS02NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_G5GA8XlUfOWcOYiWDdmRaXAK_qX2tPzcgAKse2no4=) But before I do, I want to explain to you why Virginia is 2021’s most important race. The extreme Republican candidate running against Terry is Glenn Youngkin. Youngkin is a mega-millionaire who has Donald Trump’s “full endorsement.” It ain’t a mystery why Trump is all geeked up about Youngkin. Election experts are saying Democrats could lose Virginia. If that happens, Republicans would get a huge surge of momentum going into the 2022 midterms. So it’s this simple: If Glenn Youngkin wins, Donald Trump wins. Worse, Trumpism will be on the march again heading into a pivotal midterm for the future of our democracy. The good news is that Terry McAuliffe has what it takes to win. He’s tough, experienced, and has bold plans for Virginia that every single Democrat should be over the moon to support. Terry can win, but he’s going to need historic voter turnout to pull it off, because Youngkin has pledged spending up to $75 million of his own money to buy the Governor’s office for him and Trump. So here’s my ask: Let’s work our hearts out to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins the 2021 Virginia governor’s race on Tuesday. If we do that, we put a stake in the heart of Trumpism once and for all. [**This is the FINAL fundraising deadline of his campaign and it’s the last opportunity to have an impact on the outcome of this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160536/314184435/1097049879?refcode=20211031.06_JC_10KA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGMyY2RjYS02NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_G5GA8XlUfOWcOYiWDdmRaXAK_qX2tPzcgAKse2no4=) **A Glenn Youngkin victory would be a disaster for the future of our country.** Thanks, James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160537/314184436/-2023814932?refcode=20211031.06_JC_10KA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGMyY2RjYS02NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_G5GA8XlUfOWcOYiWDdmRaXAK_qX2tPzcgAKse2no4=)

body:
We can't just focus on persuading voters, we have to expand the electorate by registering new voters too. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160582/314184917/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWVkNTZlMy02OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XISwIkjPcc2PmTkC-R6YlLalcVbeRH8ndvXKJu7X5F8=)
Hi friend -- It's Norberto, Marisa's Political Director here with some big news!

**This month we found out that our district -- California's 23rd -- grew by more than 10%.** With redistricting underway, we don't know exactly how much more competitive it will become, but we do know our lines will change, bringing thousands of new voters into the fold.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38160583/314184918/-787496292?refcode=em-103021-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWVkNTZlMy02OTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XISwIkjPcc2PmTkC-R6YlLalcVbeRH8ndvXKJu7X5F8=)
I've spent the better part of the last decade doing community and electoral organizing. One thing I learned quickly is that we can't just focus on persuading voters, we have to expand the electorate by registering new voters too.

Our team has already analyzed the potential boundaries, and we've started reaching out to new and unregistered voters. We have a plan to reach as many as possible before McCarthy, but it takes grassroots resources to hire bilingual organizers to go door-to-door. That's where you come in:

**[Will you chip in $3 today to help us lay the groundwork for our ambitious voter contact effort? clean_body: We can't just focus on persuading voters, we have to expand the electorate by registering new voters too. | = Hi friend -- It's Norberto, Marisa's Political Director here with some big news! This month we found out that our district -- California's 23rd -- grew by more than 10%. With redistricting underway, we don't know exactly how much more competitive it will become, but we do know our lines will change, bringing thousands of new voters into the fold. = I've spent the better part of the last decade doing community and electoral organizing. One thing I learned quickly is that we can't just focus on persuading voters, we have to expand the electorate by registering new voters too. Our team has already analyzed the potential boundaries, and we've started reaching out to new and unregistered voters. We have a plan to reach as many as possible before McCarthy, but it takes grassroots resources to hire bilingual organizers to go door-to-door. That's where you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Here's one additional thing to consider: The more time we spend pestering McCarthy in his backyard, the less time he has to help Republicans retake the House nationwide. That alone is worth chipping in for. = Thanks in advance, Norberto Marisa Wood For Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States

| | | Great news, :** **

# **It's GOTV time 🎉✊🚪**

**We need our voters fired up and ready to #Flipthe15th, and we need your help to make that happen!** Sign up to join our GOTV events, and then invite your family, friends, neighbors and coworkers to join you!
---
| [VOLUNTEER TO GET OUT THE VOTE](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fdc63b152a&e=400a181d5a "VOLUNTEER TO GET OUT THE VOTE")

---|---
| **Weekend Early Voting is OPEN this Saturday from 8am-4pm and Sunday from 1pm-5pm.** The _LAST_ day to vote early is this Monday, Nov. 1st. You can vote in person at your Board of Elections from 8am-12pm on Monday, or _**postmark your absentee ballot before your local post office closes**_!!

Only about 5% of registered voters in OH-15 have early voted in the OH-15 special election so far, **.** We’re going to be knocking on doors and making calls all weekend long to **remind Democratic voters and Russo supporters to VOTE by Election Day on Nov. 2!**
---
| [KNOCK ON DOORS + MAKE CALLS + RALLY WITH US](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=50b251397c&e=400a181d5a "KNOCK ON DOORS + MAKE CALLS + RALLY WITH US")

body:
Or as my kids call it, Spooky Szn https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23]Dear friends,
I feel it’s necessary to warn you: I’m about to make so many bad jokes. But please don’t get spooked.
This Halloween, I’m excited to trick or treat with my kids. Although we’ll see plenty of scary costumes out there, none are as scary as the words “Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna.”
My opponent is already wearing a Donald Trump costume, but she should dress like a skeleton because she has no guts.
If she were brave, she would stand up to the bloodsucking vampires in the Republican party.
That’s why we need your help this Halloween. We need to stop all of the spooky haunts, from the zombie Donald Trump to the ghoul Matt Gaetz.
Will you make a contribution now so that we can stop the terror?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $40 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23?express_lane=true&amount=40&refcode=express_lane_40] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-oct21-eom23]Let’s make sure that next year, we have a not-so-scary Halloween. Thank you for your help in fighting back.
Your contribution is like sunlight to a vampire, silver to a werewolf, or salt to a ghost.
Thanks for your help, sorry for the Dad jokes, and Happy Halloween!
-- Eric

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My critical deadline
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I’d like to wish you a Happy Halloween! I’m reaching out today because my end-of-month fundraising deadline for October is approaching in just a few hours. Below, I’m going to tell you more about what this campaign is fighting for -- but if you don’t have the time to read my full message, I’d greatly appreciate it if you could chip in whatever you can spare before our 11:59 PM deadline tonight to help us meet our critical October fundraising goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom?amount=20.22]The COVID-19 pandemic will go down as one of the most consequential periods in history. As we continue to look towards our recovery from this unprecedented crisis, I believe that we have a historic opportunity to redefine the possibility of state government in the next election.
Let me explain: in many ways, this pandemic has only exposed and exacerbated the many existing inequities in our society. From housing insecurity, to lack of healthcare coverage, to lack of adequate broadband infrastructure and more, hundreds of thousands of Maryland’s working families were struggling even before the pandemic upended our lives.
I don’t think it’s enough that we return to a status quo that has left behind far too many of our friends, family and neighbors. We need to bring bold, transformative change to our communities through an expansive policy agenda that delivers the results our communities so desperately need. As Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll facilitate greater access to home ownership, expand affordable, quality healthcare coverage, invest in the next generation of internet connectivity, and so much more. I’ll deliver on the concrete points of progress to finally lift our families into the high quality of life that they deserve.
We have a real shot at making sure that no family is left behind in 2022, but in order to make my bold vision for our future a reality, I need the help of grassroots supporters like you. Will you help me meet my fundraising goal for October by chipping in whatever you can before 11:59 PM tonight? We need just $5,500 to meet our goal for October, and a groundswell of grassroots donations today will easily get us there.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom]I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of my campaign. This highly competitive election could end up being the most expensive in our state’s history, so it’s going to take the full support of our people-powered grassroots movement to bring this campaign to the finish line. We have the momentum in this race. With your help, I have no doubt that we’ll pull ahead even further.
Let’s win this race, and get to work.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/october2021eom?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bfbb4d1d-0338-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/366b85fb-6b3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZiODVmYi02YjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTK17seqkOScDVXqXaN-2ZbnBrCg3fczBcGIJFzRsXM=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Friend, just following up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
The horror is real 🎃 | |
---
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=63fe79c7c6384c90ab65eb441ef81a9d&_e=1p14wHc3udRaJBxaZTnEpUY3h-DyySR3jX8bbbcAKBi3uj0VrEt56ZKviusTCt_zzTJ6hevfdI-MbUZtjrUSUsj5CGu-vUcACTUU8j1wB-y1kGORceFQO2ZGWg4rrN8OslsUZK5olQ_tQQot_davXM2WlSe5hX7k4Lg-FYnnfvL9fK2tDGoCK2vPGT1dxeKYGvoF5oS-zi-TxjzsegPf6pt5m1Q-JnBd-ax_1_A_6RPO6xzYBGAX9jFVc0TfLKOIN5StfpXNlea2HK7-P4AFZUy8bnqE-UgIbBcCojKw6VYNJY-ISlzBOH0dZXmj_mryrdaVTrbYn4U0cvn8ZWEpaAAAbZsAfPwfM0pSNQVr9mvjx2P7BTe07MQbFdqFB1PUNcHQR-th372iZZ9EUfaJd_aDetmMqu55e3itJubMmLg%3D)

Dear Friend,
Forget ghosts and goblins.

The scariest thing this Halloween are the prices at the grocery store and the pain Joe Biden has inflicted on our economy.

The only way to end this national nightmare is to take back the House in 2022. In order to do that, I need your help to keep my seat.
[**Take Back The House**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=63fe79c7c6384c90ab65eb441ef81a9d&_e=1p14wHc3udRaJBxaZTnEpUY3h-DyySR3jX8bbbcAKBi3uj0VrEt56ZKviusTCt_zzTJ6hevfdI-MbUZtjrUSUsj5CGu-vUcACTUU8j1wB-y1kGORceFQO2ZGWg4rrN8OslsUZK5olQ_tQQot_davXM2WlSe5hX7k4Lg-FYnnfvL9fK2tDGoCK2vPGT1dxeKY-GZ4YWorqu6wsscdOfkZ8EJ-3_U_gJlF7dXTSSd81nOuisPoRNBAm-2xiWsgePLdX33txR3nSqxD52SBObH67aKJx-uMhwjrj4mRtdyahgCtcoKXbolFEF9nObVZ8smerIlQ-lLpN4yams8tQAmBAAnFFmLntZvjd9ymt3oI_T2me7o-g1RlZ547RzzkJ_eN4q1hjchifu8zNhVbI4nHtWvhq20KdSlx-iwLFtuxd4I%3D)
We are getting closer to meeting our October fundraising goal, but we still need 45 people to donate at least $15 right now to put us over the top.
[**Donate $15 Now**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=63fe79c7c6384c90ab65eb441ef81a9d&_e=1p14wHc3udRaJBxaZTnEpUY3h-DyySR3jX8bbbcAKBi3uj0VrEt56ZKviusTCt_zzTJ6hevfdI-MbUZtjrUSUsj5CGu-vUcACTUU8j1wB-y1kGORceFQO2ZGWg4rrN8OslsUZK5olQ_tQQot_davXM2WlSe5hX7k4Lg-FYnnfvIH_LotSmatRc87J8aaYTsqn1G4rDZA1iXBTVm4DrXPmaTaRtv_ZnM9l-yq-c3SNk9G3AXiJrXejJj7zjTKO0-cwuaqfj28QuS3NubJGL4zDcxpGwnPrFDpwcbLSLpElrvU55FmoIzg5Luns6B_j_W0cC3no-NH1yUCMW2tbLVA1Cvk2tRaDCywV_5xzqU2SOyzyslw0FskatMCJByP5mdB1EaiyeIgh10DMAm7v4XrI6pz5XiIdTW4822B4KJfmc8%3D)

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPLVaOhHcOpYq8HHNybIU0ZeqUX81byPNqNPTTa2e-g=/ZduDU_4PzcV9qwlYCbE1MAPhaDEyaDeA3MlqQKlRX18=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211031-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I know it's the weekend, so I'll keep this short. **We have a critical end-of-month deadline approaching tonight.** Meeting our October goal is crucial to have the resources to stand up against attacks from outside groups and contend with my multiple opponents.

**So please, if you 're able to, will you contribute now? [_Click here to contribute._](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPLVaOhHcOpYq8HHNybIU0ZeqUX81byPNqNPTTa2e-g=/ZduDU_4PzcV9qwlYCbE1MAPhaDEyaDeA3MlqQKlRX18=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211031-1-EM&amount=25)**

Having a successful fundraising month not only ensures we can run a winning re-election campaign and stay on budget, but it has a deeper meaning in my eyes. **It indicates that supporters like you are just as committed as I am to moving our country forward. It reveals that this campaign is powerful, collaborative, and engaged enough to win this challenging race.**

So please, contribute to my re-election campaign before the October deadline at midnight tonight. [_**Click here to contribute.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPLVaOhHcOpYq8HHNybIU0ZeqUX81byPNqNPTTa2e-g=/ZduDU_4PzcV9qwlYCbE1MAPhaDEyaDeA3MlqQKlRX18=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211031-1-EM&amount=25)

I am working hard in Congress to improve people's lives in Central Virginia, and with your support, that is what I will continue to do!

Thank you, Peter. I hope you have a happy and safe Halloween!

_Abigail_

body:

---
Hi friend, I hate to interrupt your Sunday -- but this message is _that_ important. **One of the most consequential tasks of Virginia 's Lt. Governor is to serve as the tie-breaking vote in our Senate.** And now, with the Virginia Senate split 21 Democrats to 19 Republicans, this has never been more significant. **[I 'm counting on supporters like you to help me finish this race strong. With Election Day in just two days, will you chip in $15 today toward my final $30,000 fundraising goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/fBniCJ50Qssvn0afczEIwuAgSxbrPbPkzZcTVtoNp9k=/VubxqhuveT5z6WeeQEluK_-DXfBt8m5SuUzXp0vwiVY=)** Friend, my extreme opponent would love nothing more than to become the Senate's tie-breaking vote. **If the Commonwealth votes Winsome Sears into office, there is no limit to the harm she will cause to our historic Democratic progress.** Dismantling voting rights. A Texas-style six-week ban on abortion services. Refusing to do what it takes to end the coronavirus pandemic. This _just the tip of the iceberg_ to the pain Winsome Sears could cause if elected. **[I 'm fighting hard to make sure this doesn't become Virginia's reality --](https://act.myngp.com/el/fBniCJ50Qssvn0afczEIwuAgSxbrPbPkzZcTVtoNp9k=/PCvKQnGc_IPM22RO9R21H31OqYzLYNWDgHB7pxAFajg=)[ because our Commonwealth deserves so much better. If you're with me, will you contribute $15 toward my last $30,000 goal right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/fBniCJ50Qssvn0afczEIwuAgSxbrPbPkzZcTVtoNp9k=/PCvKQnGc_IPM22RO9R21H31OqYzLYNWDgHB7pxAFajg=)** Your support means the world to me, friend! name: Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
subject: Scared of NRA Republicans this Halloween???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, **This Halloween, are you afraid of the NRA-backed Republicans who are trying to gut our nation 's gun safety laws and are up for election next year? The same ones standing in the way of progress in Congress today? Yeah, so are we. **But let's not get too terrified - we can make a difference. In the last two federal elections, we have helped a new wave of Democrats get elected, defeating their NRA Republican incumbent, kicking them out of office. Pride Fund is working hard to support pro-gun reform, pro-LGBTQ, candidates facing tough elections. With your help, we can continue our day to day advocacy work and also begin our preparations for the 2022 midterm elections. It may seem early to you to start thinking about that election, but trust me, the worst candidates that are in office, or have kicked off their campaign to try and defeat a Democrat currently in office, are fundraising every day to fuel their gun rights and right wing campaigns. We need to start now to build our warchest to defeat these candidates. **[Don't boo, donate! Help us elect candidates who will stand up to the gun lobby, not bow down to it - candidates who will put our safety first. Donate here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/h1XDznW54oVpZxzyC43rp0Npf0fIE9YyjewDvYF8yF0=/vzbDhLqXh7GsOKY7EF2gAPmJbqdmLkcuB2mo9wSif8I=?refcode=2021&amount=25&recurring=yes)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/h1XDznW54oVpZxzyC43rp0Npf0fIE9YyjewDvYF8yF0=/vzbDhLqXh7GsOKY7EF2gAPmJbqdmLkcuB2mo9wSif8I=?refcode=2021&amount=25&recurring=yes) There is still so much we can do to help candidates who are challenging the status-quo in Congress and in state legislatures across the country. In the upcoming election we must help defend vulnerable Democrats in the House and Senate and ensure they keep their seats, and we must also help Democratic candidates that are challenging Republicans in office that are standing in the way of gun reform. The candidates we endorse during the election cycle are some of the fiercest, most outspoken advocates for common sense gun reform and LGBTQ rights. We need your help so that we can ensure that their voices are heard in Congress and that they can fight for our safety. **[Take a stand today and help fuel our critical advocacy, lobbying, political, legal and education work. Donate here and stand with us in the fight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/h1XDznW54oVpZxzyC43rp0Npf0fIE9YyjewDvYF8yF0=/vzbDhLqXh7GsOKY7EF2gAPmJbqdmLkcuB2mo9wSif8I=?refcode=2021&amount=25&recurring=yes)** Thanks for your support, Pride Fund to End Gun Violence |

name: Collier HQ
subject: Beware of the power of our grassroots movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
So this Halloween, we’re reminding you to check out our digital shop to grab a “Fix The Damn Grid” shirt (that glows in the dark!). We promise you’ll be in for a treat when it arrives. 👻 |
#
---
Do you know what’s scary, team? _Another four years of Dan Patrick as the Lieutenant Governor of Texas._**😱** Do you want to know why? _Because we’re running out of time to fix the damn grid, and Dan Patrick has shown no interest in keeping the lights on for all Texans._ Hundreds of Texans died and our state lost thousands of jobs because we have an unreliable grid, and with weeks to go before winter, Dan Patrick and the Texas GOP have done NOTHING to actually fix the damn grid. So this Halloween, we’re reminding you to check out our digital shop to grab a “Fix The Damn Grid” shirt (that glows in the dark!). clean_body: Peter, I’ll keep this short: I’ve got good news and bad news. We’re on our last day of the month and the clock is ticking down to midnight. The good news is that we’re just $1,000 away from our October target and the end is in sight! The bad news is ... we only have a few hours left to raise it before the month is over. = = Our grassroots base has come through for us this month and that’s why we are so close to reaching this goal. But if we don’t meet it, our operations will suffer next month.It’s incredibly important we reach this number so we can stay on track and keep hitting the metrics that will carry us to victory next year. = In Solidarity, Jessie Thornton Finance Director, Derek Marshall for Congress * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

body:
Let’s make this month a treat, and not a trick!

We have to show Maggie she has our full support! **[Can you pitch in $10.31 right now to help us hit our $500 goal before the clock strikes midnight, so we don’t turn into pumpkins? It’s hard to fight for voting rights as a pumpkin. We only have $200 to go!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162488/314194169/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211031EOM3_EOM_DM_FULL_4_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGE2OGE0YS03MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbDERA9gQOfKtzJwQzzfHz_HlasMQLClC6Ti0jXCtbo=)****

As I look over our numbers right now, I’m pretty 👻 _spooked_ 👻 that our current pace isn’t fast enough. We rely on grassroots donations for critical campaign resources, and we must hit our fundraising goals every single month.
We only have a few hours left to hit our $500 goal -- _we still have a little over $200 to raise_. We’re going to be straight with you on All Hallows’ Eve: October was a really slow fundraising month for us, but we can’t fall short of our goal, so we need your help.
Let’s make October a treat -- and not a trick! We are so, so close to hitting our goal. [**Will you chip in $10.31 right now so we can hit the ground running in November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162494/314194175/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211031EOM3_EOM_DM_FULL_4_G_N_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGE2OGE0YS03MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbDERA9gQOfKtzJwQzzfHz_HlasMQLClC6Ti0jXCtbo=)
[DONATE $10.31 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162496/314194177/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211031EOM3_EOM_DM_FULL_4_G_N_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGE2OGE0YS03MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbDERA9gQOfKtzJwQzzfHz_HlasMQLClC6Ti0jXCtbo=)
And don't forget to vote on November 2nd!

Dylan McArthur
_Campaign Manager

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162502/314194213/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzYzOWI3ZC03MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GId7k1R2KRVk5-_2_1i7oyXO4YNeeBXasrFU7wplCsM=)
Hi there — In a moment, I’m going to ask you to _[**split a contribution between my friend, Michael Bennet, and my own campaign ahead of our end-of-month deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162503/314194214/-804149513?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211031_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzYzOWI3ZC03MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GId7k1R2KRVk5-_2_1i7oyXO4YNeeBXasrFU7wplCsM=)_ But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important — especially today. As you probably know, our Senate majority is slim. Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to reclaim the majority, and he has his sights set on Colorado. From launching attacks to sending extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Mike Pompeo to our state, it’s clear national Republicans have made Colorado a top-target — and they’re showing no sign of slowing down. **Last quarter, Republicans’ Senate campaign arm raised $25 million to flip seats like Michael’s in their quest to reclaim the Senate. And now, another poll shows Michael in a single point race.** Throughout the years that I’ve known him, I’ve seen how much Michael loves Colorado. I’ve watched him fight to protect the public lands we treasure. I’ve seen firsthand how his experience in education helps him better serve our kids. We need to keep Michael’s voice in the Senate. Republicans have made it clear that they will do (and spend) whatever it takes to defeat him, so he needs our help building the resources to fight back. **Will you split a donation between Michael Bennet’s re-election campaign and our work to keep Colorado blue? Anything you could chip in before our end-of-month deadline expires today would make a huge difference.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to John Hickenlooper and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162504/314194215/-804149513?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211031_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzYzOWI3ZC03MTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GId7k1R2KRVk5-_2_1i7oyXO4YNeeBXasrFU7wplCsM=)**

clean_body: | = Hi there — In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important — especially today. As you probably know, our Senate majority is slim. Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to reclaim the majority, and he has his sights set on Colorado. From launching attacks to sending extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Mike Pompeo to our state, it’s clear national Republicans have made Colorado a top-target — and they’re showing no sign of slowing down. Last quarter, Republicans’ Senate campaign arm raised $25 million to flip seats like Michael’s in their quest to reclaim the Senate. And now, another poll shows Michael in a single point race. Throughout the years that I’ve known him, I’ve seen how much Michael loves Colorado. I’ve watched him fight to protect the public lands we treasure. I’ve seen firsthand how his experience in education helps him better serve our kids. We need to keep Michael’s voice in the Senate. Republicans have made it clear that they will do (and spend) whatever it takes to defeat him, so he needs our help building the resources to fight back. Will you split a donation between Michael Bennet’s re-election campaign and our work to keep Colorado blue? Anything you could chip in before our end-of-month deadline expires today would make a huge difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to John Hickenlooper and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for anything you can give today. We have a long, expensive fight ahead of us and it’s critical we start laying the groundwork now to protect this seat. — John Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Hi Peter, it’s Rachel with Team Hala.

As Finance Director, my job is to ensure we hit our goals — **with two days until Election Day, this is more important than ever.**

[**So I’m going to give you an inside look at this month’s fundraising:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162555/314194515/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211031_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJkYzY0NC03MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iPSwqEiqVFIOr3siAP7tTX1dsEIF5TJ7OroAHwPlBDQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162556/314194516/-1547699132?amount=3&refcode=HAFV_20211031_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJkYzY0NC03MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iPSwqEiqVFIOr3siAP7tTX1dsEIF5TJ7OroAHwPlBDQ=) | [$2,310 NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162557/314194517/-1547699132?amount=3&refcode=HAFV_20211031_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJkYzY0NC03MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iPSwqEiqVFIOr3siAP7tTX1dsEIF5TJ7OroAHwPlBDQ=)

Peter, we have come so far in this race.

From the crowded primary, to now facing off against an extreme Republican — we’re getting the job done!

**But with all that’s at stake, we can’t get too comfortable.**

This last $2,310 will solidify the strength of our voter outreach efforts, ads, yard sign distribution, and so much more as we fight to protect our democracy from the threat of far-right Republican takeover.

[**With this in mind, will you donate $3 this afternoon? We have 10 hours until our end-of-month deadline and 2 days until Election Day — it all comes down to this moment, and I don’t want to give Hala bad news! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162558/314194518/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211031_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJkYzY0NC03MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iPSwqEiqVFIOr3siAP7tTX1dsEIF5TJ7OroAHwPlBDQ=)

(it makes a huge difference)

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162704/314195136/-2023814932?refcode=20211031.07_TM_10KB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjJkYzY0NC03MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFza65fT5Q1D_ux68FDJmrA2RnpyqeE41YxS3tQboFI=)

| | Derek, we are almost out of time in this race, and we urgently need your support to power the final few days of GOTV. _**[I’m about to ask you to donate $15 to my campaign before tonight's FINAL donation match opportunity expires.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38162705/314195137/-2023814932?refcode=20211031.07_TM_10KB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjJkYzY0NC03MjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFza65fT5Q1D_ux68FDJmrA2RnpyqeE41YxS3tQboFI=)**_**But first, let me explain why your $15 makes a difference at this point in the race.**

For $15, we can reach 1000 Virginians with an online voter mobilization ad.

Or, we can text 100 voters with their polling location to make sure they know when, where and how to cast their ballot on Tuesday.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am humbly asking you to make a donation before our midnight deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can’t wait any longer for gun safety legislation to become a reality.
#

[**I am humbly asking you to make a $3 contribution towards our October fundraising goal before tonight at midnight. Can I count on you to pitch in?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211031-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1154_3935704_1hWoCb&akid=1154%2E3935704%2E1hWoCb)
Here’s why I ask:
We face an uphill battle against the gun lobby. They will do and spend whatever it takes to roll back all the progress we’ve made to promote gun safety over the years, and prevent us from taking any other steps forward.
_But we can’t wait any longer for change._
45,000 Americans died from gun violence in 2020, a level of gun deaths not seen in decades. That means gun deaths have actually increased during the global pandemic.
And as schools are open once again for in-person learning, we face the potential for a return to school shootings threatening our kids’ lives.
As I said, we cannot wait anymore. So please, chip in before our midnight end-of-month fundraising deadline. Donate at this link to have your contribution count towards our $115,000 goal:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/October**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211031-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1154_3935704_1hWoCb&akid=1154%2E3935704%2E1hWoCb)
I will never give up on this fight, and I’m hoping you won’t either.
Sincerely,
Gabby
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211031-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1154_3935704_1hWoCb&akid=1154%2E3935704%2E1hWoCb)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1154%2E3935704%2E1hWoCb) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Kierra Newton
subject: redistricting fears
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| | Hey everyone, Yesterday Josh announced a $15,000 New Voter Outreach Fund so we can be prepared for whatever chaos redistricting brings. Already we've seen our district get _even more competitive_ in the first drafts that were released. We have to be ready to speak to thousands of new voters as early as December when maps are finalized. We've been hearing a lot of concern about this, so we're taking action now. **We had a burst of grassroots support when Josh first announced this goal, but donations are starting to slow down so I wanted to bump this to the top of your inbox!** [**Can you rush in a donation right now to help us reach this goal and be prepared to protect one of the most important districts to keep our House majority blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Thank you for all the support! Kierra Newton, Finance Director

**\----FORWARDED MESSAGE----**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-header-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Peter, I know there is a lot of concern right now around redistricting since California is losing a Congressional seat. The first draft map was released this week and it's clear no matter what happens we're going to be one of the most competitive races in the country. I'm advising folks to stay calm and remain patient because we won't know the official lines until December. **But, there 's one thing we _can_ do right now and it's to prepare for what's to come. We have to raise money now, so that we are ready to reach new voters right when the maps are official in December.** [**My team and I want to raise $15,000 this weekend towards a New Voter Outreach Fund, but we 'll need your help and support. Can you please rush in a donation right now so that we can be ready to reach new voters on day one?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**
---
| **[$25](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25)**
---
| **[$50](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50)**
---
| **[$100](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=100)**
---
| **[$200](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=200)**
---
| **[Other](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-EG-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA)**
---
No matter how the lines shake out, we know that there will be thousands of new voters we need to introduce to our campaign - there's no doubt about that!
We can't wait until the new lines are released to start preparing. We're taking action now with the help of our amazing grassroots supporters to fill a $15,000 New Voter Outreach Fund so we have all the resources we need for our new voter contact efforts.
[**Will you send in a generous donation right now to help us reach this goal?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
I promise we'll be in touch if there's any important updates. We should know more soon!
\-- Josh
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/SyDDb_Nkv7ESRpjObkhCEy_9BpNN6_XZTw6S4OmTswQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/clz1_8SpvVRbQuyJri5SILpJcxBuLqj4qUZ79dY4TSI=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/154h7xUh22_rgKFPS6D-ghiclNrE4BupK1ZK5_eb7-g=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/JmRP6avs-xH-SyJxMa0z_e3dUcSMVjIlFBiIUZHxNr8=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-footer-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-footer-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/zeA0j3X9rB2BLLK1Dz4GAT4Jt3fwnuLakyt6fHISVSg=/OdBhlF_PAddSlkHogkLAl0ppIFjs3ke9dRSJS7rnFzU=?refcode=E12184-20211031-RedistrictingKicker-footer-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)**

Harder for Congress
PO Box 4426
Modesto CA 95352 United States

They can't get their radical legislation done without a villain... So they've made that villain YOU and everyone else who believes in the idea that America and her people should be prioritized.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zksgv58pc5qfn09havvs7rf2d3378133g21s1qn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctg6coj2cph2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3tgvlifpi3bdqjcbim7djq1ubg654jkgsovl8sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctg6coj2cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrfpt2dogd88p5hkn78jciq37p7hvb7jl4a9b8ig_rp22sh2s8i66pj5ctg6coj2cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.
