name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I don’t normally send you emails this long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_) **[I won't mince words with you: Our Democratic Trifecta is in serious jeopardy. I don't normally send you emails this long, but I desperately need you to read my entire message. It's critical that you understand what's happening in the fight to keep the White House, Senate, and House in Democratic hands. If you're short on time, I understand. But before you go, could you rush $3 to help me STOP Trump, McConnell, and McCarthy from destroying our Democratic House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAk_L-S~~)**

* * *
**
I need you to understand what 's at stake in the fight for the White House:**

First: I watched Trump use the Presidency to desecrate the very soul of our democracy.

Then: I watched Americans vote him OUT of office -- and elect Joe Biden to replace him.

_**But now: Trump has more than $100 MILLION in the bank to regain power. This is shocking.**_

****[I cannot stress this enough. We need to act quickly to stop this dangerous one-term President and his Republicans from ever -- EVER -- regaining power. Will you help PROTECT our Democratic Trifecta and stop Trump from ever setting foot in the White House again? Trump has already suggested that he'll run for president if his Republicans take our House Majority. That's why I'm calling for 5,000 more gifts before my End of Month Deadline at midnight to close my budget gap, protect our Democratic House Majority, and prevent a Republican takeover. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****

* * *

**Please let me explain what 's at stake in the fight for the Senate Majority:**

First: I watched Mitch McConnell pack the courts and sabotage our Supreme Court for generations.

Then: I watched Democrats retaliate by voting him and his Republicans out of power.

_**But now: McConnell only needs to flip ONE Senate seat to regain the Majority -- and his Senate Republicans just raised $25 million to do it.**_

**[I need you to understand: Republicans are retiring from the Senate at a shocking rate. This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to FLIP their seats, build the BIGGEST Senate Majority in history, and protect our House Majority. But if we don't respond to McConnell's enormous cash haul, we could squander this historic opportunity and lose control of the House. I'm calling for 5,000 more gifts before my midnight End of Month Deadline to PROTECT our Democratic House Majority and stop McConnell and his Republicans from ushering in a total Republican takeover. Can I count on your help to defend our House Democrats before midnight? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

* * *

**I 'm about to tell you what's at stake in the fight for our House Majority:**

First: I watched House Republicans grovel at Trump's feet in hopes of returning to power.

Then: I watched voters RESOUNDINGLY keep them out of the House Majority.

_**But now: After amassing a $65 MILLION war chest, a shocking poll reveals Republicans just officially took the lead.**_

**[I don't know how else to put this: Our Democratic House Majority is RAZOR-thin. Republicans only need to flip five seats to take it from us. And unless Democrats turn the tide ASAP, we could be forced to watch House Republicans take our Majority right out from under us. I will NOT allow that to happen. I'm calling for 5,000 more gifts before my midnight End of Month Deadline to OUTRAISE Republicans, REGAIN our lead in the polls, and PROTECT the critical House Majority we worked so hard to win. If you want to help keep our House Majority in Democratic hands, please chip in $3 before midnight to defend my House Democrats. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hvV0_)**

* * *

If you're still reading my message, it means so much that you've stuck with me.

Truth be told, I don't enjoy asking you for money.

I know how hard you work for every cent in your pocket.

**But I hope now you understand how close Republicans are to buying their way to a COMPLETE government takeover.**

Under no circumstances will I allow this to happen.

****[You've never let me down before -- and I know you never will. So I'm asking one last time: Can I count on your $3 before our End of Month Deadline at midnight? I'm calling for 5,000 gifts to close the budget gap, PROTECT our House Democrats, and SAVE our Democratic House Majority. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)****
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4W~)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBeEWNLC-)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cvK_)
---

Thank you,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45865377&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzM3MzQ1NwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45865377&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzM3MzQ1NwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Ken
subject: we can’t believe what we just read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
We just got an alarming update that could throw all our campaign’s progress in the balance.

|
---

| | This news is SHOCKING, Peter.

We told you Florida is ground-zero for the race for the Senate Majority.

We told you defeating Marco Rubio would bring us one step closer to solidifying all our Democrats’ progress for years to come.

But we just got an alarming update that could throw all of this in the balance:

**Top political strategists predict campaigns will spend nearly $600 MILLION in ads in the 2022 elections.**

Republicans are going to flood the airwaves to make sure Rubio is saved, and that Ken is defeated.

**We absolutely cannot allow this to happen, Peter.**

Everything, and we mean EVERYTHING, is on the line right now.

We need to hit our End of Month goal right now so we can help Ken prepare for the attacks that are going to come our way.

Want to hear something _wicked scary_ , friend? If Maggie Hassan loses here in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of keeping the Senate majority. **There's nothing more haunting than the thought of Mitch McConnell becoming Majority Leader again.** But with the Senate split 50-50 and Republicans spending millions against Maggie, that's exactly what could happen. So far GOP Super PACs have already dumped over $4 million into New Hampshire as part of Republicans' plan to flip the Senate red, and they've promised that there are millions more on the way. There are just a few hours left until our end-of-month deadline, and we're still short of our fundraising goal. If we're going to keep up with the GOP's tricks, it's going to take more than _witchful_ thinking – it will take all of us working together. **[So please, will you throw us a treat by donating $5 to protect New Hampshire’s Senate seat and the Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38164381/314202458/-214106137?refcode=e20211031_staff-spooky&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGU0YmNhNi03NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYS-dXZQ_N6r4KMV_jSCSJ19G9IAO6Hzpa8yqZF7CX8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38164382/314202459/-214106137?refcode=e20211031_staff-spooky&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGU0YmNhNi03NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYS-dXZQ_N6r4KMV_jSCSJ19G9IAO6Hzpa8yqZF7CX8=)

If we're going to keep up with the GOP's tricks, it's going to take more than witchful thinking – it will take all of us working together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you so much, and Happy Halloween! – Team Maggie | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

body:
Running out of time | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGNBFW6IOb0P3a8sHJ3JbsL9-y5w0k2xc0lOORnKLRXFgMRDQJMsg3cezQ-IH3NF2NiXnP6_ccoXhUkfzohXvUvqZ9RWhq0hOB5M2l8KmDFmQyBRBcgTYt6ZY9UCi72qH_Bs0IxgWe88qiLtKupe5vmyrWBsgT6rn8-9PatdYN0ulpBoYYe2T_ZGnKokZAiMB03J8yRXAfXhGc855ee3dg-PWIV93q5RYMYXWRKO5xx62C9GrdF62xDZJ2DOj_3h23Odu4Ta7AjFEva46jUzl04k9PAkWYi0N58iQPkGeASb3/3gm/SogZ1PclSb-R3zZOCK7Y8Q/h0/5i_fbQ7Y-kbRGX66jlcUjv2uBdn9yP4EJ7Jt2BPq6_Y)
Trump’s chosen candidate in Virginia is TIED with Terry McAuliffe, and the elections are on TUESDAY.

We can’t let him win, and we’re so close to beating him for good.

If Trump’s guy wins, then Trump candidates will get a HUGE boost going into the midterms, and Trump himself will be positioned for a comeback in 2024.

But if Terry wins, Democrats will set Trump and his cronies back going into some of the most consequential midterms in YEARS.

Here’s how we win: **_we mobilize our base and turnout voters._**

Right now, Democrats in Virginia are turning out to vote -- but we need to make sure that every strong Democrat out there turns out to vote on Tuesday.

[**That takes resources, and we’re going to need your help. clean_body: Running out of time | | | Trump’s chosen candidate in Virginia is TIED with Terry McAuliffe, and the elections are on TUESDAY. We can’t let him win, and we’re so close to beating him for good. If Trump’s guy wins, then Trump candidates will get a HUGE boost going into the midterms, and Trump himself will be positioned for a comeback in 2024. But if Terry wins, Democrats will set Trump and his cronies back going into some of the most consequential midterms in YEARS. Here’s how we win: we mobilize our base and turnout voters. Right now, Democrats in Virginia are turning out to vote -- but we need to make sure that every strong Democrat out there turns out to vote on Tuesday. With all eyes on Virginia, we can’t afford to mess this up. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . subject: Let's not scare Gwen this Halloween
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Hi Peter – Happy Halloween! I hate to email you on a Sunday but it’s important. We have until midnight to meet our October fundraising goal and we need 15 more supporters to chip in $25 or more. Donate using this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenoctober21?refcode=Halloween&amount=25

Can I let Gwen know we can count on you to be one of the 15? Donate using this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenoctober21?refcode=Halloween&amount=25

I appreciate your taking the time to help us out on Halloween.

Chris Trull
Gwen Moore for Congress
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

I wanted to reach out personally to talk to you about the critical deadline we’re facing at midnight.

Tonight marks the first end-of-month fundraising deadline since we launched our campaign, and we need to reach our goal by the end of the night. I just checked the numbers and we are still $845 short.

This is the first major test of my campaign. It will set the tone for the rest of the race moving forward, so we can’t fall short.

Our extreme Republican opponent has already raised $1,000,000, but his campaign is powered by dark-money groups. My campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you.

We need to send a message to everyone that our campaign is the one to beat. And I wanted to personally make sure you knew what was at stake.

**I need you to help us reach our first end-of-month goal so we can keep pace with my extreme opponent and ensure WI-03 has a Representative who shares their values and will fight for their families.**

subject: Reminder: Aadland for U.S. Senate News
body:
Erik on Biden plans to weaponize the IRS
---
| | | | | | Volume 14 | October 27, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
The Radical Left is attempting to weaponize the IRS against American citizens through a massive, unjustified invasion of privacy. Within Joe Biden's so-called "Build Back Better" plan is a proposal to allow the IRS to monitor bank accounts for deposits over $10,000 (originally $600) which would put the bank information of almost every American into the hands of the IRS. Carrying out this surveillance operation would be an army of 80,000 IRS agents. And the price tag for this aggressive strong-arming of the American people? --$80 million.

The crux of this plan is not only that the government will forcefully enter itself into your private matters, but it will result in significantly more audits of low to middle-income Americans. It will overburden banks and credit unions at a time when there are labor shortages. And the government not only has a proven track record of failing to protect taxpayers' confidentiality; we now see federal agencies' proven track record of corruption, bypassing due process of law and setting out on witch-hunts against conservatives.

This isn't about fiscal responsibility. It is about control. And it is in complete violation of the 4th Amendment of the Constitution which protects your right to privacy.

I support any means to stop this intrusion of your privacy, including the newly introduced "Prohibiting IRS Financial Surveillance Act" introduced by good men and women in Congress who are standing against this blatant overreach. As your next US Senator, I will join my voice with all those who oppose Biden's plan, and stand against tyranny to protect your rights.

If you are tired of government bureaucrats invading your privacy and infesting every facet of your life, please support my campaign.
|

body:
I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight to keep America safe Peter, America’s national security is crumbling. Eight months ago, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were handed a secure border and a comprehensive exit strategy from Afghanistan. _Now what do we have?_ A resurgent Taliban armed with American military equipment and a border crisis that’s overwhelming law enforcement and endangering our entire country. This is a disaster –– but I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach. **I say that because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight in Congress to keep America safe.. I can’t think of anybody on Capitol Hill more committed to national security than him.** Peter, we need more people like Mike Gallagher in Congress. He’s a veteran of the Marine Corps, a fearless problem solver, and a leader who consistently stands up to communist China and other authoritarian regimes. **Mike is a fierce defender of freedom, democracy, and our American values, and I am proud to** _[**stand by clean_body: I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight to keep America safe Peter, America’s national security is crumbling. Eight months ago, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were handed a secure border and a comprehensive exit strategy from Afghanistan. Now what do we have? A resurgent Taliban armed with American military equipment and a border crisis that’s overwhelming law enforcement and endangering our entire country. This is a disaster –– but I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach. I say that because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight in Congress to keep America safe.. I can’t think of anybody on Capitol Hill more committed to national security than him. Peter, we need more people like Mike Gallagher in Congress. He’s a veteran of the Marine Corps, a fearless problem solver, and a leader who consistently stands up to communist China and other authoritarian regimes. Mike is a fierce defender of freedom, democracy, and our American values, and I am proud to his mission to safeguard our incredible country. My very best, Ambassador Nikki Haley | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

When we told you Terry was neck and neck in the polls with Republican Glenn Youngkin, **_we really thought grassroots Democrats would step up._**
**But NO ONE HAS.** Democratic donations to elect McAuliffe and SAVE Virginia have completely stalled out.

**If we didn’t get the message across then, we’ll be clear now:** If 500 Democrats don’t step up now, **_we can kiss Democratic control of Virginia goodbye._**
Voter outreach is expensivePeter, , so if we’re going to win big, we need to rush money to reach -- _and turnout_ \-- every last Democrat in Virginia.

**We’re desperatePeter, : We need 500 more Democrats to shore up the financial support we need to win this race.**

**[PleasePeter, , there’s no time to waste. Voter outreach is expensivePeter, , so if we’re going to win big, we need to rush money to reach -- and turnout \-- every last Democrat in Virginia. | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hmtuut-fpJxjWiUjttYcsc-NRPkizaUmfa6DJSbmkdtuz5GwSzt8M3Hc3xx-sR48svkods8_cO5fhdc8u5aZKRIZGg9Q4ASAYQGvsLJ9XVz0PuEymul2JQwDIcXWEikWPUJropviRwQziLnS3xh_CodY0JHfb5mR&c=7dWbXkDyzb93Pq8QcJ_XfvRmje7bGAbgWS7uvICWM3L-IG18pJZ-0g==&ch=YFUwoJ5cZ-8WJPaUKeutYOHJljvDF5CfO5mJCvNl_u9snB6EMv64JA==)

|
# We risk losing our nation's warriors
---
Recently, Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin mandated all United States military members be vaccinated against COVID-19. Those who refuse? They are subject to, "administrative or non-judicial punishment [under the Uniform Code of Military Justice] -- to include relief of duties or discharge."
For quite some time, service members have been required to receive FDA approved vaccinations such as tetanus, MMR, and Influenza. As a West Point Cadet and all through my time as an Army Officer (1998 - 2011), I willingly accepted these requirements.
However, this new mandate carries serious consequences that may impact our military's readiness and ability to defend this nation in a world made more dangerous by the weakness of the current Presidential administration and its abject failure in Afghanistan.
Military Service Members are justified in their concerns regarding the jab. Let's recall that the Anthrax vaccine (which I received) caused tens of thousands of vaccine-related injuries. Service Members should never be threatened with court martial or dishonorable discharge for defending their own individual right of bodily integrity. We must reconsider the military's policies on vaccines or any mandated form of medical treatment.
This mandate, with all its consequences, is potentially a tremendous threat to our nation's military readiness and national security. If the bullheadedness of our military's top brass continues, we risk losing our nation's warriors with a sharp decline in enlistments. America and international stability will be at risk. I believe the US military should empower its service members to choose for themselves and determine their own destinies. Stand with me in standing up for our men and women in uniform and their right to bodily integrity. g.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Everything is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=E9qlVfVJcQ%2FW38zbJQ6NSw0aar4rjOcK&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend: Apologies for reaching out again, but we're just $8,725 short of what we need to raise before the month of October is over, and I know I can count on you to help put us over the top.
I know fundraising goals like these can sometimes seem trivial - but quite frankly, they are the opposite of trivial. They really matter. When you and other grassroots Democrats chip in one donation at a time, it ensures we have the resources to counter Republican megadonors, protect this seat, and defend Democratic control of the Senate.
But when we fall short of our goals, we weaken our ability to fight back against Mitch McConnell's attacks and put Democratic Senate control at risk. The stakes of losing the Senate would be almost unfathomable: Our ability to defend a woman's right to choose, protect voting rights, hold Trump and his associates accountable for wrongdoing during his administration, and more are all on the line.**
So please, with just a few hours left, I'm counting on you to come through: **[Donate $5 or whatever you can spare so we have the resources to defend this Senate seat and keep Democratic control of the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1090-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=j885whn8zRHY3KgLsLn5Lw0aar4rjOcK&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

Peter,

It’s no wonder why people like Senator Joe Manchin are on the brink of leaving the Democratic Party.

**Democrats are now the party of socialism, big government, and control – and America is in deep trouble as long as they’re in charge.**

Now, we’re seeing a revolt happen right before our eyes.
* _Joe Biden’s poll numbers are sinking faster than a rock._
* _Thousands of workers are pushing back against Biden’s vaccine mandate._
* _Democrats are reportedly “panicking” ahead of the 2022 midterm elections._

[](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=e49e77aaaa514e439c96941cbb3a14c4&_e=voJD99czxanvlK4wxiJ1cDXKZAWa_lKiIEkLVf4EndZiPRPS09iB1i9OTNgaiNb-6A_XTmm0vvDUDDiHTzCKMlD6-UtOF0JCdLOWTnETkjBVGuYr5yFCV2KVFZID6bycNn9HJOfs5mNSKshWVoy29P3q2a_QFL-V5DAWfylzMvJQ0m6fY-_lL2DXCbr82wkycHxvw4ms0T_loWHaTH53NOKp-9V1KS0g50J-gf2J1CqGZgi2NMmSbm6YNSfuZ_w9RwwPGYnn1JRlqQAE-XhOquMO8fb6jggtaXSOeraTlpK0sZrSV_vjB5qRGZbg8-c63rALGuMdT5gzAxlOWltmNOVoM1ruqRZ_k0ZhsdqeEGNfdLsJUTW_8EHNRbRxbM057gIeRiLy7XmRL3DE1h31L1O6PfAWf-vfk9ids6YodxUMgtef7XXAgvMnelWuRUm_DOAdQqx4rX0OxA6zAm1XXozQO6ZdKs_uhZsKTe-4yYhdl9_SerjlWQpbPO31bPtA)

Peter, I don’t know where I would be today without the grace of God and the power of the American Dream.

_But I do know this:_

**I will never give an inch in the Senate against the socialists who are fighting to eliminate our freedoms.**

But before that can happen, I need your support – and with our End of Month fundraising deadline coming up, it’s more critical than ever.

_**[Will you help protect our freedoms by stepping up to take back the Senate?](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=e49e77aaaa514e439c96941cbb3a14c4&_e=voJD99czxanvlK4wxiJ1cDXKZAWa_lKiIEkLVf4EndZiPRPS09iB1i9OTNgaiNb-6A_XTmm0vvDUDDiHTzCKMlD6-UtOF0JCdLOWTnETkjBVGuYr5yFCV2KVFZID6bycNn9HJOfs5mNSKshWVoy29P3q2a_QFL-V5DAWfylzMvJQ0m6fY-_lL2DXCbr82wkycHxvw4ms0T_loWHaTH53NOKp-9V1KS0g50J-gf2J1CqGZgi2NMmSbm6YNSfuZ_w9RwwPGYnn1JRlqQAE-XhOquMO8fb6jggtaXSOeraTlpJ99Uri2HuFRVJdKsUJWnK1rb3K2M1YuTfeDAaosuuS5n50B1eP-C5669Bkl3oGpL49mFJjk1J4xvr_7_bGm3SwQHsI2_w-h319us0qdkRjbvQyFPWiXVAhKa-Q-MhBBovrzj_gpPee3Y2YoeoTY79nemuAMi_6li0h8fbQSwUNkBqc5Qod2q4v4x0t0poXqfiKPIQoE0Re5F1nFWVKRCuc)**_

name: John Fetterman
subject: Peter + me + Gisele + Sheetz (or Wawa)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Coffee and snacks on me, obviously.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211031-3267-header&t=1&akid=3267%2E434096%2ENdjaFl)
Peter,
I wanted to ask you one last time before it's too late:
**Would you be up for a Sheetz run — or Wawa, if that's more your vibe — with Gisele and me?**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211031-3267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3267%2E434096%2ENdjaFl)
We'd come meet ya near Cresco, get to hang out in-person, and have a chance to talk 1:1 about what you want to see in Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator.
Oh, and coffee and snacks on me. Obviously!
[**_Will you chip in any amount at all to be automatically entered to win a trip to Sheetz (or Wawa) with the SLOP Gisele and me? I'd really love to meet up with you, so I'm asking just this one last time before the team told me we'll have to close out this opportunity tonight at midnight._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211031-3267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3267%2E434096%2ENdjaFl)
**[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211031-3267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3267%2E434096%2ENdjaFl)**
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211031-3267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3267%2E434096%2ENdjaFl)**
It would be my HONOR to treat you to the finest Pennsylvania gas station dining-establishment of your choosing.
**But more importantly than that, I'd really cherish the opportunity to meet you.** Because, while it may be my name on the ballot in this Senate race, it's YOU + your family + your community that this campaign is all about.
So I think it's only right that you'd have a real stake in this race as we fight to flip this Senate seat. I'd love nothing more than to meet you in-person, so I'll just ask ya this very final time:
[**_Will you kick in a donation of any amount to be automatically entered to win a trip to Sheetz with me + Gisele? This is a one-of-a-kind contest that's about to close at midnight tonight, and I don’t want you to miss out._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211031-3267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3267%2E434096%2ENdjaFl)__
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211031-3267&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3267%2E434096%2ENdjaFl)**
Thank you for being a part of this.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

name: Erica Smith
subject: I KNOW it is absolutely possible to raise the remaining $769 in the next few hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
When I say our campaign is scrappy, I REALLY mean it.
#
Hi, it’s Erica Smith.
Anyone on our campaign team will tell you: I *really* don’t like to send fundraising emails on Sunday. _I’m a minister, after all._
But with our October fundraising deadline at 11:59 PM ET, I wanted you to hear the latest update directly from me:
**As of 9:35 AM ET today, we are still around $769 behind our October fundraising goal.**
I can’t stress enough how critical it is that we close our fundraising gap before midnight in order to continue our campaign operations.
That said, I KNOW it is absolutely possible to raise the remaining $769 in the next few hours if everyone reading this email chips in! You’re an awesome part of our scrappy grassroots team, and I’m hoping I can count on you today:
**Will you please make a contribution of any amount to our campaign before 11:59 PM ET tonight? You can give directly at this link, or click the button below:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em-20211031-1](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24630?refcode=em20211031-599&t=1&akid=599%2E3698%2E9_09e4)
Together, we will build a winning grassroots campaign for a different North Carolina — one that loves us back the same way we love it.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
P.S. **When I say our campaign is scrappy, I REALLY mean it.** The reason you get so many emails from me and my team is honestly because we rely on people like you chipping in to emails like this. And we’re doing it all without taking a dime from corporate PACs or fossil fuel companies! [**Please consider making a contribution to our campaign before our October fundraising deadline at 11:59 PM ET tonight.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24630?refcode=em20211031-599&t=2&akid=599%2E3698%2E9_09e4)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211031-599-footer&t=3&refcode2=599_3698_9_09e4&akid=599%2E3698%2E9_09e4)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=4&akid=599%2E3698%2E9_09e4)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Twitter Lied. We Litigated.
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654355:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654356:6mD3lf2bN:m:1:3253819041:46DBE752014E59C5007C0E4D6C598D63:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

The journey to victory has only just begun, and it’s very important to maintain our momentum until the very end. Too much is at stake for us to give up now. **Our campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you, and I know that, together, Republicans are no match for our power.**

We must answer the call of our democracy, and continue courageously in the pursuit of lasting progress. All of our progress is at stake, and we’ve worked far too hard to watch them steal it from us through gerrymandering and voter suppression.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A humble request for $3 to my campaign before our midnight deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full-term, but I can’t do that alone.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here’s the truth:
When the clock strikes midnight, our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to an end. And just like that, we’ll be about one year from Election Day.
But this deadline is important for a few more reasons.
First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack.
Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022.
But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win.
It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign before the end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight tonight? I would not ask if it weren’t so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211031-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1604_6688874_9EjwqC&akid=1604%2E6688874%2E9EjwqC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211031-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1604_6688874_9EjwqC&akid=1604%2E6688874%2E9EjwqC)**

clean_body: President Trump does... | Peter, When President Trump began campaigning to reclaim the Senate Majority and Save America, one of the very first people he endorsed was Republican Senator Tim Scott. Here’s what he had to say: “It is my great honor to give Senator Tim Scott of South Carolina my Complete and Total Endorsement. He is both an outstanding Senator and person who works tirelessly for the people of his great state, and the USA. Strong on the Military, Law Enforcement, loves our Vets, protects our Second Amendment and our Borders. Tim will continue to do an OUTSTANDING job for our country!” — President Donald J. Trump (March 2, 2021) President Trump has given Tim Scott his Complete and Total Endorsement. Are you ready to do the same? | ENDORSE TIM SCOTT EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #040945 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT | | Last year, the Democrats spent over $100 million attacking Trump-ally Lindsey Graham in South Carolina. Now, they’re taking all the fundraising, field, and campaigning infrastructure they built to attack Trump-Endorsed Senator Tim Scott. We have to defend Tim Scott and keep South Carolina Republican. Everything depends on it! Do we have your support, Peter? Please let us know by adding your name right away. Thank you. Tim Scott Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

| **Weekend Early Voting is OPEN this Saturday from 8am-4pm and Sunday from 1pm-5pm.** The _LAST_ day to vote early is this Monday, Nov. 1st. You can vote in person at your Board of Elections from 8am-12pm on Monday, or _**postmark your absentee ballot before your local post office closes**_!!

Only about 5% of registered voters in OH-15 have early voted in the OH-15 special election so far, **.** We’re going to be knocking on doors and making calls all weekend long to **remind Democratic voters and Russo supporters to VOTE by Election Day on Nov. 2!**

body:
The Democratic majority is working hard for families struggling to make it through this crisis -- but we can only keep making real progress if we keep the Senate blue in 2022.

name: Team Salud
subject: Some spooky scenarios!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcbWpgna89XjqNsZGXbiAthwu3wlrLo7gSkk5zA7-hQ=/S6ruxDXpD6wjYW0NDdMg2hvJ8JU9G0N7zH9NJWq0JK4=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
We're kicking off this Halloween with a trick by giving you a couple of spooky scenarios to imagine:
Spooky Scenario #1:
Our campaign fails to meet its October fundraising goal, catches the attention of national Republicans and causes them to invest millions in our district
Spooky Scenario #2:
Redistricting results are announced, our district loses its Democratic edge and a right-wing Republican jumps into the race, bringing millions of dollars of outside spending with them
Spooky Scenario #3:
We fall into a mid-term Election trap, fail to turnout the Democratic vote, and lose the House Majority next fall
But don't get too scared...we also have a couple of treats for you!
Treat #1:
You[ **chip in here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcbWpgna89XjqNsZGXbiAthwu3wlrLo7gSkk5zA7-hQ=/S6ruxDXpD6wjYW0NDdMg2hvJ8JU9G0N7zH9NJWq0JK4=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com), we meet our fundraising goal, and have the funds we need to run a strong campaign next year
Treat #2:
Because of your support, we are able to keep Salud Carbajal in Congress fighting for you on issues like:
* Improving our country's infrastructure
* Combating climate change
* Ensuring access to affordable healthcare and prescription drugs

Treat #3:
Knowing how much is at stake, Democrats nationwide **[chip in to races like ours](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcbWpgna89XjqNsZGXbiAthwu3wlrLo7gSkk5zA7-hQ=/S6ruxDXpD6wjYW0NDdMg2hvJ8JU9G0N7zH9NJWq0JK4=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** , enabling us to keep the Majority and continue our work for you
The good news is that there is still time to avoid those scary scenarios and make this Halloween all about the treats! Please contribute today to help us finish strong this month.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcbWpgna89XjqNsZGXbiAthwu3wlrLo7gSkk5zA7-hQ=/S6ruxDXpD6wjYW0NDdMg2hvJ8JU9G0N7zH9NJWq0JK4=?am=15.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcbWpgna89XjqNsZGXbiAthwu3wlrLo7gSkk5zA7-hQ=/S6ruxDXpD6wjYW0NDdMg2hvJ8JU9G0N7zH9NJWq0JK4=?am=35.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcbWpgna89XjqNsZGXbiAthwu3wlrLo7gSkk5zA7-hQ=/S6ruxDXpD6wjYW0NDdMg2hvJ8JU9G0N7zH9NJWq0JK4=?am=50.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcbWpgna89XjqNsZGXbiAthwu3wlrLo7gSkk5zA7-hQ=/S6ruxDXpD6wjYW0NDdMg2hvJ8JU9G0N7zH9NJWq0JK4=?recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Have a safe and Happy Halloween and thank you for your support!

body:
Wanted to make sure you saw this before 11:59 tonight.
| Friend, I’m sorry for reaching out last minute like this on a Sunday.
---
I understand this isn’t a great time -- Emily and I are still trying to get our two daughters ready for trick-or-treating which is why I’m scrambling to send you this email off my phone... So I’ll keep it brief.
---
News broke that Pelosi’s DCCC raked in **$35.8 MILLION** last quarter right after a new poll gave us a __3-point lead__ in our fight to FLIP the House.
---
Now, as the 1 seat that could cost Pelosi her radical majority, she’s gearing up to spend those millions right here in Texas’ brand-new 38th congressional district.
---
[**So please, make a contribution of whatever amount you can before the end-of-month deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to help me raise the remaining $10,115 of our October goal to win the NEW seat that will END Pelosi’s House majority. >>>**](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=8d98f060ac4340b59b362900157afa73&_e=VZiDNhER4lOMd3vrXF3dkvwWC_v2SWj5Y_uR5sEYpV-YWifqQEme70hGV2ZAXZfBCTmeLeaTQ0dS6TqfwvZfq_21z3Zvg8brGAncDM-wVP047uS7Smz70aCijIafu9LVMRGMvS3L8418tDueScgz_EpgwH0rSuUGwT8cKHyqzjXLmI_WtwFt3KeezVDQazEynvd0cytVudfMNekmgGZO4ArT27ts9zx0VRDxRzslwUrAtIwEf36TXzZJLc3gH9RFMsvFZv-fvbQpHIT4RqQL2N4TEaEAZW5mz_nmPpi3NKmZqERsD7sKeBqM3KP7RBevdipVZYV-GEhfijUcAXk8SP0ETRM1NP3Mx0odeL-h-pLAhrK9MDsVBMJBuPJTbxwp3D1tyGvCRLgZag8J3TFkAnfcdliGpCzS3bonq-oycsGF8Ok28JxxL4q4isantzfm6Z0RR0xp9EQY0XLEH5JVtHBP1_OveqhYkrD3wF6AwFkzIaz3eV9T-oAEGlmwjW83po89FDKFTVYGTkDydquTaQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Wanted to make sure you saw this before 11:59 tonight. | Friend, I’m sorry for reaching out last minute like this on a Sunday. I understand this isn’t a great time -- Emily and I are still trying to get our two daughters ready for trick-or-treating which is why I’m scrambling to send you this email off my phone... So I’ll keep it brief. News broke that Pelosi’s DCCC raked in $35.8 MILLION last quarter right after a new poll gave us a 3-point lead in our fight to FLIP the House. Now, as the 1 seat that could cost Pelosi her radical majority, she’s gearing up to spend those millions right here in Texas’ brand-new 38th congressional district. Thank you in advance! \- Wesley Sent from my iPhone \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Sent: Thu, Oct 28, 2021 Subject: BREAKING To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This is huge... A brand-new congressional poll gives Republicans a 3-point LEAD to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi’s control. With our race for Texas’ NEW congressional district being 1 of the 5 seats needed to end Pelosi’s majority and FLIP the House, we can’t take this lead for granted. But I’m growing more and more concerned by the day... The end-of-month deadline is nearly here, and as it stands, we’re still $22,135 short of our goal. While flipping the House may be the ultimate prize in this fight, sending Nancy Pelosi packing once and for all is hard to beat as a bonus. Remember Friend, Pelosi has been caught not only telling her donors that our race for Texas’ new seat could cost her the House majority,but also that she would likely RETIRE in the wake of that defeat. There’s simply too much riding on this one race for us to miss the end-of-month deadline. We finally have the chance to rid Congress of one of the most disastrous career politicians in history. Help me ensure this opportunity doesn’t go to waste. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: It’s official: My uncle is campaigning in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/J5yp38D7Oc2a1J_JFjOjYBYKilb6JHfVRJRkk02Ex54=/4wWja4Hsai8nJSyeEdDU8PPxSElh1VGNYYSjcjwRFBA=?refcode=20211031_RN_TRM)
---
It's official, friend: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced that he's going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia Governor's race. Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now -- more than ever. [**He set a rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my uncle 's rally in Virginia tomorrow, and he needs your help. Will you split a donation between Terry's campaign and The Way Ahead right now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/J5yp38D7Oc2a1J_JFjOjYBYKilb6JHfVRJRkk02Ex54=/D1L75K53PD52Ka_vyyO6N9k-1QKdWPXvsgU4gcjtojQ=?refcode=20211031_RN_TRM) Glenn Youngkin might pretend he's a moderate, pragmatic Republican. But the truth is, he's just as bad as Donald Trump -- that's why Donald has endorsed him **_eight times._** And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip -- they're gone now. **Donald Trump is _all in _for Youngkin.** We worked much to hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year -- and I'm stunned that more people aren't stepping up to make sure my uncle's radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren't given the chance to gain power. [**We need your support _right now._ Split a donation of any amount between The Way Ahead and Terry's campaign to help Terry stand up and reject Trump and Youngkin -- for good this time.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/J5yp38D7Oc2a1J_JFjOjYBYKilb6JHfVRJRkk02Ex54=/D1L75K53PD52Ka_vyyO6N9k-1QKdWPXvsgU4gcjtojQ=?refcode=20211031_RN_TRM) Thank you, Dr. Mary L. Friend, **We have Liz Cheney SPOOKED this Halloween!** After betraying the will of her constituents, Liz knows her time in Congress is coming to an end. clean_body: | | | | Have you seen what she’s doing? Friend, We have Liz Cheney SPOOKED this Halloween! After betraying the will of her constituents, Liz knows her time in Congress is coming to an end. This is why she is spending her final term in Congress showing her true colors and teaming up with Nancy Pelosi. Liz Cheney betrayed the voters of Wyoming when she voted to impeach President Trump. She now uses her time to attack the 75 million patriots that voted for the People’s President, Donald J. Trump. With your help, this will be Liz Cheney’s scariest Halloween yet! For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

body:
The human cost of the climate crisis is real.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/gp3jhw3z0qCK/MHRwNE9jSGN2TU5pNVJXemZYVy9BcFBrOVMraUJ3VkU3WXZnK1lVVFRjTnkrb2FPZXZuUFpMQUduU2FQRDZIM2Uzd2I5UnhqUDc5alRBaFEySG55OTgrUkNmd1JxVlRUR1pVUGV3UFJJems9S0/bS9CRFdJTTg5WHRFbFpMQk5icHUxQUZnYlRVa0xhZXF4ODlRVS9Uc0NLcz0S1) Friend, Today's Halloween, but I'm struggling to think of anything spookier than the destruction the climate crisis has caused this year. Can you think of anything scarier than a burnt husk of a house where children once played, burned down in a wildfire? Or residents of a basement apartment becoming sicker and sicker as mold grows in their walls after a flood? **The human cost of the climate crisis is real, and we 're running out of time to take action to protect our shared future on this planet. clean_body: We only have a few hours left... | I’ll keep this brief because we don’t have much time. We’re just a few short hours away from the end-of-month deadline, and we’re still $9,315 short of our October goal to register100,000 more conservative voters to EXPAND our registration advantage over Tony Evers. Remember Friend, a contribution of even $4.24 would help us register one more critical conservative vote that could be the deciding factor in this TOSS-UP race. Thank you for your support! \- Rebecca Sent from my iPhone \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Thu, Oct 28, 2021 Subject: Please watch ▶️ To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Tony Evers is terrified of our campaign’s early success. Thanks to patriots like YOU we crushed our September fundraising goal, and according to this month’s latest report, we have a commanding lead among registered voters in Wisconsin. But Evers sees the same numbers we do. He knows this race won’t be labeled a 50-50 toss-up for much longer at this rate. That’s why his liberal allies launched a lying attack ad to try and stall our momentum right before the end-of-month fundraising deadline -- and we’re still $15,350 short of our October goal. Our monthly goals aren’t just arbitrary numbers to throw on a report. Hitting these benchmarks is critical to maintaining our momentum in this MUST-WIN race. Our October goal was set specifically to help fund our efforts to register another 100,000 more conservative voters and fight back against Tony Evers’ attacks. But with just a few days left to raise the remaining $15,350 of our goal, I’m counting on your support now more than ever, Friend. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: Another week in the books, another big group of Kansas conservative leaders joining Team Schmidt! Derek continues to add as supporters the names of Friend, Another week in the books, another big group of Kansas conservative leaders joining Team Schmidt! Derek continues to add as supporters the names of legislators from all across the state every week, because Kansans are united in their belief that Derek is the best man for the job. We wanted to share some of their words with you, - “Being a retired law enforcement officer, I know the importance of supporting and funding law enforcement. As Governor, Derek Schmidt will ensure law enforcement have the tools, training, funding, and support to keep all Kansans safe.” –State Representative John Resman “In my time in the Legislature, I’ve found Derek Schmidt to be always accessible, a good advocate for Kansas values, and a straight shooter with me personally. He’s a proven leader, always out front on defending the rights of Kansans that are under serious threat these days. He will make a great Governor of Kansas.” – State Representative Carl Turner “Derek Schmidt has earned the trust of Kansans for his principled service as Attorney General. As Governor, I know that Derek will help lead the fight against the Biden Administration and put Kansas back on a path to growth and economic stability. At this crucial time, Kansas needs a steady, trusted, and capable conservative leader to guide our state. Derek Schmidt has proven to be that leader and has my full support.” –State Representative Chris Croft “For 11 years as attorney general, Derek Schmidt has done a great job for Northeast Kansas and has made it a point to visit our communities often and listen to Kansans. I am very happy to give him my full endorsement as our next GOP nominee for Governor. I know he will continue to do a great job for Northeast Kansas and all of Kansas.” – State Representative Dr. John Eplee to help our team work toward replacing Laura Kelly and her liberal policies with a trusted conservative leader? Thanks, Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Bianca Keaton
subject: Here's the latest update, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Here's the latest update,
Peter.

Right now, we’re just 7% away from reaching our critical end-of-month
fundraising goal.

Our campaign doesn’t accept a cent of corporate PAC or special interest
money because Charles is running to represent everyday folks in Kentucky.
We’re relying on grassroots donations from emails like this so Charles can
replace Rand Paul and fight for people-first solutions in the U.S. Senate.

Can you chip in $7 right now to help close the gap before our midnight
deadline tonight? If half of our supporters reading this email right now
chip in we can make it in time. Peter,
you can use this personal link to show your
support:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12505?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20211031&t=1001&akid=1131%2E346206%2Ex_PZkR ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20211031?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20211031

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12505?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20211031&t=1002&akid=1131%2E346206%2Ex_PZkR ]DONATE NOW →

Let me explain why this goal is so important for our campaign and the work
we’re doing to transform the future of Kentucky.

For too long, Rand Paul has consistently ignored Kentuckians. He doesn’t
care that our hospitals are at max capacity from the rise in COVID cases,
or how long we’ve been out of a job, or whether we can afford rent next
week.

He’s a politician who will say or do anything to get in the news, put the
spotlight on himself and his conspiracy theories, and sell us out to big
industries.

That’s why it’s so important that our campaign is people-powered and
focused on the issues that matter most to working families in Kentucky who
currently face unprecedented challenges to make ends meet.

But in order for us to do the deep, grassroots organizing work required to
replace Rand Paul — we must hit this goal tonight and make sure our
organizing team has the funds to build a historic voter outreach program.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12505?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20211031&t=1003&akid=1131%2E346206%2Ex_PZkR ]So, can I ask for your support before we hit our deadline? $7 or
whatever you’re able to afford right now will help us tremendously. Every
dollar you give demonstrates to Rand Paul that our movement is ready to
win — and helps us get closer to our goal.

Let’s do this,

Bianca
Campaign Manager

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211031-1131-footer&t=1004&refcode2=1131_346206_x_PZkR&akid=1131%2E346206%2Ex_PZkR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1131%2E346206%2Ex_PZkR

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Hello Somebody! And Happy Halloween!

I hope that you are having the chance to enjoy the weekend with a little bit of fun. My grandson loves the mailman, so he’s dressing up as a postal worker, and I absolutely cannot wait to see him! Without taking up too much of your Sunday so that you can get back to spending time with friends and family, **I would like to just gently remind you of our first-ever online fundraising deadline tonight at midnight and let you know that we are still about $9,012 short of our goal.**

Since launching our movement earlier this month, we are gaining traction, and our momentum is picking up. We are hosting canvassing events, holding virtual phonebanks, and organizing folks from all across the country to join our movement towards progress. Progress on issues like racial justice, immigration reform, gender equality, voting rights, ending climate chaos, and more.

clean_body: I won’t take up too much of your time today, but I do have a favor to ask. | | | = Hello Somebody! And Happy Halloween! I hope that you are having the chance to enjoy the weekend with a little bit of fun. My grandson loves the mailman, so he’s dressing up as a postal worker, and I absolutely cannot wait to see him! Without taking up too much of your Sunday so that you can get back to spending time with friends and family, I would like to just gently remind you of our first-ever online fundraising deadline tonight at midnight and let you know that we are still about $9,012 short of our goal. Since launching our movement earlier this month, we are gaining traction, and our momentum is picking up. We are hosting canvassing events, holding virtual phonebanks, and organizing folks from all across the country to join our movement towards progress. Progress on issues like racial justice, immigration reform, gender equality, voting rights, ending climate chaos, and more. However, if we are going to continue building up enthusiasm, we absolutely must sustain our fundraising numbers to strengthen our efforts and expand our reach even further. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= __= ****** **** Thanks for stepping up, **Nina Turner** ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Nina Turner**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner is building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. body:
Are you even reading this?
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38167290/314219346/-2023814932?refcode=20211031.08_TM_10KC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzVmNTgzZi04NzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2QvsW1dH49ElLAuevc_TafCcVtIywwkjecLVlG7It4I=)

| | Look, Derek, I know raising $1,000,000 in a day is a tall order for any grassroots team, but after my last email flopped, I asked my team if anyone even reads these emails.

If folks are reading this, they’ll know that I’m running against Glenn Youngkin, a right-wing culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump eight times — _and even endorsed Trump for President in 2024!_

They’ll also know that _The Cook Political Report_ recently downgraded the Virginia Governor’s race from “leans Democrat” to “toss-up.”

Not to mention, experts from _POLITICO_ to _The Washington Post_ are saying Democrats aren’t enthusiastic right now — that they’re ready to just let Trump’s handpicked candidate win.

Look, Virginia fought tooth-and-nail to defeat Donald Trump, but with all that progress in jeopardy, and only 2 days left in this race, we have to drive this thing home with everything we’ve got.

_**[So please, chip in right now to help me raise a million dollars today. It’s the only way we’ll ensure we have the resources to turn out our voters. clean_body: Are you even reading this? | | | = | | Look, Derek, I know raising $1,000,000 in a day is a tall order for any grassroots team, but after my last email flopped, I asked my team if anyone even reads these emails. If folks are reading this, they’ll know that I’m running against Glenn Youngkin, a right-wing culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump eight times — and even endorsed Trump for President in 2024! They’ll also know that The Cook Political Report recently downgraded the Virginia Governor’s race from “leans Democrat” to “toss-up.” Not to mention, experts from POLITICO to The Washington Post are saying Democrats aren’t enthusiastic right now — that they’re ready to just let Trump’s handpicked candidate win. Look, Virginia fought tooth-and-nail to defeat Donald Trump, but with all that progress in jeopardy, and only 2 days left in this race, we have to drive this thing home with everything we’ve got. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s do this! Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

| | I know me and my team have sent you a lot of emails this week.

But I just checked in with them and I knew I had to reach out immediately.

_They told me I only need[**1 more gift**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38167590/314221105/1129282168?refcode=20211031_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjRiOTA2ZS04YjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QA0XHJBe0KTUxixWGhzWzSz86ibZcYHuffaKtYpyiXM=) from 18326 to hit my October Goal!_

[**_I’m going to explain why your support is so important but, if you’re in a rush, will you please chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38167591/314221106/1129282168?refcode=20211031_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjRiOTA2ZS04YjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QA0XHJBe0KTUxixWGhzWzSz86ibZcYHuffaKtYpyiXM=)

Unlike a lot of people who run for office, I know what it’s like to grow up in poverty.

I understand the tough choices everyday Americans face.

Whether to pay for groceries or life-saving prescriptions.

Whether to pay rent or cover the cost of daycare for your kids.

So I was outraged when my Republican Congressman, Don Bacon, voted to cut taxes for billionaires and corporations, instead of lending a hand to hardworking families.

name: Susan Daggett Bennet
subject: A personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38167714/314221237/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTRiOTA2ZS04YjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0RVf7XmZOUuAMr-eBK-l2qNj_XvOBDokZXAifn9Bek=)
Hey there, folks, As Michael’s wife, I get to see his dedication to our state first hand. It’s clear that Colorado’s future guides his every trip through our state, every meeting, and every negotiation. Michael is focused on serving Coloradans, which doesn’t leave much time for fundraising. Michael’s team says they’re $8,347 short of where they need to be this month, so he’s counting on you. Grassroots donations are particularly critical to Michael’s re-election campaign because he prioritizes your voice, folks, and doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. By putting Coloradans first, Michael helped expand the Child Tax Credit, which has helped one million Colorado kids and kept more than three million kids out of poverty nationwide. Now, he’s fighting to extend it for years to come. By listening to Coloradans, he fought to roll back Trump policies that hurt our state’s environment and left Tribal communities out of critical conversations regarding the public lands they find sacred. All this and more makes Michael a top target for the National GOP, so falling short of this month’s goal is not an option. I’m proud of what Michael has achieved so far this year. I can’t wait to see what he gets done next and, upon re-election, how he’ll build on his years of service to our state. clean_body: | = Hey there, folks, As Michael’s wife, I get to see his dedication to our state first hand. It’s clear that Colorado’s future guides his every trip through our state, every meeting, and every negotiation. Michael is focused on serving Coloradans, which doesn’t leave much time for fundraising. Michael’s team says they’re $8,347 short of where they need to be this month, so he’s counting on you. Grassroots donations are particularly critical to Michael’s re-election campaign because he prioritizes your voice, folks, and doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. By putting Coloradans first, Michael helped expand the Child Tax Credit, which has helped one million Colorado kids and kept more than three million kids out of poverty nationwide. Now, he’s fighting to extend it for years to come. By listening to Coloradans, he fought to roll back Trump policies that hurt our state’s environment and left Tribal communities out of critical conversations regarding the public lands they find sacred. All this and more makes Michael a top target for the National GOP, so falling short of this month’s goal is not an option. I’m proud of what Michael has achieved so far this year. I can’t wait to see what he gets done next and, upon re-election, how he’ll build on his years of service to our state. But we can’t get there without your support before tonight's deadline. Contribute to the $8,347 Michael needs before tonight’s deadline and pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — today. Vaccines. Vaccine cards. Forced mandates. I don’t know about you, but I’m nervous about the future of our country. In the few months that Joe Biden has been President, he has wreaked havoc on our country by causing businesses to shut down due to lack of employees. There has also been a mass exodus of nurses and doctors who have LEFT their jobs because of vaccine mandates. If we aren’t vigilant, Biden will continue the course and expand his vaccine mandates to force EVERYONE to get vaccinated. This is why Patriot, I need your help in my fight against the government overreach of forced vaccines. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

A $3 donation.
That’s what I’m asking of you ahead of our deadline at midnight tonight.
I know $3 might not seem like much. But when you chip in $3 — and the next person reading this email chips in $5, and the next person chips in $50, and so on — we get closer and closer to hitting our goal.
That’s how we build a coalition of working people that’s bigger and more diverse than anything Pennsylvania’s ever seen.
Working people from across the Commonwealth pitching in a few bucks at a time. And I wouldn’t have it any other way.
[So, I hope I can count on you to make that $3 donation today. name: TRIPLE MATCH ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: BEGGING you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **12-HOUR DEADLINE: TRIPLE MATCH UNLOCKED****** | | | | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
---
| | [TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT TO DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY!](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/P4raFv4RAbf_)[Democratic heroes like Stacey Abrams are fighting to protect our voting rights every day.But Trump's House Republicans are working overtime to **ATTACK** our democracy.That's why we must join Stacey in this fight and defend our House Majority with everything we've got.Please: **Will you chip in $3 before our End of Month Deadline to elect House Democrats nationwide? **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_) [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)
---

We'll cut straight to the chase:

**We are just 12 hours away from our most important deadline yet -- _but we 're still $80,000 short of our must-hit goal!_**
****
So before time runs out, we're rushing to you with an urgent request straight from Democratic HQ: **[Can you chip in $3 to defend our House Majority and close our budget gap before it's too late? Generous Democrats will even TRIPLE MATCH your gift for these final 12 hours before our End of Month Deadline!](https://links.e.dccc.)**

[OCTOBER TRIPLE MATCH CONTRIBUTION: PENDING](https://links.e.dccc.)[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf49m~)
[SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFaGZLVS~)
---

Democratic heroes like Stacey have been leading the charge to protect voting rights in the face of ruthless Republican attacks.

And Stacey knows our Democratic House Majority is a crucial line of defense stopping Republicans from attacking our democracy on a national scale.

But we can't hope to defend our House Democrats if we fail to meet our crucial End of Month goal in just 12 hours.

[**So please: Will you join Stacey in the fight and chip in $3 to elect pro-voting rights House Democrats all across the country? This is so important, all-star Democrats will TRIPLE MATCH your gift >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFaGZLVS~~)

**TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVATED: 12-HOUR END OF MONTH DEADLINE**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Triple match your $1 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Triple match your $35 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4W~)
---
| [**Triple match your $50 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
---
| [**Triple match your $100 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Triple match your $250 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX_)
---
| [**Or triple match another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

DCCC

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45865645&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzM4MjIyOQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $26. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45865645&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMzM4MjIyOQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Friends —
On Friday, James Carville reached out personally because he knows that if we fall short of this goal, it’s going to make defending our Senate majority and keeping Mitch McConnell out of power nearly impossible.
Then yesterday, we reached out again about our October fundraising deadline and how important hitting this goal is.
And this morning, we reached out again because we’re still short of our goal and the deadline is in just a few hours!
We keep emailing because we must protect vulnerable incumbents like Raphael Warnock, flip open GOP-held seats in states like North Carolina, and defeat Republican incumbents like Marco Rubio in 2022.
**Our deadline is in just a few hours, and your last-minute support could give us the edge we need to hit our goal and defend the majority next year. Which is why we have to ask:**
[_**Will you chip in $10 today to help defend our Democratic Senate majority and keep Mitch McConnell out of power? Losing even one seat means losing our Senate majority so we can’t afford to fall short now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168010/314222751/-1150682652?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211031_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzM3OTM4NC04ZDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V4TKJMnym5tX0-eVlTkv-wnEeQGehRmduEXqCz4q6fo=)
