body:
– | Hey folks — First things first, Happy Halloween! I hope you’re having a safe and fun weekend. Yesterday morning, my wife, Dena, decided she had a challenge for me: She said that she could raise more money in 12 hours yesterday than I can today — before midnight tonight. Now, I promised not to skew the results by letting you know how Dena’s fundraising push ended (we’ll be sure to announce the winner next month though!), but I _can_ say that chipping in right now will help Team Cranley hit this month’s online fundraising goal. What do you say, can you help me win this bet with Dena? Use MY link to give $5, $15, or whatever works for you BEFORE MIDNIGHT: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JohnChallenge?refcode=BeatDena](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168281/314223941/2144274507?amount=15&refcode=ea.1fe2f258-8e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.1fe2f258-8e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmUyZjI1OC04ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwI3FL5zl-IGaAIa9wQnJq78hVAilYwnbChrkc27tLs=)_** This isn’t just about bragging rights in the Cranley household, friend. This is about building a grassroots movement to flip Ohio blue — and we couldn’t do it without you. But if we fall short of our fundraising target today, we’ll have to cut back our plans for campaigning in November. That’s something we CAN’T afford to do. Will you give me a hand in hitting our goal and beating Dena at the same time? Here’s that link one more time: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JohnChallenge?refcode=BeatDena](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168282/314223942/2144274507?amount=15&refcode=ea.1fe2f258-8e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.1fe2f258-8e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmUyZjI1OC04ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwI3FL5zl-IGaAIa9wQnJq78hVAilYwnbChrkc27tLs=)_** I appreciate it, John
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168283/314223943/2144274507?amount=15&refcode=ea.1fe2f258-8e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.1fe2f258-8e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmUyZjI1OC04ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwI3FL5zl-IGaAIa9wQnJq78hVAilYwnbChrkc27tLs=)**

It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Rick Larsen
subject: little superheroes 🦸 and spooky monsters 👻
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168334/314224217/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjc4ZjdlYy04ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1okrFFf2gOEoXeXFF2Flag3L_NH00qKhgvUP-x16WBI=&emci=27b01175-5e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c678f7ec-8e3a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Oh sure, it is easy enough to write an email comparing some Republican to a ghoul or another to a vampire.** I will leave that to other folks. Because you know what? **When I think of Halloween, I do not think of monsters—I think of children and families;** of parents taking their kids out in the twilight, of bright-eyed smiles, of hopefulness and excitement as we meet our neighbors for a fun celebration of community. **That is the kind of America I dream of for our children** , one where kids can focus on being kids, on learning and growing. And not one where hunger, or fear, or uncertainty push their dreams out of reach, bit by bit._Every day._ ... and not just on Halloween. _Every day_. Here are just a few examples:
* **Child poverty** is an unthinkable and very real problem across America. In the last year, we have slashed it in half—and we will make a down payment on continuing that progress in the year ahead.

* Our Build Back Better agenda is at its heart about **taking care of children**. We are making child care affordable. And we are making sure that every three- and four-year old can attend preschool for free.

* I love Halloween candy as much as anyone, but our Build Back Better plan ensures that **more kids get healthy nutrition all year round**. 8.7 million children will get free school meals—and the families of 29 million children will receive food assistance during the summer.

And of course, our critical investments to take on climate change, make health care affordable, expand opportunity, are all about building a brighter future for our kids. The list goes on. Because so much is on the line right now. **All of this and more is on my mind this Halloween, because I just want to be able to live in an America where every child has reason to smile—and not just because they have a bucket full of candy.** Happy Halloween. clean_body: | | | Oh sure, it is easy enough to write an email comparing some Republican to a ghoul or another to a vampire. I will leave that to other folks. Because you know what? When I think of Halloween, I do not think of monsters—I think of children and families; of parents taking their kids out in the twilight, of bright-eyed smiles, of hopefulness and excitement as we meet our neighbors for a fun celebration of community. That is the kind of America I dream of for our children , one where kids can focus on being kids, on learning and growing. And not one where hunger, or fear, or uncertainty push their dreams out of reach, bit by bit.Every day. ... and not just on Halloween. Every day. Here are just a few examples: Child poverty is an unthinkable and very real problem across America. In the last year, we have slashed it in half—and we will make a down payment on continuing that progress in the year ahead. Our Build Back Better agenda is at its heart about taking care of children. We are making child care affordable. And we are making sure that every three- and four-year old can attend preschool for free. I love Halloween candy as much as anyone, but our Build Back Better plan ensures that more kids get healthy nutrition all year round. 8.7 million children will get free school meals—and the families of 29 million children will receive food assistance during the summer. And of course, our critical investments to take on climate change, make health care affordable, expand opportunity, are all about building a brighter future for our kids. The list goes on. Because so much is on the line right now. All of this and more is on my mind this Halloween, because I just want to be able to live in an America where every child has reason to smile—and not just because they have a bucket full of candy. Happy Halloween. body:
See you soon! See you soon!

|
| | |
**Your confirmation for dinner with President Trump is included below.**

Get ready to have a great time with 45!

_**[You have been selected out of thousands of other Trump loving supporters to enter to win an evening with President Trump!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654476:6ZclGf20N:m:1:3253819041:011BB6F39088E9286DEB81A6CDD00F7D:r "You have been

Dinner with President Trump in Tampa, Florida | Date| Monday, Nov 8th, 2021
---|---

This is your confirmation email for your booking on Monday, Nov 8th in Tampa, Florida.
**[Add this confirmation to your calendar.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654476:6ZclGf20N:m:1:3253819041:011BB6F39088E9286DEB81A6CDD00F7D:r "Add this confirmation to your calendar. ")**

| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654477:6ZclGf20N:m:1:3253819041:011BB6F39088E9286DEB81A6CDD00F7D:r "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654477:6ZclGf20N:m:1:3253819041:011BB6F39088E9286DEB81A6CDD00F7D:r "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

The Promotion begins on Monday, September 20, 2021, at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, October 31st, at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, October 31st. One winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Tampa, FL hotels, with an approximate retail value of $275; two (2) tickets to the Countdown to the Majority Dinner, with an approximate retail value of $150 per ticket ($300 total); and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $1,375. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Dear Friend, Are you kidding me? Day 8 kicked off with a massive crowd in Old Town Alexandria at 8 AM. Everywhere I go it is clear that Virginians are ready to join our movement to elect a new kind of leader _in just 2 days! _I cannot wait to see what the final days of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour and this campaign have in store. Let's go, Virginia!
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/MWDCzRBzy12W4418Q85qvqghW2K0rfL4zkLJ2N3pwdDB3lSbNV1-WJV7CgZjBW3QRFLP14drm7W6vTGX24Ggpt6W7y9xys4CBg5ZVBKnMk7Wm0pxW3TYCbj5Y4CvcW2j6wCz63mbv2N6k-ZB6_rcYvW3Wk2Tr1C6PBfW2F8vCf5rQFPqW4k_m0p8mGs0YW7jY67S3CM-h1N7yPwnqkDMxNW7YJZpC4j75M0W3gbSws8Bvh08W4BM8cc1yrppqW8ypdTn25SqznW8bG5196KdYznW51K1jN1RnQ59VVCzh27DyqY_W2PYHhh1zPqvGW5CwW3h2Ck1mQW4kFDTt8ZGPK533gr1)
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
I am so honored to be a part of this movement that is fueled by you! Between our stops in Alexandria, Chantilly, Fredericksburg, and West Springfield, it clear that people across the Commonwealth are ready for change.
---
---
Day 8 ended in Fairfax County and the crowd came out in full force! On Tuesday, November 2nd, we are going to elect a new kind of leader and make a statement around the world. I cannot wait to get to work for you as your next Governor!
---
Today is the second to last day of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour and I am not slowing down! We are making stops in Norton, Abingdon, Gate City, and Jonesville. Come on out and find one of the few empty spots on the bus for your signature! I can't wait to see you there. For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---
---

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: We rely on support from people like you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Yesterday, Kate announced our goal to raise $20,000 in grassroots gifts
before midnight tonight to hit our October fundraising projections.

Powered by People is doing the work now to make the changes we want to see
in Texas, but we rely on support from grassroots donors — like you — to
fund our organizing. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160630&t=1001&akid=160630%2E444211%2E2g9n7X ]Please, will you chip in $3 or more
to help reach our must-hit $20,000 fundraising goal before midnight?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160630&amount=3&t=1020&akid=160630%2E444211%2E2g9n7X ]Contribute $3

Since 2019, Powered by People has served as a necessary check against
Texas Republicans' undemocratic power grabs. This year, we're planning
ahead to turn out record-breaking numbers of Texas voters in 2022 and
beyond. Here's exactly where your
first
$3 contribution will go:

* Organizing all over Texas: For far too many years, politicians have
shrugged off some areas as too Republican or places where it's
impossible to get people to the polls. Powered by People believes in
investing everywhere — it's why Beto and our volunteers have been
canvassing and phone banking in places like Laredo all year.

* Fighting back against Governor Abbott and the Texas GOP's voter
suppression scheme: For months, Powered by People has been rallying
against the chorus of Republican voter suppression bills introduced in
the state legislature. Now, we're working to make sure SB 1 doesn't go
into effect by calling for federal legislation to protect our voting
rights.

* Registering hundreds of thousands of new Texas voters: We know the key
to electing leaders who care about the issues important to Texans is
voter engagement. So, Powered by People volunteers are registering new
voters wherever they are – college campuses, community events, even
their own doorsteps.

Every
$3 contribution from people like you goes directly to
forging a more inclusive democracy. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160630&t=1021&akid=160630%2E444211%2E2g9n7X ]If you can, please chip in today
to help grow our movement. Together we will hit our $20,000 goal and make
real change in Texas.

Thank you,

Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48167?refcode=ema20211031-160630&t=1022&akid=160630%2E444211%2E2g9n7X ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=160630%2E444211%2E2g9n7X

clean_body: [1]Powered By People Yesterday, Kate announced our goal to raise $20,000 in grassroots gifts before midnight tonight to hit our October fundraising projections. Powered by People is doing the work now to make the changes we want to see in Texas, but we rely on support from grassroots donors — like you — to fund our organizing. [ ]Please, will you chip in $3 or more to help reach our must-hit $20,000 fundraising goal before midnight? [ ]Contribute $3 Since 2019, Powered by People has served as a necessary check against Texas Republicans' undemocratic power grabs. This year, we're planning ahead to turn out record-breaking numbers of Texas voters in 2022 and beyond. Here's exactly where your first $3 contribution will go: Organizing all over Texas: For far too many years, politicians have shrugged off some areas as too Republican or places where it's impossible to get people to the polls. Powered by People believes in investing everywhere — it's why Beto and our volunteers have been canvassing and phone banking in places like Laredo all year. Fighting back against Governor Abbott and the Texas GOP's voter suppression scheme: For months, Powered by People has been rallying against the chorus of Republican voter suppression bills introduced in the state legislature. Now, we're working to make sure SB 1 doesn't go into effect by calling for federal legislation to protect our voting rights. * Registering hundreds of thousands of new Texas voters: We know the key to electing leaders who care about the issues important to Texans is voter engagement. So, Powered by People volunteers are registering new voters wherever they are – college campuses, community events, even their own doorsteps. Every $3 contribution from people like you goes directly to forging a more inclusive democracy. [ ]If you can, please chip in today to help grow our movement. Together we will hit our $20,000 goal and make real change in Texas. Thank you, Powered by People [ ]Donate »

name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c445%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=30fu%2bX5bMSqWf7tbqJEkvA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67628%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uaYjaXG7qNWaQj7pG%2fWmZw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67629%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vRgeSsjgRPQ7VzSaRKhrFQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67620%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fs6IqGilvSWJ%2fi1OJnFg8g&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c445%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=30fu%2bX5bMSqWf7tbqJEkvA&sysid=1)_

Friend,

I just came out of a meeting with my fundraising team, and they told me some bad news - we aren’t on pace to hit our final fundraising goal. _If we don’t meet this deadline, we will have to say Terry McAuliffe won, and Election Day Victory is not looking promising._

Once the clock hits midnight tonight, we’ll have to start making some tough decisions.

_**I need you to dig deep in these last couple of hours. We are SO CLOSE, and I believe we can still pull this off, but I need your help.**_

**[Will you click this direct link to rush a donation to help our campaign get over the finish line?](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zosob79ji60glailukj4djik79oq4k1u0hk3t8e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cti6ao74clh2bs)**

**We’re so close to the finish line. I just need one final push to come out victorious. We are so close to turning Virginia Red, creating jobs, and standing up for families, students, and parents.**

I’m making this one final request, and I hope you won’t let me down.

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: FWD: Friend, Help Me Put Ohio First.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJyNkM1uhCAUhZ8Gdxj5GdCFi86o6Qv0Z0cYQKUVNYidzNsXHdtFV03ITfjuvefkHl2ya6FZYkucYYQyghCnlLIUpXlWM3qpad3UVXE5N4BmLv2wzptRKmVTNbmkLxE12YlfZYZUoSglPKeSYURZhhlqCUuGsg9hXgB5AriJbzFq9Sa92dEbvYlEdkjCdvKwm76MHycfsZOfBk69nWDnjQxQdtKOgDRrcMIZbVcHSGWctAPAbIPLtHplIhzVIKSbB9vej5aKX2m7uF49LsUFjCUX7U0Lb5SdrRlDa_0SRG-GORqIeQ1isxc7_hGaxhAnHybQP79r_6LeXnlsi3GwOjb-wGWHSOWEngoNMdMSUo5OUPKWwrbgjGFTKIZI4ks93-ww2IXxmHe33bYHfRxTAn4GGK9rlMR4zxT_R3gbxpdYw302v5uHaHpEiAGvvgHvVKPw)

Friend To put Ohio First, we need the help of Buckeyes just like you. But before I ask for your money, let me tell you _**how**_ your donation will be used. Team Renacci is traveling across the state and talking to Ohioans just like you. I hear your frustrations about DeWine letting hundreds of refugees into Ohio. I see the fear in your eyes over schools forcing kids to wear masks and then brainwashing them with critical race theory. I feel your anger when it comes to vaccine mandates. I know that you worry about job security in a state with a crumbling economy. The first step to reversing course is firing DeWine. Please consider donating today and help us meet our end of the month deadline.
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJyNkMFuhCAQhp8GbxhBBD142F31DdoroTAqrahB7Gbfvri1PfTUhEzCNzP_n_lNzd8qwxNb04wSkuWECMYYT0laZi1nt5a1XdtUt2uHWObSd-s8zEprm-rFJWNc00xpQoAzkZVcZAxMVWhOVZ-XRa-SqR5DWDeUXxDt4ttA7x7Su509mEMkslMS94vHw_IJfl58xE59AF5Gu-DBgwpYDcrOKO_24KQDY3eH8gacshOi_IDbsnsNEc56ksqtk-0fZ0vHr7JDXG--L6UVjqWU_d1ID9quFubQW78FOcK0RgO57kEe9vKJf4SWOcTJbxP8wl9LPRh_OXzkPFkTG3_g9oRElzkrKoMpNwozQQqsRM9wXwnOKVSakzzxtVnvdprsxkXMezhuewZ9HlMjcUWU7nuUpPSZKf2P8DFMb7GGxwq_m6doekZIkWi-ACudpJk)
---
| | I know times have been hard ever since DeWine’s draconian lockdowns. So, if now isn’t a good time to donate, would you consider volunteering? Team Renacci is growing, and with patriots like you, we can make Ohio Great Again. A Renacci Administration will make your rights priority number one, spend your tax dollars wisely, and put parents back in control of their children’s education. If you're ready to build a better party and put Ohio first, then please consider donating or volunteering today. Thank you, Jim Renacci Candidate for Governor of Ohio
---
| | Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
---

I need your help during this time

Hello friends,

We still have a few hours to go to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, and I wanted to send a note asking you to chip in one last time.

**We need just $427 to reach our October goal.** This is a crucial moment in our campaign, and our ability to keep our momentum going all comes down to grassroots donors like you, chipping in $10 here or $25 there. You can contribute using the link below: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/to-em-oct21?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168756/314226738/1053376810?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.31_b2_TOH_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE4YTIzYi05NDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxnXxJX0NiA6F1O46JnS9VXs_rnoU7jKusTb_kHzfPI=)

Dark money groups are already spending money to try to defeat us and win in Arizona. But we have something they don’t, friend: Grassroots supporters like you who want to make a difference and keep this seat blue.

I am proud to represent Arizona and I am so grateful for your support, friend. Thank you for stepping up when we need you most.

\-- Tom O’Halleran

name: Chelsea's Android
subject: Let's spook LaRose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
I’m taking a moment this Halloween to check-in with all of you.

Hi friends,

I’m sitting here between rounds of trick-or-treaters and wanted to take a moment to reach out and check in as the month comes to an end tonight.

With all of the rush of the campaign, it’s not often enough that I get to sit back with some quiet time and connect with you directly. I love putting in the work, but that’s not to say it’s easy. When it comes to meeting fundraising goals and deadlines, it can be a bit overwhelming at times. But I’m always grounded by two things: my family and my team.

Y'all constantly remind me why I’m doing this.

I would love to end tonight by meeting our goal in these last few hours. **[Would you take a moment to chip in as this month comes to an end? Even just $3 gets us closer.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168812/314227803/-939985431?refcode=EM_FR_211031eomfinal_EOM_AND_90D_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTNhZDBlOC05NTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dx6iHkfeoxjur4wX6lXmTW7xH5fZVYneBT8nh_5iv-g=)**

I can’t think of a better Halloween trick than Republicans waking up tomorrow to find out that we met our goal tonight.

Before the next round of families comes, let me talk to you as a parent. I want to be your next Secretary of State. I want to think about and work on protecting democracy every single day. You shouldn’t have to. You should be able to go trick or treating with your kids and know that everything is fine. I’m not running to give you gerrymandering and partisan talking points. I’m running to give you peace of mind.

**These past few years have been a test of our resilience nationwide. It’s time to start the repairs, and I’m ready to rebuild democracy in Ohio.**

**[So let’s do better than get back to normal. Can you donate $3 or more to help our cause? Reaching our goal tonight is the best way to catch Republicans by surprise and start the new month off right.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168813/314227804/-939985431?refcode=EM_FR_211031eomfinal_EOM_AND_90D_6_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTNhZDBlOC05NTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dx6iHkfeoxjur4wX6lXmTW7xH5fZVYneBT8nh_5iv-g=)**

Have fun with your family and stay safe tonight,

Chelsea

_Sent from my Samsung Galaxy smartphone_ | | Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202

Supporters, I know you’re probably getting ready to take the kids out for a fun evening, but I have one quick ask: [**Will you chip in $5 to help us hit our final fundraising goal for October?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38168839/314227833/-2555579?refcode=EM_FR_211031EOM_EOM_TE_90D_4_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzNhZDBlOC05NTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DD6yy5vMSyN-f46G3yogxzDjI_sYzrAgZ0iyKwD2D5I=) We’re down to the final hours of October, and we need just one more push to help us get past our final goal for the month. clean_body: We can’t miss this. | Peter, I didn’t want to have to reach out on a Sunday, but this is urgent. The end-of-month deadline is at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT, and we still need to raise $9,370 to hit our fundraising goal. After Pelosi’s DCCC smashed fundraising records last quarter, we can’t miss our benchmark and fall behind on our budget in this MUST-WIN race. Every last dollar counts. I hope you’ll stand with me and power our campaign to victory once again. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Thu, Oct 28, 2021 Subject: I need you, Peter. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Almost a year ago, the mainstream media had completely counted us out. A poll had us losing by 7 points, and the Cook Political Report even labeled my race as “Likely Democratic.” But they didn’t account for my army of grassroots supporters, and on election night, you stunned Nancy Pelosi by powering us to victory. Now, with the end-of-month deadline just days away, I need you to step up and power us to another victory by CRUSHING our crucial October fundraising goal. While we were victorious last November, it came down to the wire. When it was all said and done, we won with just 51.4% of the vote. With a margin that small, it’s critical that we hit this goal and stay on budget, Peter. It could be the difference between victory and defeat. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Team AOC
subject: We need three people from your community

body:
With three potential opponents already eyeing Alexandria’s seat — posting a strong fundraising report would send a powerful message that our movement is stronger than ever.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211031-2622-header&t=1&akid=2622%2E2526796%2Etlc5FL)
We’re down to the wire. At midnight tonight, we’ll tally our numbers to see if we hit our goal of matching the $174,249 Republicans have already raised against Alexandria and our movement this year.
**We’re so close to our target and based on our math, if three people in your area contribute right now, we’ll hit this goal in minutes.** We know not everyone reading this will be able to contribute — and that’s okay! But, if you’re able, it will make a huge difference in whether or not we reach this goal.
[Will you be one of the three people we need from the your area to make a contribution right now to get us to our goal before midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-1?refcode=em20211031-2622-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2622_2526796_tlc5FL&akid=2622%2E2526796%2Etlc5FL)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-1?refcode=em20211031-2622-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2622_2526796_tlc5FL&akid=2622%2E2526796%2Etlc5FL)**
Last year, corporate PACs, lobbyists, and right-wing media helped funnel over $10 million dollars to our opponent — which he used to buy advertisements and distribute over 700,000 fliers spreading lies and misinformation about our movement across the district. And, we know this upcoming race has the potential to be even more expensive.
That’s why it’s so important that grassroots campaigns like ours hit every single fundraising goal. Online contributions to emails like this one really matter to our campaign — and when we set these goals, they’re not just made-up tactics. We need to hit these specific targets in order to run a strong campaign and make all our critical organizing investments in the months to come. That’s why we’re asking for your help before the deadline.
[We can’t hit this goal tonight without you. Will you be one of the three people we’re counting on from the your area to make a contribution before our deadline tonight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211031-1?refcode=em20211031-2622-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2622_2526796_tlc5FL&akid=2622%2E2526796%2Etlc5FL)
Thank you so much,
Team AOC

#

**GREAT NEWS:** When we set our goal to reach 75,000 donations in October, we weren’t sure if we had a realistic chance to get there. It was such an ambitious goal, but one we felt we had to try while facing all these attack ads.
Now it looks like we have a chance to get there. Just look at our progress!

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211031-2-15&t=2&refcode2=1596_6688874_8ZyQZn&akid=1596%2E6688874%2E8ZyQZn)

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Just getting started + 1/6 Committee Digest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future First Leadership PAC
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=1)
---
Friend --

I want to make one thing 100% clear:

I'm not going anywhere! While I may not be seeking re-election to the House of Representatives, this isn't resignation, concession, or giving up. This isn't a win for Donald Trump, no matter what his Mar-a-Lago spin machine says. I still have more than one year of my term to serve and will continue to be a forceful voice -- including on the 1/6 Committee.

Even better, my team can now focus its time and resources to dramatically scale Country First, rather than an all-consuming race for a single seat in a large house. This allows us to make a much bigger difference and impact. It's just the beginning of my political future, not the end.

Yesterday, I launched a brand new video that shares exactly why the Country First movement is so needed RIGHT NOW. It's on the front page of [country1st.com](https://www.country1st.com?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=2), and I hope you'll watch and share with your family, friends, colleagues, and anyone else who cares more about our country than their tribe. [](https://www.country1st.com/now_is_the_time_for_choosing?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=3) | [](https://www.country1st.com/now_is_the_time_for_choosing?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=4 "Watch: Now is the Time for Choosing") [Watch: Now is the Time for Choosing](https://www.country1st.com/now_is_the_time_for_choosing?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=4)
---
I still need and appreciate your support -- thank you for being part of this movement!

Country First,

Adam
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest
Country First is proud to launch The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap on the its work to make sure you’re up to date.
### In Case You Missed It:
* Rep. Kinzinger on CNN [speaking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYZ9uxYzDkyC8abnzT4wjyp&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=5) about the resolution to hold Steve Bannon in Contempt of Congress.
* Rep. Kinzinger [speaking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYXzvRe6xKDBnPpCGmo5O_O&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=6) on the floor of the House of Representatives prior to voting to hold Steve Bannon in Contempt of Congress
* Rep. Kinzinger on MSNBC [discussing](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb7SfWmRTyAHyDjRdIJeEGn&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=7) the work of the January 6th Select Committee.

Here are the major developments from this past week:

### House of Representatives Votes to Hold Steve Bannon in Contempt of Congress
The House [voted](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHk783nxqJw-GhYz26kB-bBgV16oiZUkHRwS_ynDzXkRbJkOCfVEFcFnfJIowxCV8zprn-bd3WEnTQNhZwk-qO2YXLVeDlXEhvOFDb6ioULnq&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=8) last Thursday to hold former Trump advisor Steve Bannon in Contempt of Congress after he failed to comply with a subpoena from the January 6th Select Committee. The final vote was 229-202, with nine Republican members standing up to defend the rule of law: Reps. Adam Kinzinger, Liz Cheney, Brian Fitzpatrick, Anthony Gonzalez (OH), Jamie Herrera Buetler, John Katko, Nancy Mace, Peter Meijer, and Frank Upton. Rep. Greg Pence, brother of the former Vice President, did not vote.

"Mr. Bannon’s willful disregard for the Select Committee’s subpoena demonstrates his utter contempt for the American people’s right to know how the attacks on January 6 came about,” [said Rep. Kinzinger](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYXzvRe6xKDBnPpCGmo5O_O&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=9) in a speech prior to the vote. "He has advanced a ludicrous legal argument in support of his decision not to cooperate or comply—a decision that defies the rule of law and rejects the will of the American people."

"Mr. Bannon's own public statements make clear he knew what was going to happen before it did, and thus he must have been aware of and may well have been involved in the planning of everything that played out on that day," said Rep. Cheney, Vice Chair of the January 6th Select Committee, in a speech on the House floor. "The American people deserve to know what he knew and what he did."

The bipartisan vote resulted in a referral being sent to the Department of Justice to prosecute Mr. Bannon. If convicted, he could face up to 1 year in prison and a fine of up to $100,000.

### January 6th Attack Organizers Allegedly Met with Members of Congress and White House Staff
Two people who organized the January 6th attack claimed to have had dozens of planning meetings with Members of Congress and White House Staff, according to [Rolling Stone](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=QZRPSKM9y6z5lCx4Xi6o32c6_JqcjvlD4dgMfRVCrb_C2T_scVOlH1dtcJMLj-ldEZamZNZ7jETvgIC8N8pNgv6cKAU1WXx8KPTNXWdVD41LDPF5YwmASk5FxCl_KQM64R2AgRs5He5-2vfQijOddfRW-EIKrG-9YnEzJ_FRvUQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=10). The two sources have been in communication with congressional investigators and named former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows among those they met with prior to the “Stop the Steal” rally. In addition, they claimed that members of Congress who took part in planning meetings or who were represented by senior staff members [include](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=As1eDYFfrpini3XkkXVkll38Ng9G74U89welRFRng9YvtyNf2-t-iFHgOrtzYX5OF3xCJNKBXMpm48atTnUnOF4mVuyy9if-8U4MLqYPDO2ZoroJOkr0658rmO4EMtAYz6o4fd7vaQuhiaS3FIM9BgVEH-x1nPTUWbhmFQtoSaQmzIGZ3QN-_yxAr0TAxn19p1uPEhvljOgGrbKrB0kDCWWy9srGUaM4vUjbs1npVZZ1v9TrC81_m2Gs1YCjHuirDwWhxyEloli38pReiojthe56jt0eFqNDHttCCdw89d8-skkoT2o6XFq9VWM5g7hs4c4rRXhKWqRRSit_S4a9zNVktrw6A-EN_wsAjgFiFnqmrGuG2TpIf0MLi9cdp2knHxB0WjlM4YsjuJhZHDMBBWqBsEk-f7WqBkWOO4P36ggrAoQLTUSdX93l3N8QexEIrgiMOrS3ZfYSav7tlAlGzA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=11) Reps. Andy Biggs, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Paul Gosar, and Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Both sources claim that [Rep. Gosar offered a “blanket pardon”](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=JNO4c-GH-KGwAqGopQLVlmFfAPW_my3o6_35WUiCW3EXtbrDc6q22UeNOfne4qyJj1T3ybLRfQ4aQIclu-gttDqEdOR2H8sNuqDCt76tCs-HOWt2CSZetc32lAm93_hNdk6y2O-N6i2iQZqb8Ow4rQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=12) for an ongoing unrelated investigation, encouraging the planning meetings for January 6th to continue. One source mentioned the pardon being discussed in the Oval Office and the possibility of getting support from the House Freedom Caucus.

The two sources [said](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=As1eDYFfrpini3XkkXVkll38Ng9G74U89welRFRng9YvtyNf2-t-iFHgOrtzYX5OF3xCJNKBXMpm48atTnUnOF4mVuyy9if-8U4MLqYPDO2ZoroJOkr0658rmO4EMtAYz6o4fd7vaQuhiaS3FIM9BgVEH-x1nPTUWbhmFQtoSaQmzIGZ3QN-_yxAr0TAxn19p1uPEhvljOgGrbKrB0kDCWWy9srGUaM4vUjbs1npVZZ1v9TrC81_m2Gs1YCjHuirDwWhxyEloli38pReiojthe56jt0eFqNDHttCCdw89d8-skkoT2o6XFq9VWM5g7hs4c4rRXhKWqRRSit_S4a9zNVktrw6A-EN_wsAjgFiFnqmrGuG2TpIf0MLi9cdp2knHxB0WjlM4YsjuJhZHDMBBWqBsEk-f7WqBkWOO4P36ggrAoQLTUSdX93l3N8QexEIrgiMOrS3ZfYSav7tlAlGzA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=13) they came forward because they believe the January 6th Select Committee is “all we got as far as being able to uncover the truth about what happened at the Capitol that day.” Both still doubt the legitimacy of the election, but name Trump as one of the “bad actors [who] set out to cause chaos.”

Reps. Boebert, Brooks, Gohmert, and Greene have denied participating in planning the attack on the Capitol.

### Other news that may be of interest:
* The White House [denied](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvDz6b53PGcJYRJ-zGIM7ZqcsLssuFejOVCP3qHXG9wHoX75yX5eWX3ANT1Aa6Q1Qmkr4oLGG0P_5Ti03TP-fbaE&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=14) Trump’s request to invoke executive privilege.
* John Eastman, the lawyer who authored a legal strategy for Trump to overturn the results of the 2020 election on January 6, may soon be [subpoenaed](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvDoU31aLiS3EgmUxpTQDTvFVEqVvNcezW0bfqKqNOjmigoO1ZC-nACMarmHFJsRcFLha7vglG5_ygJYy60rRTWHhTHd1nEb973q2u_nmYUQx&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=15) by the January 6th Select Committee.
* The January 6th Select Committee continues to investigate the [command center](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_EfZ8Mldkl_4gn5tSVKNqcPqd2VJERq1oi6r2DQ5UPfX4vVEyDKZXrhdNyCkQNVWesBb0sDktDpoDHA_RjD3kBdwNZrZaMELf8otPU00pQN3cymMkwrXLArcTcgeBug0fPep6k1PAziwc8PMFpWQMPjr8OeER5y3-TpFQ00WIywf&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=16) at the Willard Hotel.
* At least five former White House staffers are [speaking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHjGuLvu8zkI9Qj4-Y8KjUNK4YS5tBHcxqE4Tv39ttERul1BP0sQL0UFav4gwD503CJyWeGP3zDUPuBRKS4LnMfA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_getting_started_nd&n=17) with the January 6th Select Committee.

_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- I want to make one thing 100% clear: I'm not going anywhere! While I may not be seeking re-election to the House of Representatives, this isn't resignation, concession, or giving up. This isn't a win for Donald Trump, no matter what his Mar-a-Lago spin machine says. I still have more than one year of my term to serve and will continue to be a forceful voice -- including on the 1/6 Committee. Even better, my team can now focus its time and resources to dramatically scale Country First, rather than an all-consuming race for a single seat in a large house. This allows us to make a much bigger difference and impact. It's just the beginning of my political future, not the end. Yesterday, I launched a brand new video that shares exactly why the Country First movement is so needed RIGHT NOW. It's on the front page of , and I hope you'll watch and share with your family, friends, colleagues, and anyone else who cares more about our country than their tribe. | "Watch: Now is the Time for Choosing" I still need and appreciate your support -- thank you for being part of this movement! Greg Pence, brother of the former Vice President, did not vote. "He has advanced a ludicrous legal argument in support of his decision not to cooperate or comply—a decision that defies the rule of law and rejects the will of the American people." "Mr. Bannon's own public statements make clear he knew what was going to happen before it did, and thus he must have been aware of and may well have been involved in the planning of everything that played out on that day," said Rep. Cheney, Vice Chair of the January 6th Select Committee, in a speech on the House floor. "The American people deserve to know what he knew and what he did." name: Sarah (Personal)
subject: you scared?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
Bryan and I are headed out the door soon with Scarlett, Huck, and George so they can get way too hyped up on candy. But before we do... Peter, Bryan and I are headed out the door soon with Scarlett, Huck, and George so they can get way too hyped up on candy. But before we do, I wanted to send you this quick note... I am running for governor because I believe everything we love about America is at stake – and with the radical left now in control of Washington – your governor is your last line of defense. **The radical left wants to impose government control and censorship from the top down. Their socialism and cancel culture will not unify or heal America – it will only further divide and destroy us. But I will not let them win!** **I am not scared of this fight at all. I am only scared of what will happen if we don't have the right leaders willing to take it on. We need leaders with the courage to do what’s right – not what’s politically correct or convenient.** I know I can be that person, because I've been doing it (and winning!) for the last several years. As governor, I will defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny, your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe, and your freedom of speech and religious liberty. Will you stand with me and make a donation to my campaign for governor today? $10, $25, $50, or more - any amount will help: [SarahForGovernor.com/Not-Scared](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=800685d596274160a99a46e802da365c&_e=tb1xrgESmKE0ZsjoSdKPIKzEhF-fExrrULh3_b2phxAF2CIyN7Ym0WL-u4C8RFkTdzeQXrB4cetFKleCFVmGoonL_NY60zKwT1nllaK7ocKc339eixfo3h3CswP_oRtbBeQ_dluAVd_tXrkPrXODSOFxlVFwiGuMGbeiPsflYtfm99SphcvZfMbDLwiMSFo5LnqshduLcj0pxDOhmZbm1GyE7gAqvbEO_c6R3F2Fd-KHI9Bo4RXr4PlMfalpla4sQrceIHcX_AOWsAGpsoOQtlQpIvtBjRmeQXbHPdlysRtEfz_AyiseRSL2YFfvn71AHLQvuch3ohggu3P1wwx7LHR28XPKgWQVm1sCiEqS5yznGe16qOSzSmALXaSEYbUpb0zJkGm69HNzNMcfOvDmTf7aCJM7KDsIHrq-4tPjA_c%3D) God bless, Sarah Huckabee Sanders Sent from my iPhone |

clean_body: Bryan and I are headed out the door soon with Scarlett, Huck, and George so they can get way too hyped up on candy. But before we do... Peter, Bryan and I are headed out the door soon with Scarlett, Huck, and George so they can get way too hyped up on candy. But before we do, I wanted to send you this quick note... I am running for governor because I believe everything we love about America is at stake – and with the radical left now in control of Washington – your governor is your last line of defense. The radical left wants to impose government control and censorship from the top down. Their socialism and cancel culture will not unify or heal America – it will only further divide and destroy us. But I will not let them win! I am not scared of this fight at all. I am only scared of what will happen if we don't have the right leaders willing to take it on. We need leaders with the courage to do what’s right – not what’s politically correct or convenient. I know I can be that person, because I've been doing it (and winning!) for the last several years. As governor, I will defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny, your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe, and your freedom of speech and religious liberty. Will you stand with me and make a donation to my campaign for governor today? $10, $25, $50, or more - any amount will help: God bless, Sarah Huckabee Sanders Sent from my iPhone | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: We have until 11:59 P.M. to fight back against Kamala and Soros’ fundraising blitz. | Peter, I had to be sure you heard the news before tonight’s end-of-month deadline. Kamala’s DSCC just raked in over $20 MILLION last quarter -- and that’s on top of the millions in dark money George Soros is spending to try and save her 50-50 Senate majority. But while the Left is going on a fundraising blitz after news broke of our 6-point LEAD , we’re still struggling to raise the final $11,195 of our October goal with the deadline just HOURS away. I’m counting on YOUR support at the final hour to help ensure we crush our goal and keep our fight alive to FLIP the 50-50 Senate. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Eric Greitens (via mobile) Date: Thu, Oct 28, 2021 Subject: JUST RELEASED To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, This is huge... As Breitbart just reported, Fabrizio, Lee & Associates’ latest poll gives us a 6-point LEAD ⬆️ over every Democrat contender in the race for this MUST-WIN Senate seat. Our chances to win the OPEN seat needed to END Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority are skyrocketing! And with Biden and Kamala’s approval at a record-low of just 39% ⬇️ , we need to keep our foot on the gas and CRUSH our October fundraising goal -- but as it stands, we’re still $25,892 short. Thank you for keeping up the fight! \- Eric Sent from my iPhone Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

clean_body: Deadline TODAY! ACT NOW! | Fellow Conservative, We don't have much time left until our major End-of-Month deadline is here. My friend Ted Budd was just endorsed by Donald Trump, and he needs your help to make sure he hits his goal. Let's show President Trump that Ted has what it takes to win BIG in November! | Ted is running to be the next Senator of North Carolina. If we are able to reach the End-of-Month goal, that puts us one step closer to stopping the Blue Wave from flooding North Carolina. Bottom Line: Ted Budd and I are counting on you to keep the momentum going into 2022! I know that with the help of conservatives across America we can get Ted Budd over the finish line and put him one step closer to CRUSHING the Liberal Agenda. Thank you for chipping in! Rep. Jim Jordan TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I sued the Biden Administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, this is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

_**[I just sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654539:JnUqwf20N:m:1:3253819041:3A26CD7E9EFE45CA30C3312712EE3FC8:r "I just sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.")**_

Biden's border crisis is out of control, and states like Florida are taking a stand against the Administration's reckless policy of open borders and mass illegal immigration.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654539:JnUqwf20N:m:1:3253819041:3A26CD7E9EFE45CA30C3312712EE3FC8:r)
---
While the Biden Administration restricts your rights, wastes your money, and forces draconian mandates on its citizens, illegal migrants are being given a free pass on all of the above. Not only did Biden turn his back on the border crisis he created, but he's also using state resources to prop up his failed policies.

_**[State Republicans across the country need your support to secure our borders.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654539:JnUqwf20N:m:1:3253819041:3A26CD7E9EFE45CA30C3312712EE3FC8:r "State Republicans across the country need your support to secure our borders.")**_
_**[ALL STATES ARE BORDER STATES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654539:JnUqwf20N:m:1:3253819041:3A26CD7E9EFE45CA30C3312712EE3FC8:r "ALL STATES ARE
BORDER STATES")**_

OUR STATES")

STATES")

[$25 TO SAVE OUR STATES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654539:JnUqwf20N:m:1:3253819041:3A26CD7E9EFE45CA30C3312712EE3FC8:r "$25 TO SAVE OUR
STATES")**
YOU shouldn't bear the brunt of Biden's recklessness, and that's why State GOP are fighting back. **[Stand with us today to protect our states from Open Borders Biden's dangerous agenda.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58654539:JnUqwf20N:m:1:3253819041:3A26CD7E9EFE45CA30C3312712EE3FC8:r "Stand with us today to protect our states from Open Borders Biden's dangerous agenda.")**

body:
As of 9:30 AM (EST) this morning, your name is NOT included in our official list.
_**Peter, delete this email if you no longer consider yourself a Trump supporter! I’m a gay woman, Christian minister, mom of three, and county commissioner running to unseat right-wing insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn and create a new path forward for Western North Carolina.
Skeptics have told me that I have no chance of winning an election here. But I already have -- _twice_.
By organizing everywhere, talking to everyone, and doing a whole lot of listening, I won two terms as county commissioner.
**Peter,** **I’m ready to put in the work and do it again**. We have a real chance at defeating Cawthorn and flipping NC-11 blue.
And it’s never been more urgent. A recent _Rolling Stone_ report alleged that Cawthorn's staff met with organizers at planning meetings prior to the January 6th insurrection. This further proves that he is dangerous and unfit to serve.
I need you with me.

Skeptics have told me that I have no chance of winning an election here. But I already have -- twice. By organizing everywhere, talking to everyone, and doing a whole lot of listening, I won two terms as county commissioner. Peter, I’m ready to put in the work and do it again. We have a real chance at defeating Cawthorn and flipping NC-11 blue. And it’s never been more urgent. A recent Rolling Stone report alleged that Cawthorn's staff met with organizers at planning meetings prior to the January 6th insurrection. This further proves that he is dangerous and unfit to serve. clean_body: | | A lot has happened since I entered this race just over a year ago. Thanks to you, our grassroots efforts have reached every corner of Wisconsin. We just wrapped up our Full Nelson tour, meeting voters all over the state, and now, we need to keep this momentum going. I wouldn’t be reaching out if this deadline wasn’t incredibly important. = I’m grateful to have your support. Thanks, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

name: Nikki
subject: Spooky, team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends,

I hope you had a good time celebrating Halloween. I also want to give you one final update before midnight.

Right now, things look a bit... spooky. We’re still $2,973 short of our goal, and I’m worried we won’t make it.

I know it’s Halloween, so I won’t keep you for long. But if you can help us finish the month strong before America’s scariest governor officially launches his re-election campaign, it would mean the world to me. Click here to chip in before midnight if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=eom1031s2]

Thanks so much, and happy Halloween!

Nikki Fried

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Powerful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, our movement is powerful.
Progressives have made it clear month after month after month: Both the smaller infrastructure bill and the historic Build Back Better Act that invests in our communities pass together. _And we made that clear once again this week._
I'm optimistic that the momentum is on our side despite corporate lobbyists, Big Pharma, and Wall Street doing everything they can to stop us and the transformative investments we're fighting so hard for.**But we can't stop now.**
Right now, our team is working hard to reach our $25,000 October goal before midnight tonight — **and the good news is that we're 97% of the way there.** [**Can you help us hit our goal with a $3 donation to support our fight for childcare, affordable housing, pre-K, health care, climate action, and much more?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211031?refcode=em20211031-765&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=765_420207_XCpmYn&akid=765%2E420207%2EXCpmYn)
**[Donate $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211031?refcode=em20211031-765&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=765_420207_XCpmYn&akid=765%2E420207%2EXCpmYn)**
Thank you for everything you've done so far to help us build this movement. We're just getting started — and we're going to deliver for people.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211031-765-footer&t=21&refcode2=765_420207_XCpmYn&akid=765%2E420207%2EXCpmYn)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

We’re close to accomplishing our goal, but we need one final push. I’m honored if you even can part with $1 of your hard-earned money to help our campaign thrive. _**[If you are able, please send us a contribution before our end-of-month deadline now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38169850/314233047/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211031-ng-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjY3ZTUyZi05YzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a9fgtk5QVN-Eer-rASRzVl7jH_MUktpMAbT5WDFhMdQ=)**_

name: Hala Ayala
subject: Virginia is worth the battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
We have two days left to win the fight.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170075/314234295/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGQ5OWU0YS05ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBXVzflo60qMxqqXN0ua1pK6SlYVMUDwuu8Z4WmbtOU=)
---
**Peter, can you believe we have just two days left to keep Virginia blue?**

I’ve been criss‐crossing the Commonwealth on our bus tour — _meeting Virginians, sharing their concerns, and spreading our message._

It’s the honor of my life to be on the campaign trail each day, and I’m astounded by how much we have accomplished together in this race.

[**But it’s not over yet, Peter, so I’m humbly asking for your support. Will you chip in $3 toward our final $30,000 fundraising goal tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170078/314234298/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211031_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGQ5OWU0YS05ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBXVzflo60qMxqqXN0ua1pK6SlYVMUDwuu8Z4WmbtOU=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170084/314234302/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211031_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGQ5OWU0YS05ZTNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBXVzflo60qMxqqXN0ua1pK6SlYVMUDwuu8Z4WmbtOU=)
---
I know what you might be thinking, Peter. _With just 48 hours until polls close, how will my $3 make a difference tonight?_

Let me tell you, it means the world to me and my team. With your $3, we can continue to fund our critical voter outreach efforts — knocking on doors, passing out flyers, and giving out yard signs.

**This matters all the way up until the polls close, because we’re up against an unprecedented threat to our democracy.**

My extreme Republican opponent is poised to roll back voting rights, enact a Texas‐style abortion ban, and become the tie‐breaking vote of our Senate if we don’t see this through to the very end.

[**I know Virginia is worth the battle, and I hope you agree. So I’m humbly asking you: Will you donate $3 to my final $30,000 goal to elect me as Virginia’s first woman and Afro‐Latina as Lt. clean_body: We have two days left to win the fight. | = Peter, can you believe we have just two days left to keep Virginia blue? I’ve been criss‐crossing the Commonwealth on our bus tour — meeting Virginians, sharing their concerns, and spreading our message. It’s the honor of my life to be on the campaign trail each day, and I’m astounded by how much we have accomplished together in this race. = | = I know what you might be thinking, Peter. With just 48 hours until polls close, how will my $3 make a difference tonight? Let me tell you, it means the world to me and my team. With your $3, we can continue to fund our critical voter outreach efforts — knocking on doors, passing out flyers, and giving out yard signs. This matters all the way up until the polls close, because we’re up against an unprecedented threat to our democracy. My extreme Republican opponent is poised to roll back voting rights, enact a Texas‐style abortion ban, and become the tie‐breaking vote of our Senate if we don’t see this through to the very end. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = I’m really counting on you, Peter. clean_body: Our first end-of-month fundraising deadline TONIGHT to elect Admiral Mike Franken as Iowa’s next Senator. | | | | Hey friends, I’ll make this quick. We are coming up on our first end-of-month fundraising deadline TONIGHT to elect Admiral Mike Franken as Iowa’s next Senator. We only launched this campaign two weeks ago and we've been so thankful for the grassroots support so far. We weren’t the first campaign out of the gate, so to make up for it we’re going full steam ahead. In just a few weeks, we’ll launch our 99 County Tour to talk with Iowans all across the state. Your donation will help us with staffing and materials to get the Admiral’s message out to all Iowans — in each and every corner of the state. clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, whenever Glenn Youngkin’s rhetoric intrudes on my screen, I have no words — and that is unusual for me. He’s bragging about being endorsed by Donald Trump. He’s advocating for another four years of Trump as president. He’s announcing he’ll go "on offense" to ban abortion care. And he’s spouting baseless, dangerous lies about the 2020 election. I was shocked to learn that this despicable individual is running so many ads that he’s TIED with Terry McAuliffe in the race to be Virginia’s next Governor. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = You know what else was shocking to me, Derek? I hear some people saying that Democrats aren’t enthusiastic this year. That can’t be true! Last year, I worked my heart out alongside you and millions of other Americans to vote Donald Trump out, and together, we were successful by a wide margin. This year, with our constitutional democracy at stake — this is not an exaggeration — and so many values that we have in common STILL under threat, we cannot afford to be complacent or discouraged. Will you join me in staying active in the fight to extinguish Trumpism in America? Okay! The first major battle is the governor’s race in Virginia. We HAVE to make sure that Terry McAuliffe defeats his openly Trumpist opponent Tuesday by a majority too big to ignore, suppress or dispute. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for being such an important part of this campaign. Your contribution really does matter. Wishing you and your family all the best in these challenging times, – Carole = Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award and a Kennedy Center honor. name: Donna Imam (personal)
subject: Still just short of our goal. Here’s a big reason to give.
body:
Friend,

Tonight at 11:59 pm marks the end of our October fundraising deadline, and we're still coming up short. **$6,567 to be exact.** If you need one BIG reason to chip in before you sign off for the night, here it is:

**This is the first time in decades Austin has the opportunity to send a Democrat to represent us, and it's important to talk about what type of Democrat we send. The present negotiations over President Biden's Build Back Better agenda are a perfect illustration of what I mean.**

Progressive Democrats are fighting for investments in childcare, affordable housing, pre-K, healthcare coverage, climate action, and much more. Unfortunately, corporate lobbyists, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and yes even some moderate Democrats are holding it up.

The choice is clear: We need to send a Democrat who will champion working families. That's why I'm running, and after going to over 50,000 doors in my last race, I've proven that we have what it takes to not only win, but help Democrats up and down the ticket win too. **We can flip Texas blue if we do that again.**

I'm confident we can win this race, but that kind of grassroots operation is not easy -- it takes hard work and a TON of people chipping in from all across the country. We can't miss any mark, and with your help, I know we can do this.

Here's a good link if you're able to make one last contribution:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donna-q4-2021**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170323/314235216/1898666321?refcode=em-103121-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYxMmEzMC05ZjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K71_-JqCJZaitPmA9NGYJXsBKY9_e4ybbxdwT_b51qg=)

Thanks for being with me in this fight,

Donna

**[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170324/314235217/1898666321?refcode=em-103121-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYxMmEzMC05ZjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K71_-JqCJZaitPmA9NGYJXsBKY9_e4ybbxdwT_b51qg=)**

name: Roger Misso
subject: Help us save Virginia - the most important race in the country!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

I want to talk to you about our friend, Terry McAuliffe. Terry has had veterans' backs in Virginia for years - [_**and now he needs our help.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/6jBsDvIjFB1RYMieJZL4xq4SslMeUhsGI0P8CbniKkk=/8WydfslveVtXFUcCMTGYN8AIKwudGHDeEROtHuGkVQA=)
The Virginia Governor's election is on TUESDAY, and the polls show Terry's opponent - a devout Trump disciple - pulling ahead. The pundits are wagering that we have given up on fighting for a government of decency and integrity - they think we're too tired and weak after defeating Trump to get the job done in Virginia.
You know what we do when they doubt us, folks - [_**we prove them wrong.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/6jBsDvIjFB1RYMieJZL4xq4SslMeUhsGI0P8CbniKkk=/8WydfslveVtXFUcCMTGYN8AIKwudGHDeEROtHuGkVQA=)
[_**Will you split a donation between Taking the Hill PAC and Terry McAuliffe 's campaign right now? Your support is crucial right now because every single dollar we raise between now and Tuesday goes directly towards the effort to get out the vote and win for Virginia and our country.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/6jBsDvIjFB1RYMieJZL4xq4SslMeUhsGI0P8CbniKkk=/8WydfslveVtXFUcCMTGYN8AIKwudGHDeEROtHuGkVQA=)
We want to share Terry's closing message with you:
**What happens in Virginia on November 2nd doesn 't just impact the future of our Commonwealth, it impacts the future of our entire country.**
Terry's opponent is using every dirty Trump play in the book - racist dogwhistles, destroying the integrity of our election system, pitting Virginians against one another. These tactics have no place in any office in America.
Terry is working his butt off in these final days to turn out every voter and save Virginia for our veterans. [_**Can you show your support by rushing a donation to Terry and Taking the Hill right now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/6jBsDvIjFB1RYMieJZL4xq4SslMeUhsGI0P8CbniKkk=/8WydfslveVtXFUcCMTGYN8AIKwudGHDeEROtHuGkVQA=)
Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director_
_Taking the Hill

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/6jBsDvIjFB1RYMieJZL4xq4SslMeUhsGI0P8CbniKkk=/uVeIUJf8EQWzACxTVL4rVqb5tllOm3YL9fKM2J7YWU4= "https://act.myngp.com/el/6jBsDvIjFB1RYMieJZL4xq4SslMeUhsGI0P8CbniKkk=/uVeIUJf8EQWzACxTVL4rVqb5tllOm3YL9fKM2J7YWU4=").

name: Wade Herring
subject: Meeting Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem103121 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem103121] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Peter,
On Friday, I had the opportunity to speak directly with Senator Raphael Warnock.
Leaders like him are an inspiration for all of us across the state of Georgia – and his successful election is proof that Georgia has been ready and is ready for better leadership.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/IMG_5191_SparkVideo-%282%29.gif]
Our campaign is picking up speed – but the truth is that we need your financial support to fight against Buddy Carter’s political machine.
If you haven’t had a chance to donate to our campaign yet, can you take a moment to contribute $25, $50, or $100 before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem103121]
We are building a coalition across the First District and the State – but we need you to finish this month strong!
Grateful for your support,
Wade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem103121] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.

name: Max Steiner (personal)
subject: This is a good sign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Steiner for Congress
body:
Pending final maps, we're well within reach of defeating LaMalfa and flipping this district, and I bet he's getting awfully nervous.Hi friend,

**[This was an absolutely huge week for our campaign. Before I go into more detail, I want to ask for your help in closing our $6,517 fundraising gap before tonight's deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170483/314236325/-209993060?refcode=em-103121-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDg2MjI1OS1hMDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThMMkZsW7xF5O03M5Kw9-PLUPrVQ9EI6dMw-MU0vYzM=)**

Earlier this week, California's Redistricting Commission released their "starting point" map for 2022. If these maps hold, it would improve Democrats' registration advantage in CA-01 by nine points.

This is a really good sign, and our campaign just got a hell of a lot more competitive. Pending these final maps, we're well within reach of defeating LaMalfa and flipping this district. I bet he's getting awfully nervous -- especially since we're talking to thousands of voters and hearing a common refrain that he's got to go.

Friend, I know these fundraising deadlines can feel a bit arbitrary, but the truth is, if we don't meet every mark, we risk not having the resources to flip this district.

I refuse to wake up the day after the election feeling like we didn't give it our all. That's why I'm asking you to chip in your very first $5, $15, or even $50 contribution before you sign off. If you were waiting for a good reason to chip in, I hope this massive boost to our efforts is it.

Here's a good link to chip in:

clean_body: Pending final maps, we're well within reach of defeating LaMalfa and flipping this district, and I bet he's getting awfully nervous.Hi friend, = Earlier this week, California's Redistricting Commission released their "starting point" map for 2022. If these maps hold, it would improve Democrats' registration advantage in CA-01 by nine points. This is a really good sign, and our campaign just got a hell of a lot more competitive. Pending these final maps, we're well within reach of defeating LaMalfa and flipping this district. I bet he's getting awfully nervous -- especially since we're talking to thousands of voters and hearing a common refrain that he's got to go. Friend, I know these fundraising deadlines can feel a bit arbitrary, but the truth is, if we don't meet every mark, we risk not having the resources to flip this district. I refuse to wake up the day after the election feeling like we didn't give it our all. That's why I'm asking you to chip in your very first $5, $15, or even $50 contribution before you sign off. If you were waiting for a good reason to chip in, I hope this massive boost to our efforts is it. body:
I wouldn’t ask for your hard-earned money if it weren’t important

| Hi Peter,

I hate to bother you on a Sunday, so I’ll keep this quick. Our end-of-month deadline is just hours away, but we’re still $2,691 short of our October fundraising goal. Can you chip in today to get us there? Here’s a secure link to donate now: [_**https://wildforcongress.com/OctGoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170511/314236354/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211031-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODg2MjI1OS1hMDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q3TgTF6lH94ORyLq2PqQqAQHalr9XX7dU70atvcqRZ4=)

I wouldn’t ask for your hard-earned money if it weren’t important, but there’s just too much at stake in the midterm elections — if we lose our Democratic majority, we negate the progress we’ve made on crucial issues like health care, infrastructure, and good jobs for folks in the Lehigh Valley and across the country. And to keep the House blue in 2022, we can’t afford to lose a single seat, including mine.

To keep me in Congress and keep the House blue, please consider contributing to my re-election campaign before our deadline tonight. Here’s that link again: [_**https://wildforcongress.com/OctGoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170512/314236356/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211031-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODg2MjI1OS1hMDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q3TgTF6lH94ORyLq2PqQqAQHalr9XX7dU70atvcqRZ4=)

Thank you for investing in our movement,
Susan Wild

I know that our message will prevail if we continue to have sustained grassroots support.

Hi Derek, I have one last update before our October fundraising deadline tonight.

**We're only about $1,200 away from meeting our goal. That means if 48 people each chip in $25 before the day ends, we'll be right where we need to be.**

We came out of the gate strong last quarter. Now, with a Republican opponent in the race, we're in the next stage. And I know that our message will prevail if we continue to have sustained grassroots support.

**[I can't do this without you, Derek. Please chip in $25 (or whatever you can) before midnight so we can meet our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170666/314237311/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211031EOM2_EOM_CD_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjZkYTA3Yi1hMjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Osbj8M-znPfTUPP73ZxmsavMFloLZZZ41DmDbDeXADE=)**

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Happy Halloween, Maryland! What's really scary this Halloween? The thought of going back to the days of one-party rule and Martin O'Malley's 43 tax increases. Because every one of my opponents is going to raise your taxes. As you know, today is the last day of October - and we’re SO close to our monthly goal, but time is running out! We have only until 11:59 PM tonight! Thank you for your support and commitment to making Maryland the best place to live, work and raise a family. I wouldn't normally email this late, friend, but I had to reach out one last time before tonight's midnight deadline. **With only hours until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're still $1,972 short of our goal – the goal we set to take on GOP extremism next November and keep pushing this movement forward.**
Everything I've been saying is still 100% true: We CAN win this race – and experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to The Cook Political Report agree. But this isn't just a close race – POLITICO is calling it the most competitive open-seat race in the _country._ So we have to give everything we've got – or risk losing everything we've worked for.
