**But the bad news is that we're currently way below our end-of-month goal ****– while our new extremist opponent is steadily rising in the polls****. If we don't raise another $8,382 before our end-of-month deadline, Trump's handpicked candidate could surge ahead at the WORST moment. [So please, friend, will you chip in toward our end-of-month goal to help defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38170794/314237669/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk282-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDJlNWMyZS1hMzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2fwLdKvg-l5EfbZX_RWRQOzl-pNJc5Nw7agycp3Xu-w=) **

But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. We have the strategy in place – but to overcome our Trump-backed opponent and the GOP megadonors, we have to hit every single goal between now and Election Day, including this one. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for fighting alongside me. Marco Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Vaccinated Lt Governor Flanagan Gets COVID
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=1)
---
October 31st, 2021
## Vaccinated Lt Governor Flanagan Gets COVID
Fully vaccinated Lt Governor Peggy Flanagan [announced via twitter yesterday](https://www.action4liberty.com/vaccinated_lt_governor_flanagan_tests_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=2) that she tested positive for COVID. This announcement came days after Governor Walz pulled a publicity stunt with former Governor Tim Pawlenty encouraging all Minnesotans to get a booster. The media usually labels cases like Flanagan's as "breakthrough cases" since the vaccine was intended to provide immunity. However, it's widely known at this point that the vaccines are not effective in preventing individuals from getting or spreading COVID. In a remarkable display of ignorance, Flanagan followed her announcement tweet with another tweet telling her fans to take "COVID-19 prevention measures" that include getting "vaccinated". [](https://www.action4liberty.com/vaccinated_lt_governor_flanagan_tests_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=3) Let that sink in. Nothing is scarier on this Halloween than a Lt Governor who spreads vaccine lies and wants your children to get the jab! Flanagan has joined Governor Walz and President Joe Biden in calling for mandatory vaccinations of Minnesotans. In fact, Flanagan celebrated the upcoming FDA emergency authorization of vaccines for 5-11 year olds. **Action 4 Liberty will continue fighting against tyrannical government mandates and work to pass Rep Erik Mortensen's Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment in the Minnesota legislature.** **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty**
### **Happy Halloween!**
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=4)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=status_of_stopping_v_mandates&n=7), software for leaders.

We know you probably get a lot of emails, especially around this time of the month... But we wanted to be certain that you saw Derek’s last message. T Friend, We know you probably get a lot of emails, especially around this time of the month... But we wanted to be certain that you saw Derek’s last message. TONIGHT, the clock will strike midnight and we’ll turn the page to November. We’ll be just about one year away from election day! Derek is committed to growing our movement bigger and bigger every single month as we near the 2022 election. **And we’re on the verge of making October our best month EVER. **

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: closing my laptop after this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hey, Peter: Please bear with me for dropping into your inbox again – I just had to get one last note out to you before I close my laptop for the night. We're still about $2,850 short of what we need to raise before the weekend is over. With Sen. Grassley officially announcing he's running, we cannot be in a position where we're short on resources.

So I'm humbly reaching out one more time to ask you to make a donation. For me, it's not just about raising this last $2,850. It's about having the resources to _win_ so working families can have a strong voice in the Senate. So we can empower workers and unions and prioritize middle-class job creation. So we can protect and _improve_ our democracy and stop the GOP's voter suppression.

To get there, we need to defeat Sen. Grassley – and to do that, we need to hit the goals we set for ourselves. So please, if you can spare a donation before midnight tonight, every last dollar will help. Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38171607/314243614/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk331-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTkxYjA1ZC1hNzNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INV9P3LdWLABXWGhXoZipj_YmZTzu2jh2kh9gxRaHDE=)

Abby

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Terry’s Victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Breaking
_Sponsored message_
Breaking

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmrun6o6u66biio1qg3v0uufrpjtf3l8u4gkhpr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cth6cpb7c1h2bs)
---
Friend,

I just came out of a meeting with my fundraising team, and they told me some bad news - we aren’t on pace to hit our final fundraising goal. _If we don’t meet this deadline, we will have to say Terry McAuliffe won, and Election Day Victory is not looking promising._

Once the clock hits midnight tonight, we’ll have to start making some tough decisions.

_**I need you to dig deep in these last couple of hours. We are SO CLOSE, and I believe we can still pull this off, but I need your help.**_

**[Will you click this direct link to rush a donation to help our campaign get over the finish line?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdr1o4j77dvcr6hh7n715jlkd3ihcfj5gdjbri40_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cth6cpb7c1h2bs)**

**[RUSH DONATION HERE: https://secure.winred.com/youngkin-for-governor-individual](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn29ldbg4i6foc7r52um50aumigt3n9igkqci5ug_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cth6cpb7c1h2bs)**

**We’re so close to the finish line. I just need one final push to come out victorious. We are so close to turning Virginia Red, creating jobs, and standing up for families, students, and parents.**

I’m making this one final request, and I hope you won’t let me down.

**[RUSH DONATION HERE: https://secure.winred.com/youngkin-for-governor-individual](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs4m4bprbs8hv8dj4tmbo3nv2u3aa4od1fjas64o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cth6cpb7c1h2bs)**

Thank you for all of your support.

Let’s win this!

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zga82fq0d48d6o8qjebsjsmirmug9rcok8fr1kso_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cth6cpb7c1h2bs)
Glenn Youngkin

subject: Don’t ignore President Trump.

|
# Real consequences to Americans
---
Senate Democrats have introduced, under the cover of their usual talking points attacking the success of "the wealthy", legislation to levy taxes on unrealized increases in the value of investments.
What's not said by these grandstanding politicians is that their impetus for increased taxes comes from the reckless spending they're attempting to force on Americans. As the progressive machine turns from a botched response to the now-ending COVID pandemic towards a larger, more insidious plan to transform our society according to impossible fantasies, it becomes clear that its thirst for our dollars to fuel its endless requirements over us cannot be sated by tolerable means.
We should all be thinking ahead to the point at which our greedy "ruling class" attempts to expand taxation like this to our middle class, without regard to its unconstitutional nature. A tax on assets is clearly outside the bounds of allowable tax policy as set forth by our Founders. Furthermore, the strain on our liquidity from a regressive direct tax will only serve to bankrupt ordinary citizens and further concentrate wealth upwards--where Big Government, despite its rhetoric, thrives by seducing a small elite into its utopian schemes.
And if this economically unsound plan comes to a vote, we will all be able to observe, to our disgust, the moment when Michael Bennet rolls over and votes in favor of onerous taxation without regard to the disastrous effects it will have on his constituents.
If you are sick and tired of exploitative misrepresentation from out-of-touch elites and reckless politicians in Washington, please support my campaign by donating here.
Citizens like you deserve servant leadership from people who have fought and struggled for their families in the same ways you do. I need your support today.
---
|
---
| |
---

| | Derek, Dorothy reached out a couple hours ago to let you know that we were making great progress toward our single-day million dollar fundraising goal — and I thought that would get people fired up to keep the momentum going.

But I just checked ActBlue, and it seems like folks are getting complacent, because donations have really slowed since then. _**I was shocked to see this!**_

We’re two days out, Derek — _**we can't afford to slow down now.**_ _The Washington Post_ just released a poll that shows our campaign up by just one point. We have the momentum, but we’ve got to keep firing on all cylinders from now until polls close on Tuesday.

clean_body: We’re almost there | | | = | | Derek, Dorothy reached out a couple hours ago to let you know that we were making great progress toward our single-day million dollar fundraising goal — and I thought that would get people fired up to keep the momentum going. But I just checked ActBlue, and it seems like folks are getting complacent, because donations have really slowed since then. I was shocked to see this! We’re two days out, Derek — we can't afford to slow down now. The Washington Post just released a poll that shows our campaign up by just one point. We have the momentum, but we’ve got to keep firing on all cylinders from now until polls close on Tuesday. This is it — our FINAL fundraising deadline and your last chance to have an impact on this race. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. subject: my final ask:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
I’m reaching out one last time before tonight’s critical End of Month Deadline.

|
---

| | My team and I have reached out a lot this month, Peter, so I promise I’ll try to be brief.

I’m striving every day to become your next Senator in the great State of Florida -- a Senator you can be proud of, Peter.

It means that I’m putting your priorities, your needs, and how best to represent YOU in Washington, first.

I’m not beholden to millionaires and billionaires or special interests -- I’m working for you.

**But I’ll be honest, Peter, that means I’m relying on you and every grassroots Democrat to help me make it to the finish line.**

I need your help right this moment to help my team stay on track towards our fundraising goal so we can maintain our campaign for you and your families.

I still need 150 gifts in the door before midnight to hit my ambitious fundraising goal.

Will you join me by pitching in $15 or whatever you can before midnight?

clean_body: I’m reaching out one last time before tonight’s critical End of Month Deadline. | | | My team and I have reached out a lot this month, Peter, so I promise I’ll try to be brief. I’m striving every day to become your next Senator in the great State of Florida -- a Senator you can be proud of, Peter. It means that I’m putting your priorities, your needs, and how best to represent YOU in Washington, first. I’m not beholden to millionaires and billionaires or special interests -- I’m working for you. But I’ll be honest, Peter, that means I’m relying on you and every grassroots Democrat to help me make it to the finish line. I need your help right this moment to help my team stay on track towards our fundraising goal so we can maintain our campaign for you and your families. I still need 150 gifts in the door before midnight to hit my ambitious fundraising goal. Will you join me by pitching in $15 or whatever you can before midnight? = = ** = = = =** I’m beyond grateful to have you on my team, Ken | Small business owner turned community organizer who became a Miami City Commissioner. Ken is running for U.S. Senate to clean up Washington of self-serving politicians like Marco Rubio and give his neighbors a voice in Congress. Email is the best way to stay up to date with Ken's campaign. name: Kelly (iPhone)
subject: down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
Hey there — Kelly here.

Sorry for the late email, but we’re still short of our $3,500 goal. This deadline is really important because this is the first fundraising deadline we’ve faced since we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign.

With this new campaign, we have DOUBLE the job heading into 2022. Not only are we fueling up for the campaigns we’ll run in the midterms, but we need to be ready for any attacks extremist legislators might send our way.

We’re still $464 away from our $3,500 goal. Can you make a donation of whatever you can afford to help us get there?

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38171692/314247406/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI5YzJjNC1hODNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPeIwZNv3u7wgOn1bkM3nNwb-mG_-1AU5D4g7kKzZ_g=&emci=62679e69-1939-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9e29c2c4-a83a-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
**I'm grateful to each and every one of you who have chipped in, and continue to chip in to fuel our grassroots campaign.** Running a people-powered campaign allows me to focus on the issues Southern Arizonans care about, rather than cozying up to special interest groups -- something I simply won't do.
**Last year, grassroots donors were responsible for major victories here in Arizona,** including one of the most competitive U.S. Senate races in history and every competitive Congressional race in the state. And it was you, the grassroots donors, who helped push President Biden over the top to give him a much-needed win in Arizona.
**Now I'm asking. Can you join the fight to keep this seat blue? You've supported strong women in this district before and I'm asking you to step up once again.**
Funding our campaign from the grassroots level makes a powerful statement and makes for a strong campaign. I’m deeply grateful for each and every one of our grassroots donors helping power our movement.
[**If you're able to, can I count on you to make a contribution of $20, or whatever amount you're comfortable with, to help our grassroots campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38171693/314247431/41694283?refcode=X_103121_EOM_G&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI5YzJjNC1hODNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPeIwZNv3u7wgOn1bkM3nNwb-mG_-1AU5D4g7kKzZ_g=)
I wouldn't ask if it wasn’t important. And I truly appreciate each and every contribution.
Thank you for all you are doing,
Kirsten

name: 9-HOUR-DEADLINE@dccc.org
subject: a MASSIVE loss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | Adam Schiff emailed.
Jamie Raskin emailed.
Mary L. Trump emailed.
Sean Patrick Maloney emailed.
Katie Porter emailed.

****[That's how absolutely critical your $3 is in this moment to help us reach our End of Month fundraising goal. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)****

We told you Republicans only need to flip **FIVE** seats to regain the House Majority.

We told you they've raised **$105 MILLION** in the bank to take it from us.

We told you meeting our End of Month fundraising goals could make or break our chances of holding the House.

**We don 't know what else we can say. Because somehow, we're still $60,000 short of our End of Month goal -- with only nine hours to close the gap. **
| [](https://links.e.dccc.)[END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 9 HOURS AWAY
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)

---

We know we ask a lot of you, but this is urgent:

If we let this House Republican cash advantage stand, we could lose our historic Democratic Trifecta and be locked out of the House Majority for years.

We refuse to let that happen.

body:
#
Hey there,
Happy Halloween! 👻🍁🕸🎃 We hope your Sunday has been filled with as much spookiness as you want and as many Reese’s Peanut Butter cups as humanly possible.
We’ll get straight to the point so you can enjoy the rest of your evening. **We have just a few hours until our end-of-month deadline tonight at midnight and we’re just $250 away from reaching our $12,000 October fundraising goal!**
[**_Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign today to ensure that we meet our end-of-month goal and have the resources to elect Erica and flip North Carolina blue?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24514?t=1&akid=593%2E3698%2ENKhmEi)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24520?refcode=em20211031-593&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=593%2E3698%2ENKhmEi)**
**What’s REALLY spooky****, is just how much money influences politics.** We’ve all seen Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema hold up progress because they’d rather line their own pockets with corporate and fossil fuel cash. That’s the real American horror story.
Erica is a dirt road Democrat who grew up on her family’s farm. Hard work is all she knows and you can bet when she gets to Congress she’ll fight hard for the people of North Carolina.
[**_As we’re racing towards the finish line, can you add a donation of $5 or anything you can by midnight tonight to help us reach our $12,000 October fundraising goal and keep our campaign going strong?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24514?t=21&akid=593%2E3698%2ENKhmEi)
Thank you for everything,
The Finance Team
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211031-593-footer&t=22&refcode2=593_3698_NKhmEi&akid=593%2E3698%2ENKhmEi)**

Peter, Since announcing my candidacy for governor of New Mexico, I’ve been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support. This incredible response shows that Governor Lujan Grisham’s fear of my candidacy was well-founded! New Mexicans are frustrated by her poor leadership and we are going to win this race! The Governor lives behind high walls, protected from the consequences of her failed liberal policies. She’s protected from the crime her terrible policies have enabled to flourish in our backyards. She uses taxpayer dollars to pay for high-end liquor and the best steaks money can buy, all while we pay more at the grocery store because of the inflation created by out-of-control liberal spending! She took office in 2019 with a $2 billion surplus and she blew right through it. Our children are trapped in a failing school system with no change, no choice, and no chance. **Peter, I’m running to be your next governor because I know that if we don’t put our foot in the ground demanding better, absolutely nothing will change. ** **[Will you support our efforts by chipping in now as I work to become New Mexico’s 33rd They’ve tried to obstruct every ounce of progress while stacking the courts with extreme justices to serve their right-wing agenda. And if they take back the Senate? That would be a nightmare.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cac34cdd9e8444e793d1453fc46cf7fb&_e=LtsiXU-QJmCWEIRVoP2pi_SkTnh8eOV3d_5WmtquMXKgLz9EH_aovvXzRXf84h-3ax0YrYkduY8LpI5qV-yFFggk4omQEm_vhcnsCwTcv0-J__POfFo6NV4h7JAPo8nogo93hRp8QpBp-uQDc1aUoDFBP0DnHya02T78j44bkEKrPs8qOAxQuQcdxZTbPEY14LxHgAPcMEd69NsT_X54nvgCerHdaOKAA-KSOmflJnnnZz-_9PW8pzwfVkz_QCO8q14MaVcPlPnWr0hp3fsEkxqCvfYTCgw5AZ0MpWH-71FUYgLrf4gsdQKpgjNCLO7vV2d5vrx6D8SVndD5QPvqsSaHYJ1HhIPt289JtsIWW-q7ic5uxZLW1EbKwMDOpk0u8zOu1qxzHxFE9dzP1hJ6lgFrkggIS60rJgoV_6uKmtc%3D)

---
Teamwork is one of the first things they teach you when you join the army. Because of that, I’ll be the first to tell you that I’m honored to have you on my team, but right now, Fellow American, [**I need your help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cac34cdd9e8444e793d1453fc46cf7fb&_e=LtsiXU-QJmCWEIRVoP2pi_SkTnh8eOV3d_5WmtquMXKgLz9EH_aovvXzRXf84h-3ax0YrYkduY8LpI5qV-yFFggk4omQEm_vhcnsCwTcv0-J__POfFo6NV4h7JAPo8nogo93hRp8QpBp-uQDc1aUoDFBP0DnHya02T78j44bkEKrPs8qOAxQuQcdxZTbPEY1iUA00fNyGk8C4XTJ8aDZlvH2qsrIF821o4o6W4CDRxsfs7miOIwPksp3mefImnPdcg8IeHeutc-6qztzUngjpAbOFKJwzBBRIk36LCPNpnZ0LPb5zmvoyLaWwM9wSo5rIHJXUZsz8UloTFZhrxXILq57c3F3b_Hz_2gMF0sGgWIKdiyl7bjB8Iq_8VdsvJPb2FelAZnQLJSO-AxNX_qtU20TEnsgsA-NopaJrjloO94%3D)

[**END OF THE MONTH >>> CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cac34cdd9e8444e793d1453fc46cf7fb&_e=LtsiXU-QJmCWEIRVoP2pi_SkTnh8eOV3d_5WmtquMXKgLz9EH_aovvXzRXf84h-3ax0YrYkduY8LpI5qV-yFFggk4omQEm_vhcnsCwTcv0-J__POfFo6NV4h7JAPo8nogo93hRp8QpBp-uQDc1aUoDFBP0DnHya02T78j44bkEKrPs8qOAxQuQcdxZTbPEY1ZaSx-UmOoEtDmyPwkfG5GHENAU3ooTpRVBCbQYEdtHkNZaUVAp8vCedF0mL6vAy5ljZnBt6nd2U97enJbdobMzxjXfRVBqcdhSC1EgCO1FKDtH5w51nVO6VaSBAJ9Zwun7Q1Y8wE1XEHGNwQAsmvQmL--UEjNWG6wmSxcZL8CGZoo8vaPxNZN5NRkkglKi0uAO6JbAb7BIHs7OwwKWSsfCqE3jRHDI2UxLOUogwIUTo%3D)

I know today is Halloween and I could spend my time telling you about how scary Mike Garcia is for this district -- there would be plenty to talk about.

I could tell you about his terrifying voting record.

When I started this campaign, I wanted it to be about you -- to be about _us_. I heard a quote once: "You can't campaign wrong and expect to govern right." That's why I don't take corporate PAC money. That's why I built a campaign fueled by you.

I have lived in this district a long time. I know what's at stake for your family because it's the same things that are at stake for mine.

I can't wait to represent CA-25 in Congress and I know we will flip this seat once and for all -- together. = = Thanks for all you do for this campaign -- for us. \-- Christy *

Dear Peter,
On Friday, we **received word that a huge case** we are advancing to stop big parts of the unlawful Biden job-killing climate agenda **will be heard at the U.S. Supreme Court.**
It’s a pretty big deal.
Unfortunately, when you stand against the President’s Green New Deal agenda, you make some pretty _powerful_ _enemies_ — **enemies who pour millions of dollars in against you!**
That’s why **we need your help** to meet our critical End-of-Month deadline.
[_**Please consider contributing $25, $50, $75, or even $100 to help us fight back against the radical left and their WOKE money. >>**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMevteYDZds97BjJZNQ6XPPA9x3TB0PaLSQBgHEVePiAic-3D2uSQ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6U-2FY7X0Ofv-2FHHKebq5eQqn-2FoxaQ67bCRLTSDlcGXEpOXMGoWqni-2BYkLOfvkUz866CLB8tc2jK7fW7kqjaIE3-2F6Q66W01Us5-2BUbiVsd-2Flh7bDQSkLwxfwyUW1K25VmF-2FtAhJT4ieiB7V45QS2aXeTE-2BGu-2F33OHE1TBibkLDOByj1wvMr9hNBEiAaqVhiXFrkF-2F2IEtHbrldouHm7nP46XTVIzU0y7JDlrVcloCvOfkHd427yHWgDkBX76fKEKy3pKnXxW0JP1wG0BPTjMlVEOrUdP3Sfvh-2B67hnLHfFiNhvUpGCp9KS-2BSmH-2BtK6CAuoDvVKgjm7VI4Ct18axZ2KEbTKGgwUHbC4a0veAZcYCMBvYpMo4KcRpOkm-2BhZ7gew9vCUv9HExuszGWJYfRQSBmW-2B9NmuuBEk5c4HkIWBGIb-2B6PyH2I0CCYnqIPLLuw1Qt5GBIYGOFnfXORsuqytMhSAVoVGPh75xDnoDZa7jpHgD4uIBgivKWdx1-2F5wd6OVhUVwJeyVb5ng6V9uEzCNW-2Bu6-2B5eBlNTC8xUUHbLOX7TMR6ww7ApGcOFfgYjTWgTLfjtb29NY4WnKF8alVDM0oRFZiwi5uBu1Dun-2BF2QiNJS9Q4K6pVMehKewhzG5XfvGGmb8XZ9fd2em5-2BWtj6G0Y0nr-2BDMZ2S0dZdGzqnyNR8EeTteKQMeoGGTmUtiI6o7vMmb8QlA-2FHXf66RI01GYBDkaaXptZ-2ByxF5-2FNmKJupwp08BOr3gosBYaRuprPiHgIwHXAKRLUjJ3nELDo2WfVh6nSxBWYuwvV4q5hVTtEDdbdalCxnkQymkKjKam8QyEQXIwV4dXHbaELhDn48LfNG9gqW2LQ-3D-3D)
We are **$5,200 short of our goal for October** and wanted to make **one final push TODAY.**
We must get strong for the big fights ahead. It’s just not enough to win in Court - we must win over the hearts and minds of the American people.
As you know, we didn’t bother you too much this month, but now we are asking for your donation today!
[_**Donate $50 NOW and help us beat back the Bloomberg, Soros, and Biden agenda. >>**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMevteYDZds97BjJZNQ6XPPA9x3TB0PaLSQBgHEVePiAic-3DNOmW_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6U-2FY7X0Ofv-2FHHKebq5eQqn-2FoxaQ67bCRLTSDlcGXEpOXMGoWqni-2BYkLOfvkUz866CLB8tc2jK7fW7kqjaIE3-2F6Q66W01Us5-2BUbiVsd-2Flh7bDQSkLwxfwyUW1K25VmF-2FtAhJT4ieiB7V45QS2aXeTE-2BGu-2F33OHE1TBibkLDOByj1wvMr9hNBEiAaqVhiXFrkF-2F2IEtHbrldouHm7nP46XTVIzU0y7JDlrVcloCvOfkHd427yHWgDkBX76fKEKy3pKnXxW0JP1wG0BPTjMlVEOrUdP3Sfvh-2B67hnLHfFiNhvUpGCp9KS-2BSmH-2BtK6CAuoDvVKgjm7VI4Ct18axZ2KEbTKGgwUHbC4a0veAZcYCMBvYpMo4KcRpOkm-2BhZ7gew9vCUv9HExuszGWJYfRQSBmW-2B9NmuuBEk5c4HkIWBGIb-2B6PyH2I0CCYnqIPLLuw1Qt5GBIYGOFnfXORsuqytMhSAVoVGPh75xDnoDZa7jpHgD4uIBgivKWdx1-2F5wd6OVhUVwJeyVb5ng6V9uEzCNW-2Bu6-2B5eBlNTC8xUUHbLOX7TMR6ww7ApGcOFfgYjTWgTLfjtb29NY4WnKF8alVDM0oRFZiwi5uBu1Dun-2BF2QiNJS9Q4K6pVMehKewhzG5XfvGGmb8XZ9fd2em5-2BWtj6G0Y0nr-2BDMZ2S0dZdGzqnyNR8EeTteLTly-2BEEUwi7bcphUyK2cjdyp1BZJtmSewes3p-2BvgSmzMtvYqCYCZMFnYXnr3M-2Fk-2F5qkDggx6p0ctZTGv2HQ6hPQX7mnzRojwwUZYoNXxP4Qz84o-2B-2BTuIJ3z7ni3r9CfU7E2UUJeyp-2FgHZR6lf1cAeThPbiCUE2jNHTpAaLTfGBzw-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | When you stand against the President’s Green New Deal agenda, you make some pretty powerful enemies. Dear Peter, On Friday, we received word that a huge case we are advancing to stop big parts of the unlawful Biden job-killing climate agenda will be heard at the U.S. Supreme Court. It’s a pretty big deal. Unfortunately, when you stand against the President’s Green New Deal agenda, you make some pretty powerful enemies — enemies who pour millions of dollars in against you! That’s why we need your help to meet our critical End-of-Month deadline. We are $5,200 short of our goal for October and wanted to make one final push TODAY. We must get strong for the big fights ahead. It’s just not enough to win in Court - we must win over the hearts and minds of the American people. As you know, we didn’t bother you too much this month, but now we are asking for your donation today! | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 == \-

body:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=113089363a2e44ddb80a68b74d450b69&_e=plctFNsOOd1v0ScXPpkIxm96mG6kKHdM3ApZPo9q6rZvqHQUMyYxOXpARTISCPO0vcrCByPIri6BLF4FuzL8xDPUReMW0gX_OBWn-WsOZ5fbRqILmgUrru0V7NubZrknjam4zhPq4kOKLRhXgvinS6ArBqdbEX_swngrzpHVtxP9gbKuSuGyMzjEyOsrh8yrPDBtWvD30clZWfzGPBDTgK1sSuJZZeUP-iWFJLX_jZpbAyubYsvcT21sCeXpHl-FehK8zygY34tDH6W6TeH2P55HThsH5tZAHG2pUt2ndSnXoMLXrf7m_uJmAf8IfRjPpoFU3QHyeZHpmQ6U_ei49RPtTBxw4s9VEl9CQq0N8ucRnCc3jU0ZNq5hWPfiPCLkX1-L-GR-C6WgxFniAet7LRIuVydCfWFkxqyVHt8vH90%3D)

---
Teamwork is one of the first things they teach you when you join the army. Because of that, I’ll be the first to tell you that I’m honored to have you on my team, but right now, Fellow American, [**I need your help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=113089363a2e44ddb80a68b74d450b69&_e=plctFNsOOd1v0ScXPpkIxm96mG6kKHdM3ApZPo9q6rZvqHQUMyYxOXpARTISCPO0vcrCByPIri6BLF4FuzL8xDPUReMW0gX_OBWn-WsOZ5fbRqILmgUrru0V7NubZrknjam4zhPq4kOKLRhXgvinS6ArBqdbEX_swngrzpHVtxP9gbKuSuGyMzjEyOsrh8yrJyQ0p-qsvXnMVyD6zZRd8QlmQ5EQdoTPHOvPqVeKsts7sSEOMvwGZO118CYmLvf8NN_FX1DUrfy2q86J-wjb8JHNP4JhFqogJM82tuiM2BaGRn5PcEQRIKdKjXZmuUgQLKbbshZ68poNvBQhMCV8TeubIU8A5pjnsZyLp8EMbSkNxEeFyzuR1RLQpVRrYO7jF21M0HAzaPL0yfnuenuftSNC6KjOvoiBYRxGSK8D0zw%3D)

**Our mandatory FEC fundraising deadline is just hours away** , and we’re still short on our fundraising goal by **just $3,429**. We need to reach our goal to make sure we have the resources to fight off Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and their liberal allies.

[**END OF THE MONTH >>> CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=113089363a2e44ddb80a68b74d450b69&_e=plctFNsOOd1v0ScXPpkIxm96mG6kKHdM3ApZPo9q6rZvqHQUMyYxOXpARTISCPO0vcrCByPIri6BLF4FuzL8xDPUReMW0gX_OBWn-WsOZ5fbRqILmgUrru0V7NubZrknjam4zhPq4kOKLRhXgvinS6ArBqdbEX_swngrzpHVtxP9gbKuSuGyMzjEyOsrh8yrZ4UF23HcRxoMar_aEz2EGEtH-27WhfLl3FpHuZub0o7vhD5q-j3z2X6ozMj7WAjok0hsdXhmslJUbPb2aaHx2SUR0Mh_cYm0i0apD5l_gID-VseStE29z0_syiCmdNzHg7k_6ePmE7PzzhWoyB3jffGgZrN6mP4pygDiAhUA5L42ySh0dP3OrDeW9FQLuxCfMqKROinjp-1gzH8dKaZv5DTYLZQlPYI3n9irJBm8-uw%3D)
Fellow American, I know you have already done so much, but I need to ask you again. [**Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or anything you can to help me fight off the liberals who are trying to stop our red wave?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=113089363a2e44ddb80a68b74d450b69&_e=plctFNsOOd1v0ScXPpkIxm96mG6kKHdM3ApZPo9q6rZvqHQUMyYxOXpARTISCPO0vcrCByPIri6BLF4FuzL8xDPUReMW0gX_OBWn-WsOZ5fbRqILmgUrru0V7NubZrknjam4zhPq4kOKLRhXgvinS6ArBqdbEX_swngrzpHVtxP9gbKuSuGyMzjEyOsrh8yruY-JwbVh_uGPDG2ZyS0OjpxTDpRjk2-NQyEiL27752OWMdXQ1j_k02v10BxsnrDHbqkYfjEZsxaQrB9QdOG2nEzCMwj_KUWsUpj994QauUmQkeJ8uHNX7d23Z2k0cQyKB8wt0IU6gBJ0tihTYENS3fiN1Ro4B-UTcoPfbBaI-uYjCQteoGKW-31_zuxmDNpEP6avNzFGqqPn3w_T38XXNE5hSd7wctq7-C99I6W6IUE%3D)

I know it’s a big ask, but we’re living in a divided country that we need to unify if we want to have any chance of securing the American dream for our children and grandchildren. [**Please, chip in now and help me stop the liberals who want to keep our nation divided.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=113089363a2e44ddb80a68b74d450b69&_e=plctFNsOOd1v0ScXPpkIxm96mG6kKHdM3ApZPo9q6rZvqHQUMyYxOXpARTISCPO0vcrCByPIri6BLF4FuzL8xDPUReMW0gX_OBWn-WsOZ5fbRqILmgUrru0V7NubZrknjam4zhPq4kOKLRhXgvinS6ArBqdbEX_swngrzpHVtxP9gbKuSuGyMzjEyOsrh8yrSSiGWLD5jhXCDDqRDmu_yX99szfCoKtelVy4EfFkMenHgChZI-nCG4LLMABgEVGZr_TMK8Xim_zf6yDy1t2o4MajKvBnqxZfrXTi0Y5bBiD-K1NAjLGrkAIsluJG-16xaOBWCpwRW_yu4zaWV9YdEaRt9XXTBORq0jkdTI5nYATDjxQfPDHLAnW2Hvs3TlCf5TfZ-Of7FMOtNlqRqKcDYPhRGmZHk15s9YVj5lG4G_k%3D)

It’s a challenging and exciting time to be California’s youngest Member of Congress. After four years of the Trump presidency and a pandemic that has laid bare the inequities in our country, we have an opportunity to redefine who we are as Americans while rebuilding our communities in a way that reflects our values.

It’s crucial that Democrats continue to hold the House majority so that we can keep working on important issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices.**Congress needs people like me who can be strong advocates for the policies that matter to American families and workers.**

clean_body: It’s a challenging and exciting time to be California’s youngest Member of Congress. | = | I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but I wanted to reach out one last time before our crucial October fundraising deadline tonight= | = | = It’s a challenging and exciting time to be California’s youngest Member of Congress. After four years of the Trump presidency and a pandemic that has laid bare the inequities in our country, we have an opportunity to redefine who we are as Americans while rebuilding our communities in a way that reflects our values. It’s crucial that Democrats continue to hold the House majority so that we can keep working on important issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices.Congress needs people like me who can be strong advocates for the policies that matter to American families and workers. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

Our jaw is on the floor...

_Rolling Stone_ just reported that the far-right organizers of the January 6th insurrection met with members of Congress MULTIPLE times to plan the riot.

[**These seven members of Congress and their staff allegedly conspired with the insurrectionists:**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnbeLFnVPhxUBF4qDj0w-0-X5-J4Qr99S2M24uDTNuDV_PvVPoEv4x7Wp7fnUAzi4oygtNjV_z8K4QCJtVTgZRmCdGG7l2vbYBfQicIXA7vzTNCNhzWxoiBzrf_PKqxAJ06Y-_7-54F1AMRIV9RDqOOFvxvlkM-nfO3sesJgpSueKk12A8TC4ktXFRWl7XP7GFANjTOgkb6cSOVbNh-U8ogZ2DLNA6xMSbGeuHSeg7L5wPc-bEuaNqNLCwIkf1cl6E1c9bfqSlAMUFeN7uFdR0aSPg3EocQOSmQeJUHeuEzAQ/3gm/OGtLOhDzTi-SvBsvCqrtvA/h8/ORs4Pr09dqsEd43JByUCycPQ4N4d7zQI8Etp4fRy5N8)

clean_body: these members are a disgrace... | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | Our jaw is on the floor... Rolling Stone just reported that the far-right organizers of the January 6th insurrection met with members of Congress MULTIPLE times to plan the riot. Marjorie Taylor Greene Madison Cawthorn Lauren Boebert Louie Gohmert Andy Biggs Paul Gosar Mo Brooks And Rep. Gosar even floated the idea that the insurrectionists would receive a “blanket pardon” to protect them from legal action! These members are a disgrace -- and took a SLEDGEHAMMER to our democracy. | | | h Don’t wait, please respond! \-- Team Ruiz ROLLING STONE: "EXCLUSIVE: Jan. 6 Protest Organizers Say They Participated in ‘Dozens’ of Planning Meetings With Members of Congress and White House Staff" | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. body:
We can’t afford to fall behind on a single fundraising goal.

| Friend,

I hate having to bug you on a Sunday evening, but this is important: can you chip in to my campaign before our crucial end-of-month filing deadline tonight? Here’s a secure link to give: [_**delinadisanto.com/EOMgoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38172351/314266644/-1070898384?refcode=blu-ddc-20211031-2-em&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZjYjZmMi1iMjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aa0C17pFPPct6q9t4EC4ULucGGN53CL5BSpfF_lmZns=)

Paul Gosar has shown he would rather organize with insurrectionists and let down Arizona and his country than do anything to support AZ-04 families and workers — and I know it’s well past time to replace him. Reporting strong fundraising numbers is our best opportunity to show Paul Gosar that we have all hands on deck to replace him with the representative AZ-04 deserves.

We can’t afford to fall behind on a single fundraising goal if we are going to get Gosar out of office. That’s why I’m asking one last time before tonight’s deadline if you can support my campaign right away. Here’s that link again: [_**delinadisanto.com/EOMgoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38172352/314266645/-1070898384?refcode=blu-ddc-20211031-2-em&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZjYjZmMi1iMjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aa0C17pFPPct6q9t4EC4ULucGGN53CL5BSpfF_lmZns=)

With appreciation,
Delina

body:
It’s been almost a year and we are still waiting | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s2g642GsQ2bCy80udyveZQFlm_OFM_s8vFDjo0In5I2MKTl3XW_5ypppGSeRGwLxVXm5KtTbzDFbkU-f1kA-kNlJUlL_gir2E1hkDgJeEBaq6-X4LbzGE6LGdoELMYAzy4XvLlv13Zisn3SD2FRNrR3k7VK2WzW2Dqe1wevj2vuV3U5qi_pRadwhq7JC4Qngqdnq-5I0PgctAKFpaVEssiM/3gm/av8GvCNNRoC8GgxiBiMLQQ/h0/3kunC0bjXH4abywjVd-04GOcLewFb1C995AfBKU6uvw)
Hi team, It’s easy to see how frustrated Democratic voters are right now. It’s been almost a year since Democrats took control of Congress and the White House, and we are still waiting. We’ve watched as the most important bill of our lifetimes has been narrowed and President Biden’s progressive priorities removed. It can be easy to feel like none of it matters, as we watch one Democrat, Joe Manchin, dismantle everything we are fighting for, one piece at a time. We are frustrated too. But, however frustrated we are with the state of the Build Back Better legislation, we are more frustrated that our congressman is doing nothing to fight for it. **In 2020, Danny Davis missed the third most votes of any Democratic congressperson in the IL delegation.** That is not the forceful leadership we need, and Democratic politicians like Davis aren’t just hurting Congress by being absent, they are demoralizing Democratic voters. **[Can you rush us $7 tonight, to help us hit our end of month goal, and elect Kina to bring forceful momentum to Democrats in Congress?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzf70y7wXqkPX4862n8Y2G9rLHaA706jNFHGn8a6KrH2bLCU77EtqPhPbkeTfrpgZmB9XikX71TzvokA1nvRnXeldvSn3RcM8jG8jqMYKu0S3a9lhkvr6wpTSf5pIMygAtCi6PVln69SRqRO83PeAD5-af0kXqY6LxpS6a1sdkToZ78VJxpw51ibWn_Y7lfqkeWY-atO7SqzXgfM-HZ-GZcOK5_w1dST6CUXlxTGMvLJaX5jqx8BuvFO_kMyzpVFeliYU4UoiuMjrB_srubgZvZfw/3gm/av8GvCNNRoC8GgxiBiMLQQ/h1/-OtenN0b4NJSnJ74d6khMaX594Y8WnFtBPOvYY91QoY)**
[Donate now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzf70y7wXqkPX4862n8Y2G9rKT6YBzHPGTdmTJYcbHheVEr4wgiPQONLjIOZ484oBAujidULvPQweSDCXB0t8DNi_jN2dXqeaDn5U3OI92mmhjxIZEzlBdseKUV2fn_-xCoyMuaqsqiAPnGgxN6Ar5Dhclprnvevzr4lCkG_JmvpxtcpKje-ZA_j68HRd2rcVDBme4GwBcWvZPPo3NCyNEO3HwpjJV6i8SUIYR3ZwSAA7U8dmETIRlAHUao9tnrouaEebEH4xa6YniakT4MA53rlQ/3gm/av8GvCNNRoC8GgxiBiMLQQ/h2/7McKZluiHm2hZMCrE6SMNo9JFKy95Fo5KuRZnqKUvT0) You can help us turn the tide, and make sure Democrats take control of the narrative, bring progressive leadership back to the forefront, and pass the kind of ambitious legislation we know Americans desperately need, and that President Biden already supports.

clean_body: It’s been almost a year and we are still waiting | | | Hi team, It’s easy to see how frustrated Democratic voters are right now. It’s been almost a year since Democrats took control of Congress and the White House, and we are still waiting. We’ve watched as the most important bill of our lifetimes has been narrowed and President Biden’s progressive priorities removed. It can be easy to feel like none of it matters, as we watch one Democrat, Joe Manchin, dismantle everything we are fighting for, one piece at a time. We are frustrated too. But, however frustrated we are with the state of the Build Back Better legislation, we are more frustrated that our congressman is doing nothing to fight for it. In 2020, Danny Davis missed the third most votes of any Democratic congressperson in the IL delegation. That is not the forceful leadership we need, and Democratic politicians like Davis aren’t just hurting Congress by being absent, they are demoralizing Democratic voters. You can help us turn the tide, and make sure Democrats take control of the narrative, bring progressive leadership back to the forefront, and pass the kind of ambitious legislation we know Americans desperately need, and that President Biden already supports. Thank you, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: | | Sent via . clean_body: | = Hey friend, happy Halloween! I’ll keep this short so you can enjoy the rest of your weekend and the holiday (if you’re like me, you have a bunch of trick-or-treaters to give candy to). In just a few hours, our campaign for Congress is facing our October fundraising deadline, and my finance director Maddy tells me we’re still not where we need to be. I’m ready to take on Ryan Zinke, turn this House seat blue, and fight for each and every one of you in Congress. [**Second, I’m reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to support my campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. As you already know, it will require an extraordinary effort to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this U.S. Senate seat from red to blue. That’s why I’m giving this fight everything I’ve got -- even if it means being away from home more than I would like.

Knowing our campaign is putting in the work to give Wisconsin workers and families the leadership they deserve in the U.S. Senate makes it all worth it. You see, being available and accountable to the people of our state -- that’s what public service should be about. It’s what I’ve done as State Treasurer, and it’s what I will do as Wisconsin's next U.S. Senator.

I’m thankful for your support in this campaign because it allows me to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time meeting Wisconsinites where they’re at to have important conversations about the challenges facing their communities. Your support also gives me a little breathing room to do important things like FaceTime with my family or take my son out trick-or-treating. That's what keeps me going.

Look, no one said running for U.S. Senate would be easy, especially for working moms -- but we’re making a genuine effort to listen, learn, and build an agenda together because that’s what the people of our state deserve. Wisconsinites need someone who will fight for them on issues like paid leave, lower prescription drug costs, better public schools, and more -- which is why I'm running for U.S. Senate.

[**If you can, I’d really appreciate anything you can chip in to keep this important work going. Add a small donation before midnight to help us flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat from red to blue and give working families the leadership they deserve. Click here to contribute.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38172440/314267576/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211031_eom11_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211031_eom11_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzNkYzU2Zi1iNDNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Qouxh-Ho-0Ht4VhUPp2PNqjxHYEyMJSrr9hGCXfzgE=)

Thanks for reading all the way through. Your support is absolutely crucial to this campaign and I cannot thank you enough.

Happy Halloween from our cheesy family!

— Sarah Godlewski

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. clean_body: Hey! Two quick things for you. First, I went trick-or-treating with Hartley earlier. Check out his cheesy costume: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = As you already know, it will require an extraordinary effort to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this U.S. Senate seat from red to blue. That’s why I’m giving this fight everything I’ve got -- even if it means being away from home more than I would like. Knowing our campaign is putting in the work to give Wisconsin workers and families the leadership they deserve in the U.S. Senate makes it all worth it. You see, being available and accountable to the people of our state -- that’s what public service should be about. It’s what I’ve done as State Treasurer, and it’s what I will do as Wisconsin's next U.S. Senator. I’m thankful for your support in this campaign because it allows me to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time meeting Wisconsinites where they’re at to have important conversations about the challenges facing their communities. Your support also gives me a little breathing room to do important things like FaceTime with my family or take my son out trick-or-treating. That's what keeps me going. Look, no one said running for U.S. Senate would be easy, especially for working moms -- but we’re making a genuine effort to listen, learn, and build an agenda together because that’s what the people of our state deserve. Wisconsinites need someone who will fight for them on issues like paid leave, lower prescription drug costs, better public schools, and more -- which is why I'm running for U.S. Senate. = Thanks for reading all the way through. Your support is absolutely crucial to this campaign and I cannot thank you enough. Happy Halloween from our cheesy family! — Sarah Godlewski Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. I've been **fighting for American energy independence, a secure border, and responsible spending in Washington DC.**

I'm just sending a quick note to make sure you saw this email from my team earlier this week. **The Democrat agenda is bad for Americans.** With your help, we're going to win in 2022, and **pass policies that help American families.**

If you can help us out with [a donation](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=fd653aa7a8&e=1050d051da), it will help us fight back against Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and their liberal agenda.

Best wishes,

Jake LaTurner

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: what's scaring me most this Halloween
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Happy Halloween, Peter: **There's nothing scarier than six more years of Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), which is why I'm running to defeat him and protect Democratic Senate control.**
But in the spirit of Halloween, I wanted to share this old photo I came across from one of my early Halloweens. I love every part of this season: everything pumpkin-related, gorgeous foliage, apple picking and, of course, decorating and dressing up for Halloween. In this photo, I’m dressed up as Big Bird – and I’m as unimpressed with Chuck Grassley now as I was in this big bird costume then.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38172496/314267934/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk343-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTNkYzMwNy1iNjNhLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZeZDQiFS2SluVlBNx-UagyG0tyEIjRdThre0VUINXQk=)
I'm struck by just how much has changed since that photo was taken. I didn't even know what Congress was back then – let alone that I would have the privilege to serve my community as the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. As a kid, I was most scared of werewolves lurking under my bed, **but now the things that keep me up at night are much more real.**
Iowans have been sold out by Sen. Grassley. Rather than getting things done for our communities, he's advancing far-right conspiracies and leaving behind working families like mine. What's more, as former chair of the Judiciary Committee, he holds responsibility for confirming some of the extreme justices who now hold the fate of Roe v. Wade in their hands.
**That's why I'm running for Senate – to stop Sen. Grassley's extremism, protect our Senate majority and fight for working families. But tonight is our last chance to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal, and right now we're still $3,205 behind.**
**[So please – before the clock strikes midnight and the witching hour of end-of-month fundraising ends – can you chip in $5 dollars or whatever you can spare to defeat Sen. clean_body: | | | Happy Halloween, Peter: There's nothing scarier than six more years of Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), which is why I'm running to defeat him and protect Democratic Senate control. But in the spirit of Halloween, I wanted to share this old photo I came across from one of my early Halloweens. I love every part of this season: everything pumpkin-related, gorgeous foliage, apple picking and, of course, decorating and dressing up for Halloween. In this photo, I’m dressed up as Big Bird – and I’m as unimpressed with Chuck Grassley now as I was in this big bird costume then. = I'm struck by just how much has changed since that photo was taken. I didn't even know what Congress was back then – let alone that I would have the privilege to serve my community as the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. As a kid, I was most scared of werewolves lurking under my bed, but now the things that keep me up at night are much more real. Iowans have been sold out by Sen. Grassley. Rather than getting things done for our communities, he's advancing far-right conspiracies and leaving behind working families like mine. What's more, as former chair of the Judiciary Committee, he holds responsibility for confirming some of the extreme justices who now hold the fate of Roe v. Wade in their hands. That's why I'm running for Senate – to stop Sen. Grassley's extremism, protect our Senate majority and fight for working families. But tonight is our last chance to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal, and right now we're still $3,205 behind. = | | = Witches and ghosts will roam the streets tonight (while we eat just a few too many pieces of candy) – but if you help me meet this fundraising goal, we can all go to bed one step closer to defeating Sen. Grassley and a little bit less scared. Thanks for standing with me – wishing you and your family a very spooky Halloween! – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Erik Aadland
subject: This is an important mission Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate

In the army, I was taught to always fight for my teammates. Will you fight with me Peter? |

**Our mandatory FEC fundraising deadline is just hours away** , and we’re still short on our fundraising goal by **just $3,429**. We need to reach our goal to make sure we have the resources to fight off Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and their liberal allies.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Hundreds of people have already donated

body:
Most of our resources come from donations to emails like this.
#

We have good news and bad news.
**Good News:** Hundreds of supporters have chipped in to support our organization in advance of tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. We really appreciate the surge of grassroots support, so thank you to everyone who has donated so far.
**Bad News:** Unfortunately, we are still $8,997 short from meeting our $115,000 goal. This isn’t an arbitrary number — it’s what we have calculated we will need to stand up against the gun lobby’s extensive disinformation campaign trying to roll back decades of gun safety progress.
So, we’re reaching out one last time before our midnight deadline:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution towards our $115,000 October fundraising goal? Your contribution will immediately be put to work putting pressure on Congress to pass background checks and other reasonable gun safety proposals. Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?refcode=em211031-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1164_3935704_nZQPCt&akid=1164%2E3935704%2EnZQPCt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211031-2-15&t=20&refcode2=1164_3935704_nZQPCt&akid=1164%2E3935704%2EnZQPCt)**

Friend, it’s Darin.

This will only take a second.

Democrats are rigging these maps because they know they can’t win elections on a level playing field.

Members of the NYPD, FDNY, and other New York first responders were marching and protesting Biden and DeBlasio’s vaccine mandates—all of them chanting, _**“HOLD THE LINE.”**_ _ _

Peter, because of these mandates, we’re set to lose THOUSANDS of hardworking heroes who put their lives on the line every day for the city of New York.

Peter, these vaccine mandates aren’t just hitting our first respondersー** _millions of Americans in the private sector also have their backs against the wall._ **

subject: Top Doctor: The Only Nerve Pain Supplement You Should Be Taking
body:
**This Nerve Pain Breakthrough Has Doctors Baffled**
**
**Michael Brady, a 78 year old retired engineer and avid golfer found a solution to his nerve pain and it transformed his retirement after suffering for 10 years. If you are like Michael, you know how devastating nerve pain can be. It can stop you dead in your tracks.

“You’ll just have to live with it” was Michael Brady’s doctor diagnosis of his nerve pain.

Pain medication was all Michael was prescribed and he hated how they made him feel.

Michael turned to the internet for alternatives. He didn’t find much, until...

...He found this incredible, all natural solution that used ingredients that were backed by over 20 clinical studies. Not to mention, they literally have over 100 real testimonials on their [website.](https://bit.ly/3beL2Bp#cl/61520_md/1/14450/2844/259/215325)

Shortly after using this solution, the tingling and numbness in his legs and toes disappeared. The feeling of cold and burning in his feet and legs also vanished. He is now off prescription medications and can enjoy doing all the activities he loves.**
**
And the best part?**
**
They are still offering a 2-week sample, but this may not last forever.**

** If you're suffering with nerve pain, you should [watch this presentation immediately.](https://bit.ly/3beL2Bp#cl/61520_md/1/14450/2844/259/215325)
**[](https://bit.ly/3beL2Bp#cl/61520_md/1/14450/2844/259/215325)
**
If you experience any of the following symptoms, DO NOT keep putting it off like Michael did! Feel better NOW!
* Numbness and tingling in your hands and feet
* Shooting pain and burning sensations in your extremities
* Loss of balance and coordination
* Lack of sleep from increased pain at night

[Watch Presentation Here](https://bit.ly/3beL2Bp#cl/61520_md/1/14450/2844/259/215325)

**
**
**
**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This should SCARE YOU!
body:
It's happened to you. One of your posts on Facebook or Twitter magically disappears or maybe you've been banned like I was.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw) It's happened to you. One of your posts on Facebook or Twitter magically disappears or maybe you've been banned like I was.

It's happened to tens of millions of conservatives . . . including a sitting United States President, Donald J. Trump . . . [**and this is our chance to fight back and END Cancel Culture and Election Interference**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw).

I'm about to file a groundbreaking lawsuit that will FINALLY expose the players who have been manipulating our culture and controlling our elections with the help of Big Tech.

[**Be a part of my lawsuit by chipping in today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw)
| | SUPPORT LAURA'S LAWSUIT NOW
---

While Big Tech Billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey have been the targets of other lawsuits and campaigns in the past - they're just the button pushers who happily support the communist agenda of their masters.

My lawsuit takes aim at the secret players who are driving Cancel Culture in America, and you'll be shocked at who they are - **and how YOU have actually been supporting them nearly your entire life**.

While I can't say who it is now, [**by supporting my lawsuit**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw), you'll be among the first to know who is behind the drive to silence conservatives - **and you 'll be able to fight back with me**.

**I have to be prepared for a complete assault by billion-dollar companies as soon as I file** , and I have to raise an incredible amount of money to keep going - so it will take thousands of us supporting this case, and [**I 'm humbly asking for your support**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw).

[**Please donate any amount that you can.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw)
| SUPPORT LAURA'S LAWSUIT NOW
---

Cancel Culture isn't about wiping out content that the Big Tech Mafia finds offensive, it's about crushing all influence from within our entire movement!

**It 's about controlling our elections and our ability to communicate and persuade other Americans!**

Don't think for a second this is about some conservative influencers whining that they've been banned on social media.

In 2020, I ran for Congress and was banned on Facebook and Twitter while my Democrat opponent received access to those sites - **which was an illegal in-kind campaign contribution**.

My campaign made history as the first federal campaign to be de-platformed by Big Tech.

While that was blatant and out in the open Big Tech election interference, behind the scenes, the Big Tech Mafia worked like crazy to suppress posts that supported conservative candidates and ideas throughout the 2020 election cycle.

And just like I warned in 2018 . . . when I confronted Jack Dorsey during the Congressional hearing on Tech Censorship . . . in 2022 and 2024, **they 'll do it all over again if we don't stop them now!**

[**Help me stop them by backing my lawsuit today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/8i4hkV9IfqfemjZ4OKqoUg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw)

If you can donate, as soon as my lawsuit is filed, I'll shoot you an email with a copy of the legal complaint, exposing the power players, and together, **we can watch them run!**

Thanks so much for your time and your support.

With Gratitude,

Laura Loomer

(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/CDseoLHUGX7RetWXPZCGWw)
